title: From ML Predictions to Informed Diagnostic Assistance Using the Toulmin Model of Argumentation
summary: To provide a structured and interpretable assessment, we decompose the image-based diagnosis into components following the Toulmin model of argumentation. This model consists of a claim, grounds, warrant, qualifier, rebuttal, and backing. Consider a claim generated by a machine learning (ML) model for retinal diagnosis. Rather than accepting this claim at face value, one could either apply explainable AI (XAI) methods or adopt an argumentation-based approach. In our framework, a model specialized in biomarker extraction from images provides the grounds. The warrant-linking the grounds to the claim - is analyzed by an agent equipped with medical knowledge; in our architecture, this role is fulfilled by a MedGemma agent. The qualifier is determined based on the overall quantitative evaluation of both the warrant and grounds models. Finally, a rebuttal is constructed using image similarity measures computed with MedSigLip. All these components are presented to the human expert, enabling a more informed and critical assessment of the ML-generated diagnosis.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个基于Toulmin论证模型的医学图像诊断框架，将ML生成的诊断分解为主张、依据、保证、限定词、反驳和支撑六个组成部分，通过专门模型提取生物标志物（依据）、MedGemma代理分析医学知识（保证）、整体评估确定可信度（限定词）、MedSigLip计算图像相似度构建反驳，最终将完整论证呈现给人类专家以供审核。
AI.motivation: 现有的ML医学诊断缺乏结构化和可解释性，XAI方法解释能力有限，需要一种更全面的论证方式来帮助人类专家理解和评估ML生成的诊断结论。
AI.method: 采用Toulmin论证模型分解诊断过程：生物标志物提取模型提供"依据"；MedGemma代理分析"保证"环节；整体评估确定"限定词"；MedSigLip计算图像相似度构建"反驳"；最后将所有论证组件呈现给人类专家。
AI.result: 通过将诊断分解为Toulmin模型的六个组件，为人类专家提供了更全面、可解释的诊断信息，支持更知情的临床评估决策。
AI.conclusion: 基于论证模型的框架比传统XAI方法更能支持人类专家对ML诊断进行批判性评估，增强了人机协作的可信度和可解释性。

title: Format Sensitivity Index: Token-Controlled Prompt Wrapper Robustness and Schema Compliance in LLM Benchmarking
summary: Prompt wrappers often differ only in formatting, yet they can change model scores enough to flip leaderboard conclusions. We study this variance under a token-controlled protocol and introduce two complementary metrics: the Format Sensitivity Index (FSI), the accuracy range induced by wrapper choice, and the Parseability Sensitivity Index (PSI), the corresponding range in answer parseability. Across 140,000 OpenRouter generations spanning 7 QA tasks, 5 wrapper families, and 4 instruct models from 7B to 72B parameters, we find that mean FSI varies by over 30x across models and is largely explained by compliance failures. A fixed-effects regression shows that parseability remains a strong predictor of accuracy even after controlling for task, model, and wrapper. We argue that reporting accuracy without wrapper variance and compliance is statistically fragile, and we give practical recommendations for both benchmarking and structured-output deployments.

AI.tldr: 本文发现提示包装器（Prompt wrappers）的格式差异会导致模型评分显著变化，甚至翻转排行榜结论。通过引入格式敏感指数（FSI）和可解析性敏感指数（PSI）两个指标，对140,000次生成实验进行分析，发现不同模型的FSI差异超过30倍，可解析性是准确率的强预测因子。作者建议报告准确率时应同时报告包装器方差和合规性。
AI.motivation: 提示包装器仅在格式上有所不同，却可能改变模型分数，足以翻转排行榜结论，因此需要系统研究这种方差及其影响。
AI.method: 采用令牌控制协议，引入FSI（格式敏感指数）和PSI（可解析性敏感指数）两个互补指标，在140,000次OpenRouter生成实验（涵盖7个QA任务、5种包装器家族、4种指令模型）上进行固定效应回归分析。
AI.result: 不同模型的平均FSI差异超过30倍，主要由合规性失败解释；可解析性在控制任务、模型和包装器后仍是准确率的强预测因子。
AI.conclusion: 仅报告准确率而不考虑包装器方差和合规性在统计上是脆弱的，论文给出了基准测试和结构化输出部署的实用建议。

title: Faithful, Not Corrective: Message-Format Effects in Multi-Hop Agent Relays Are Tier-Dependent
summary: When LLM agents hand off information to one another, does the message format matter? Two literatures disagree: format-optimization work reports that structured messages cut cost without hurting accuracy, while format-restriction work finds that imposing structure degrades generation -- and neither measures what happens when a message traverses multiple hops, where copy fidelity, not one-shot generation, dominates. We introduce a controlled relay testbed: briefs of twelve programmatically generated atomic facts are re-encoded hop-by-hop in five formats (free NL, precision-instructed NL, JSON, triples, key-value) over six hops, scored by a fixed strong grader against programmatic ground truth, across two relay-capability tiers, a cognitive-load condition, and a paired-fork error injection. We find that message-format effects are tier-dependent. (i) Under faithful-relay instructions a strong relay is nearly lossless -- the documented "telephone-game" collapse does not occur -- and adding per-hop cognitive load leaves format-level fidelity unchanged (within +/-1.8 points) while raising generation cost by 24-53%. (ii) Under a weak (1.5B) relay the across-format spread of six-hop recall grows by a factor of 8.7 (from 2.3 to 20.5 points), driven by two opposing mechanisms -- an encoding toll paid by the rigid formats and drift resistance specific to the fixed-key JSON schema -- that flip the format ranking in transit. (iii) In a paired-fork injection, an injected wrong value, once present, persists to the final hop in 83-100% of chains in every format, closely matching each format's retention of the true value, with no detectable collateral damage to neighboring facts. Structure buys a faithful, error-localizing channel -- not an error-correcting code -- and format choice should follow the weakest relay in the pipeline.

AI.tldr: 本文通过中继实验发现，消息格式对LLM代理间信息传递的影响取决于中继能力：强中继下格式影响极小，弱中继下格式效果翻转，且结构化消息能准确定位错误但无法纠错。
AI.motivation: 现有研究对LLM代理间消息格式存在分歧——格式优化研究主张结构化消息降本不减准确率，格式限制研究发现结构化会损害生成质量，且两者均未测量多跳场景下的信息保真度。
AI.method: 构建控制中继测试平台：将12个程序生成原子事实以五种格式（自由NL、精确指令NL、JSON、三元组、键值对）进行六跳重新编码，用固定强评分器对比程序真值，设置两种中继能力层级、认知负荷条件和配对分支错误注入。
AI.result: (i) 强中继下几乎无损失，认知负荷影响微小；(ii) 弱中继下格式间六跳召回率差距扩大8.7倍，格式排名发生翻转；(iii) 注入错误后83-100%保留至终跳，无附带损害。
AI.conclusion: 结构化消息提供忠实、可定位错误的通道而非纠错码，格式选择应基于管道中最弱中继的能力。

title: Boltzmann MapReduce: A Partition-Function Reduce for Forkable Sandboxes
summary: To leading order under local asymptotic normality (LAN), the confidence density a worker emits over a chunk of size $n$ is a Gibbs--Boltzmann measure $\exp\{-βE(θ)\}$ whose inverse temperature is the sample size, $β=n$. Three consequences are exact in the Gaussian/linear case and first-order otherwise: disjoint chunks carry independent Boltzmann factors, so the MapReduce \emph{reduce}, read literally, is a partition function $Z=\int\prod_k h_k\,dθ$ whose mode is precision-weighted (inverse-variance) pooling; frequentist consistency is the zero-temperature limit $T=1/n\to0$

AI.tldr: 本文在局部渐近正态（LAN）框架下，证明工作者对大小为n的数据块发布的置信密度可表示为Gibbs-Boltzmann测度，其逆温度等于样本大小β=n。在Gaussian/线性情况下严格成立，其他情况一阶近似。MapReduce的reduce操作可解释为配分函数Z=∫∏_k h_k dθ，其众数对应精度加权（逆方差）池化。频率学派一致性对应于零温极限T=1/n→0。
AI.motivation: 将分布式统计推断中的置信密度与统计力学中的Boltzmann分布建立形式化联系，揭示MapReduce框架的统计基础。
AI.method: 利用局部渐近正态（LAN）理论，将置信密度表示为Gibbs-Boltzmann测度，通过配分函数和逆温度分析分布式推断的统计行为。
AI.result: MapReduce的reduce操作对应配分函数，众数为精度加权池化；频率一致性对应零温极限。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为分布式统计推断提供了统计力学的理论框架，统一了置信密度、MapReduce操作和频率学派一致性。

title: EgoSteer: A Full-Stack System Towards Steerable Dexterous Manipulation from Egocentric Videos
summary: Steerability is a defining capability of generalist robot policies, yet remains largely absent in dexterous-hand systems for lack of large-scale, language-aligned, and action-accurate demonstration data. To address this bottleneck, we present a full-stack system that scales dexterous VLA pre-training from egocentric human videos and enables data-efficient real-robot post-training. It integrates EgoSmith, a data pipeline that curates in-the-wild egocentric videos into 9.6K hours of high-quality pre-training data with 9x higher throughput and better accuracy than prior SOTA; a unified robot stack for teleoperation and human-in-the-loop correction; and EgoSteer, a world-model-enhanced VLA trained on optimized infrastructure. Human-data pre-training equips EgoSteer with language-guided manipulation priors, which are grounded through robot post-training and improved by DAgger refinement. Empirically, EgoSteer robustly executes free-form instructions across 40+ diverse tasks, demonstrating failure recovery, dexterity, and generalization. The pre-trained model also few-shot adapts to complex long-horizon tasks, including box folding, on two embodiments with 75+% success. We open-source the system, data, and model at https://egosteer.github.io/.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了EgoSteer系统，通过从自我中心人类视频中扩展灵巧VLA预训练，解决了灵巧手系统缺乏可操控性的问题，实现了数据高效的机器人后训练，在40+任务上表现出色。
AI.motivation: 灵巧手系统缺乏大规模、语言对齐且动作准确的演示数据，导致其缺乏通用机器人策略应有的可操控性（steerability）。
AI.method: 提出全栈系统EgoSteer：1) EgoSmith数据流水线，从野外自我中心视频中筛选9.6K小时高质量预训练数据；2) 统一遥操作和人机交互校正机器人栈；3) 基于世界模型增强的VLA模型EgoSteer。结合人类数据预训练、机器人后训练和DAgger改进。
AI.result: 在40+多样化任务中鲁棒执行自由形式指令，具备故障恢复、灵巧性和泛化能力。在两种机器人平台上，盒折叠等长时任务少样本适应成功率达75%以上。
AI.conclusion: EgoSteer系统有效解决了灵巧手系统的可操控性瓶颈，通过自我中心视频扩展预训练实现了语言指导的操控先验，并开源了系统、数据和模型。

title: Unified Backbone Refinement for Diffusion Models via Internal-Latent Analysis
comment: 45 pages, 23 figures. Accepted at the European Conference on Computer Vision (ECCV) 2026
summary: Diffusion models have achieved remarkable success across diverse domains, with performance closely related to the denoising backbones that parameterize the score function. In this paper, we present a systematic, phase-aware analysis of diffusion components and show that abrupt, early-stage fluctuations in deep latents are strongly associated with artifacts. Guided by these findings, we introduce DUNE (Diffusion Unified Network refiNEr), a training-free refinement framework that detects abrupt deviations in deep low-noise internal latents using a shared EMA-based criterion, and applies backbone-specific suppression to the detector-selected entries. Although derived from U-Net, the same detect-suppress principle extends naturally to Transformer-based diffusion models by acting on the latents of deep self-attention blocks. Extensive experiments across multiple backbones indicate that DUNE improves fidelity while reducing hallucinations, offering new insight into where and when diffusion backbones should be controlled.

AI.tldr: 本文提出DUNE框架，通过检测并抑制扩散模型早期深层潜变量中的异常波动，无需训练即可提升生成质量并减少幻觉，适用于U-Net和Transformer等多种骨干网络。
AI.motivation: 扩散模型的性能与去噪骨干网络密切相关，但现有方法对扩散组件缺乏系统性、分阶段的分析，尤其对早期深层潜变量中的突变现象与生成伪影之间的关系理解不足。
AI.method: 提出DUNE框架，利用共享EMA准则检测深层低噪内部潜变量中的突变，并对检测到的条目施加骨干网络特定的抑制操作。该检测-抑制原则从U-Net自然扩展到Transformer架构的深度自注意力块。
AI.result: 在多种骨干网络上的大量实验表明，DUNE在提升生成保真度的同时减少了幻觉现象。
AI.conclusion: DUNE揭示了扩散骨干网络在何处、何时需要被控制，为理解扩散模型的内部工作机制提供了新视角。

title: Knowledge Graphs Meet Graph Neural Networks: A Comprehensive Survey
comment: Recently Accepted for publication in ACM Computing Surveys. This is the accepted manuscript version, and the final published version available at ACM Computing Surveys:https://doi.org/10.1145/3814608. Paper list at Github: https://github.com/sunxiaobei/awesome-gnn-based-knowledge-graphs
summary: Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) have emerged as a powerful paradigm in Knowledge Graphs (KGs) due to their intrinsic ability to model graph-structured data. However, there remains a lack of a systematic review about GNN-based methodologies across the entire knowledge graph technologies pipeline. To address this gap, we first propose a novel two-level taxonomy framework for GNN-based knowledge graph technologies: the KG technologies pipeline and GNN-based perspective. Specifically, the knowledge graph technologies pipeline covers knowledge graph construction, knowledge graph embedding, knowledge reasoning and knowledge graph applications. Meanwhile, the GNN-based perspective provides a new categorization of knowledge graph technologies with GNN models, such as GCN, GAT, and HGNN. Then, we analyze the advantages of GNN technology based on the characteristics of different tasks in the knowledge graph lifecycle. Furthermore, we detailed review various GNN-based models for knowledge graph following the proposed taxonomy, and summarize strengths and limitations. Finally, we discuss unresolved challenges and outline promising directions for future research.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个面向知识图谱全技术管道的GNN方法双层次分类体系，系统综述了GNN在知识图谱构建、嵌入、推理和应用中的研究进展，并分析了未来挑战与方向。
AI.motivation: 目前缺乏对GNN在知识图谱全技术流程中的系统性综述，现有研究多聚焦于单一任务，缺少整体视角的分类框架。
AI.method: 提出双层次分类体系：第一层按知识图谱技术管道（构建、嵌入、推理、应用）划分；第二层按GNN模型类型（GCN、GAT、HGNN等）分类，并据此对现有方法进行系统梳理与对比分析。
AI.result: 系统总结了不同GNN模型在知识图谱各生命周期任务中的优势与局限性，形成了结构化的技术全景图。
AI.conclusion: GNN为知识图谱技术提供了强大支持，但当前仍面临可解释性、大规模图处理、异构性等挑战，未来需在多模态融合、动态知识图谱等方面深入探索。

title: Interpreting Latent CoT Reasoning as Dynamical Systems
summary: Recent latent reasoning methods, such as CODI and COCONUT, face a fundamental interpretability problem: they maintain multiple superimposed candidate traces in the hidden space at each step, unlike explicit- CoT, which follows a single transparent reasoning trace. Existing mechanistic methods show compression, shortcuts, and superposition without explaining how reasoning evolves across latent steps. To address this gap, we model latent token sequences as trajectories in representation space and apply dynamical systems analysis to characterize the evolution of reasoning. Using quantitative measures, such as step-to-step change, direction consistency, and Lyapunov sensitivity, alongside qualitative projections, such as UMAP and DMD/PHATE, we show that latent CoT exhibits structured, non-random dynamics with two distinct stability classes. CODI behaves as a stable attractor, while COCONUT behaves as an unstable expanding system, and SIM-CoT supervision tightens both behaviors without changing the underlying dynamics. This framework advances the interpretability of latent CoT reasoning dynamics and provides actionable insights for improving latent reasoning performance. Code1 and Project page2 available online.

AI.tldr: 本文提出用动力系统分析方法（如Lyapunov指数、UMAP/DMD/PHATE）来解析潜在推理方法（CODI、COCONUT）的隐藏空间动态，发现CODI是稳定吸引子，COCONUT是不稳定扩张系统，SIM-CoT监督能强化这两种行为但不改变本质动力学。
AI.motivation: 现有潜在推理方法（如CODI、COCONUT）面临严重的可解释性问题：它们同时在隐藏空间中维持多条叠加的候选推理轨迹，而显式思维链（CoT）遵循单一透明的推理路径。已有的机械可解释性方法仅揭示了压缩、捷径和叠加现象，但无法解释推理如何在潜在步骤间演化。
AI.method: 将潜在token序列建模为表示空间中的轨迹，应用动力系统分析（步间变化量、方向一致性、Lyapunov敏感性等定量指标，以及UMAP、DMD/PHATE等定性投影方法）来刻画推理的演化过程。
AI.result: 潜在CoT表现出结构化的非随机动力学，存在两种不同的稳定性类别：CODI表现为稳定吸引子，COCONUT表现为不稳定扩张系统；SIM-CoT监督能收紧这两种行为但不改变底层动力学。
AI.conclusion: 该框架推进了潜在CoT推理动力学的可解释性，并为改进潜在推理性能提供了可操作的见解。

title: RoboNav-Arm: Agentic AI-Driven Navigation and Obstacle Avoidance for Robotic Manipulator in Cluttered Environments
summary: Robotic manipulators operating in unstructured environments face significant challenges in safely executing goal-directed tasks due to dynamic and unforeseen obstacles, while traditional methods rely on prior knowledge or fixed perception pipelines, limiting adaptability. We propose a framework for safe task execution with effective obstacle avoidance. The environment module performs real-time obstacle detection, 3D localization, and ground surface geometry estimation. It then generates a structured semantic report that includes obstacle positions, object geometry and shape, and whether obstacles lie inside, outside, or within critical interaction zones. A central coordination module manages the overall system by handling tool invocation (e.g., memory and MoveIt collision scene updates), facilitating communication between modules, and continuously monitoring task progress until completion. Furthermore, a planning module selects an appropriate motion planning algorithm, such as RRTConnect, RRT*, or BiTRRT, based on the current environment configuration and goal requirements. The trajectory generated by the planner is further analyzed and refined to ensure safe and collision-free task execution. The proposed approach is evaluated in Gazebo Classic , demonstrating robustness in dynamic scenarios.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种面向非结构化环境的机械臂安全任务执行框架，通过实时障碍物检测与3D定位、语义报告生成、中央协调模块和自适应运动规划算法选择，实现了有效的避障与任务执行，并在Gazebo Classic中验证了其鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 传统方法依赖先验知识或固定感知管线，难以适应动态、不可预见的障碍物环境，缺乏灵活性与适应性。
AI.method: 环境模块进行实时障碍检测、3D定位及地面几何估计，生成结构化语义报告；中央协调模块管理工具调用、模块通信与任务进度监控；规划模块根据环境配置和目标需求自适应选择规划算法（如RRTConnect、RRT*、BiTRRT），并对轨迹进行分析和优化。
AI.result: 在Gazebo Classic仿真环境中进行评估，在动态场景下表现出鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过模块化设计与自适应规划策略，有效提升了机械臂在非结构化环境中的安全性与任务执行能力。

title: Cross-Subject Modeling for Widefield Calcium Imaging via Atlas-Aligned Spatiotemporal Tokenization
comment: Published at the 43rd International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML) 2026. Code available at: https://github.com/ShanechiLab/WiCAT
summary: Large-scale, multi-subject widefield calcium imaging provides unprecedented access to brain-wide cortical dynamics. However, the high dimensionality, complex spatiotemporal structure, and substantial task-irrelevant activity in widefield recordings have largely restricted modeling efforts to single-session analyses, limiting scalability and generalization. While multi-subject pretrained models have been explored for some neural modalities, multi-subject models for widefield calcium imaging have not yet been demonstrated; further, subject-invariant zero-shot behavior decoding remains elusive for multi-subject models across neural modalities more broadly. As a first step toward foundation modeling of widefield data, we introduce WiCAT, a multi-subject model that leverages self-supervised pretraining to both outperform single-session models and enable zero-shot behavior decoding on unseen subjects. WiCAT introduces an atlas-grounded tokenization scheme without session-specific components and learns globally shared spatiotemporal representations. Across multiple widefield datasets, the pretrained model supports lightweight downstream decoding, transfers across subjects, tasks, and datasets, and outperforms baseline models. Notably, the model also achieves robust zero-shot continuous behavior decoding and left-out brain region reconstruction on unseen subjects.

AI.tldr: WiCAT是一个多主体宽场钙成像基础模型，通过自监督预训练和基于图谱的标记化方案，实现了跨主体、跨任务、跨数据集的零样本行为解码和脑区重建，优于单会话模型。
AI.motivation: 宽场钙成像数据维度高、时空结构复杂且包含大量任务无关活动，现有模型大多局限于单会话分析，难以扩展和泛化。多主体预训练模型在其他神经模态中已有探索，但在宽场钙成像领域尚未实现，且跨主体的零样本行为解码仍是一个未被解决的挑战。
AI.method: WiCAT提出基于图谱的标记化方案（无会话特定组件），通过自监督预训练学习全局共享的时空表示，实现对未见主体的零样本行为解码和脑区重建。
AI.result: 在多个宽场数据集上，WiCAT的预训练模型支持轻量级下游解码，跨主体、任务和数据集迁移，优于基线模型。实现了对未见主体的鲁棒零样本连续行为解码和留出脑区重建。
AI.conclusion: WiCAT作为宽场数据基础建模的第一步，证明了多主体自监督预训练在宽场钙成像中的有效性，为跨主体泛化和零样本解码提供了新范式。

title: Position: Every Ground Truth is a Human Construction, not an Objective Truth
comment: 13 pages, 1 figure. To be published in Proceedings of the 43 rd International Conference on Machine Learning, Seoul, South Korea. PMLR 306, 2026
summary: Ground truth datasets play a fundamental role as reference values in the training and evaluation of machine learning models. This position paper argues that ground truths are not neutral objective measurements that are naturally given, but instead that they are constructed by arrangements of humans and technologies. We argue that the ML community will benefit from articulating and discussing these often invisible or unreported choices and acknowledging that reference data sets are contingent, not universal. Focusing on the situated and context-dependent nature of ground truths can improve reliability by enabling a better informed perspective on where, when, and how the datasets, and the models they have shaped, can best be used. We argue for increasing `situated reliability' which includes articulating the limits and strengths of models and their truth claims. Finally, paying more attention to the construction of ground truths can support transparency, accountability, and interdisciplinary work.

AI.tldr: 本文论证了机器学习中的“ground truth”数据集并非客观中立的测量结果，而是由人类和技术共同构建的，具有情境依赖性和偶然性。文章提出应提升“情境可靠性”（situated reliability），明确数据集的局限与优势，以促进透明度、问责制和跨学科合作。
AI.motivation: 机器学习社区普遍将ground truth视为天然存在的客观基准，忽视了其背后的人为选择和构建过程。这种“隐形化”可能导致模型在不适用场景中被误用，影响可靠性和公平性。
AI.method: 采用立场论文（position paper）的论证方式，通过批判性分析揭示ground truth的社会技术建构本质，并提出“情境可靠性”这一概念框架。
AI.result: 指出ground truth具有偶然性而非普遍性，其构建过程受制于特定情境和决策；提出通过明确数据集的使用边界来提升模型的可靠性与可解释性。
AI.conclusion: 关注ground truth的建构过程能提升机器学习系统的透明度、问责性，并促进跨学科协作，最终实现更负责任的人工智能实践。

title: YUKTI: From Natural-Language Situations to Robust, Verifiable Decisions An Uncertainty-Typed Proposition IR, Assumption-Robust Pareto Frontiers, and a Regret Certificate
summary: Language models turn a worded situation into a numeric plan, and the dominant pipelines (NL4Opt, OptiMUS, ORLM, OR-LLM-Agent) commit to a single objective and point-valued coefficients, then solve once. For decisions that allocate real budget, effort, or clinical attention, that confidence is the failure mode: every objectified number is an assumption, and a plan optimal only if the guesses are exactly right is fragile -- mimicry of computation. YUKTI changes the target of autoformulation. Its representation is a typed-proposition graph whose relationships carry shape priors, coefficient uncertainty, and provenance. YUKTI routes each stage to an exact, nonlinear, or evolutionary solver; couples stages by a distributional Pareto hand-off; and introduces Assumption-Robust Pareto Frontiers (ARPF), resampling assumptions (including structural epsilon-contamination) to score how often each action survives (rho). We prove a bound making rho an exact factor of decision regret, add auditable traceability, and synthesize a benchmark-faithful data foundation when none exists (SRJANA). We validate three ways: under controlled misspecification the robust compromise cuts mean and tail regret by over 90% versus a naive point plan; on a regulated commercial decision we optimize inside a lawful action space and price the downside in euros; and on a real public dataset of 41,188 decisions an out-of-sample backtest beats the logged status quo by 34% and a naive point rule by 4% while reducing the optimizer's curse. The solvers are standard; we claim no benchmark-SOTA win. A head-to-head shows an LLM given the correct numbers, and single-objective optimization, both incur about 47x the held-out regret of YUKTI -- an LLM is a formulator, not a solver. Under long-range causal coupling, the forward hand-off becomes unsound, locating where it must become a backward-induction causal policy.

AI.tldr: YUKTI提出了一种基于类型化命题图的鲁棒自动规划框架，通过分布帕累托传递、假设鲁棒帕累托前沿（ARPF）和重采样方法，显著降低了决策遗憾，在多个场景下优于传统点估计方法和LLM+单目标优化基线。
AI.motivation: 现有语言模型驱动的规划管线（如NL4Opt、OptiMUS等）将问题转化为单一目标和点值系数后求解一次，这种确定性假设对于真实资源分配决策是脆弱的——每个量化的数字都是一种假设，仅当猜测完全正确时方案才最优，本质是"模拟计算"而非真正的鲁棒决策。
AI.method: YUKTI将自动形式化的目标从生成数值计划转为构建类型化命题图（typed-proposition graph），图中关系携带形状先验、系数不确定性和来源追溯。每个阶段路由到精确/非线性/进化求解器，通过分布帕累托传递（distributional Pareto hand-off）耦合阶段；引入假设鲁棒帕累托前沿（ARPF），通过重采样假设（包括结构ε-污染）计算每个动作的生存频率ρ，并证明了ρ是决策遗憾的精确因子。
AI.result: 在受控误设定下，鲁棒折中方案相比朴素点计划将均值和尾部遗憾降低90%以上；在受监管商业决策中，在合法动作空间内优化并实现了下行风险定价；在包含41,188个决策的真实公共数据集上，样本外回测比日志状态提升34%，比朴素点规则提升4%，同时减少了优化器诅咒。与LLM+单目标优化的对比中，后者遗憾约为YUKTI的47倍。
AI.conclusion: YUKTI证明了将不确定性和鲁棒性显式编码到规划表示中的价值，指出LLM的角色是形式化（formulator）而非求解器（solver）。同时指出了当前方法在长程因果耦合下前向传递不再可靠，需要转向反向归纳因果策略。

title: Learning High-Level Decision Making with an Interaction-Aware Attention-Based Network in Autonomous Driving
comment: 6 pages, 5 figures, 3 tables, submitted to 2026 IEEE Intelligent Transportation Systems Conference (ITSC)
summary: Reliable learning-based high-level decision making for lane changes and speed control in automated driving must accommodate dynamically sized inputs due to varying scene traffic flow. DeepSet and its variants represent the state of the art among shared-encoder approaches; however, they neglect explicit traffic interaction modeling, limiting performance in negotiation-intensive scenarios such as intersections. Attention-based methods capture interactions among static and dynamic agents, but incur quadratic memory and computational complexity and provide limited control over representation granularity. Inspired by Perceiver IO, an attention-based architecture, DecisionPerceiver, is proposed to project dynamic agent features into a fixed-size latent space, where feature granularity is regulated by the number of latent queries, improving scalability for larger networks. A finer discretization of the action set is further proposed to increase the performance gain due to interaction awareness. Extensive evaluations across three driving scenarios that require different levels of interaction awareness demonstrate consistent performance gains and generalization across various navigation objectives. In addition, the proposed architecture is assessed in scenarios with an increasing number of vehicles to demonstrate scalability.

AI.tldr: 本文提出DecisionPerceiver架构，通过将动态交通参与者特征投影到固定大小的潜在空间，并利用注意力机制建模交互，解决了自动驾驶中变尺寸输入和交互建模的挑战，在多种驾驶场景中展现出性能提升和可扩展性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法（如DeepSet）忽略显式交通交互建模，在需要谈判的场景（如交叉路口）中性能受限；而注意力方法虽能捕获交互但计算复杂度为二次方且表示粒度控制有限。
AI.method: 受Perceiver IO启发，提出DecisionPerceiver架构，将动态智能体特征投影到固定大小的潜在空间，通过潜在查询数量调节特征粒度；同时提出更细的动作集离散化以增强交互感知带来的性能增益。
AI.result: 在三种需不同交互感知程度的驾驶场景中，该方法均取得一致的性能提升和泛化能力；在车辆数量递增的场景中验证了架构的可扩展性。
AI.conclusion: DecisionPerceiver通过固定大小潜在空间和注意力机制，兼顾了交互建模能力与计算可扩展性，是自动驾驶高层决策的有效方案。

title: RSLoRA: Training-free Rank Allocation for LoRA via Representational Sensitivity Probing
summary: Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) has become a cornerstone of parameter-efficient fine-tuning (PEFT); however, the conventional practice of uniform rank assignment ignores the functional heterogeneity of neural layers. Existing rank allocation methods typically struggle with a trade-off between computational intensity and heuristic simplicity: training-based methods suffer from prohibitive overhead, while pre-allocation methods fail to capture the dynamic task-specific representation manifold. In this paper, we propose RSLoRA (Representational Sensitivity LoRA), a training-free and gradient-free rank allocator driven by activation-space geometry. We identify a "sensitivity regime shift" across layers, observing that static weight analysis and local gradients are insufficient to reflect how updates reshape a model's internal representations. To address this, RSLoRA introduces a virtual representational probing mechanism. By simulating adaptation through structured low-rank noise and measuring the resulting manifold displacement by using Effective Rank and Frechet Distance, we identify high-sensitivity modules that require higher rank capacity. Our framework effectively bridges the gap between expert-crafted heuristics and actual representational impact. Extensive evaluations demonstrate that RSLoRA consistently outperforms state-of-the-art allocators (e.g., AdaLoRA, GoRA) across mainstream benchmarks. By eliminating the need for iterative training-time adjustments and backward gradients, RSLoRA provides a highly efficient, robust, and representation-aware solution for large-scale model adaptation.

AI.tldr: RSLoRA是一种无需训练和梯度的新型秩分配方法，通过激活空间几何分析层敏感性，在参数量更少的情况下超越AdaLoRA等现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有LoRA方法对所有层使用统一秩，忽视了神经层的功能异质性；而已有的秩分配方法要么计算开销大（训练型），要么无法捕捉任务特定的表示流形（预分配型），存在效率与效果之间的权衡。
AI.method: 提出虚拟表示探测机制：通过结构化低秩噪声模拟微调，利用有效秩（Effective Rank）和弗雷歇距离（Frechet Distance）测量流形位移，从而识别需要高秩的高敏感度模块。
AI.result: 在多个主流基准测试中一致优于AdaLoRA、GoRA等现有最先进秩分配方法。
AI.conclusion: RSLoRA无需迭代训练调整和后向梯度计算，是一种高效、鲁棒且具备表示感知能力的大规模模型适配解决方案。

title: AuditWeave: A Tamper-Evident, Auditor-Navigable Evidence Layer for AI-Assisted and Data-Transformation Workflows
comment: 8 pages, 3 figures, open-source implementation at pypi.org/project/auditweave
summary: AI systems are increasingly used to assist consequential decisions in regulated domains such as auditing, finance, and healthcare. This creates a recurring obligation: an organization must be able to reconstruct, after the fact, which evidence informed a given conclusion, and to show that the record of that reasoning was not altered. Existing tools address related but distinct problems - model observability, drift monitoring, governance reporting - and are built for the machine-learning engineer operating a system, not the reviewer who must trace one specific conclusion back to its supporting evidence. We present AuditWeave, a lightweight Python library, with no runtime dependencies, that records the steps of AI-assisted and data-transformation workflows into a single append-only, hash-chained ledger. A small, system-agnostic event vocabulary spans both retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) pipelines and tabular/lakehouse transformations, so a conclusion that draws on both can be traced end-to-end through one record. Within a sealed ledger, any modification, reordering, insertion, or deletion of events is detectable through chain verification. We describe the design and evaluate recording overhead, scalability, and tamper-detection correctness on the reference implementation. The integrity guarantees cost tens of microseconds per event, and, as the hash-chain construction implies, verification flagged every injected mutation across four mutation classes over 2,000 randomized trials.

AI.tldr: AuditWeave是一个轻量级Python库，通过追加式哈希链账本记录AI辅助决策流程，支持端到端可追溯和防篡改验证。
AI.motivation: 现有工具面向机器学习工程师而非审查者，无法满足事后追溯特定结论及其证据来源的合规需求，且缺乏对RAG流水线和表格/湖仓转换的统一记录。
AI.method: 设计了一个无运行时依赖的Python库AuditWeave，采用追加式哈希链账本记录事件，定义跨RAG和表格变换的统一事件词汇表，通过链式哈希验证检测篡改。
AI.result: 每个事件的开销为数十微秒；在2000次随机试验中，验证能检测所有四种篡改类型（修改、重排、插入、删除）的注入突变。
AI.conclusion: AuditWeave以极低的性能开销实现了对AI辅助决策流程的完整性保证和可追溯性，适合审计等受监管领域。

title: GES-TSP: Graph Edge Sparsification for TSP
summary: Solving large-scale instances of the Traveling Salesman Problem (TSP) exactly is computationally expensive. Researchers often employ graph sparsification methods to improve computational efficiency. Traditional sparsification methods typically rely on fixed heuristics and fail to fully exploit instance-specific structural information. In this paper, we propose Graph Edge Sparsification (GES), a learning-based sparsification approach for Euclidean TSP. By incorporating geometric structural information and combinatorial optimization technology, our proposed method adaptively generates a sparsification graph for different instances, significantly reducing the graph size and accelerating the solving process. Experimental results demonstrate that our sparsification method can prune up to 95% of edges on the MATILDA dataset, while keeping the solution gap within 1% of the optimal value. Moreover, our approach exhibits strong generalization capability on the TSPLIB benchmark.In some large-scale instances, the pruning rate exceeds 99%, while the optimality gap remains below 1%.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于学习的图边稀疏化方法（GES），用于欧几里得TSP问题，可在保持最优解误差在1%以内的前提下，剪枝高达95%-99%的边，显著加速求解过程。
AI.motivation: 精确求解大规模TSP问题计算代价高昂，传统稀疏化方法依赖固定启发式规则，未能充分利用实例特定的结构信息。
AI.method: 提出GES（Graph Edge Sparsification），一种基于学习的稀疏化方法，结合几何结构信息与组合优化技术，为不同实例自适应生成稀疏化图。
AI.result: 在MATILDA数据集上可剪枝高达95%的边，解误差在最优值的1%以内；在TSPLIB基准上剪枝率超99%，最优性差距仍低于1%。
AI.conclusion: 所提GES方法能有效剪枝大规模TSP实例的边，提升求解效率，同时保持高精度解，并具备良好的泛化能力。

title: Saturation-Aware Robust Trajectory Optimization for Reusable Launch Vehicles via Differentiable Physics
summary: The high-angle-of-attack flip maneuver of reusable launch vehicles presents significant challenges for robust trajectory optimization due to the combined effects of highly nonlinear dynamics, aerodynamic uncertainties, and actuator saturation. This paper presents a differentiable physics framework for saturation-aware robust trajectory optimization. At its core, a Differentiable Particle Tube Control (DPTC) scheme is developed to optimize uncertainty evolution through an ensemble-based distribution shaping strategy. State uncertainty is represented by a Lagrangian particle ensemble, while hard actuator projection operators are embedded directly into the computational graph, enabling the joint optimization of the nominal feedforward trajectory and a time-varying feedback policy via end-to-end backpropagation. The proposed framework is evaluated against an automatic differentiation-based Successive Convexification (AD-SCvx) baseline combined with a conventional covariance steering feedback strategy. Six-degree-of-freedom Monte Carlo simulations demonstrate that, although the baseline achieves nominal fuel-optimal solutions, its unconstrained feedback formulation becomes susceptible to actuator saturation under aerodynamic disturbances, leading to degraded closed-loop robustness. In contrast, the proposed DPTC framework proactively performs a constraint-aware performance trade-off by relaxing spatial tracking to preserve critical control authority. These results demonstrate that integrating differentiable physics with ensemble-based optimization provides an effective and practical framework for robust guidance in highly constrained aerospace flight systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于可微物理的粒子管控制（DPTC）框架，用于解决可重复使用运载火箭在大迎角翻转机动中的鲁棒轨迹优化问题，通过硬执行器饱和约束嵌入和集成分布整形策略，实现了对标称前馈轨迹和时变反馈策略的联合优化。六自由度蒙特卡洛仿真表明，与传统方法相比，DPTC能够在执行器饱和风险下主动进行约束感知的性能权衡，提升闭环鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 可重复使用运载火箭的高迎角翻转机动受强非线性动力学、气动不确定性和执行器饱和的共同影响，现有鲁棒轨迹优化方法难以兼顾燃料最优性与控制约束下的闭环鲁棒性。
AI.method: 提出可微粒子管控制（DPTC）框架：1）用拉格朗日粒子集成表示状态不确定性；2）将硬执行器投影算子嵌入计算图，实现端到端反向传播；3）联合优化标称轨迹与时变反馈策略；4）通过集成分布整形策略优化不确定性演化。
AI.result: 六自由度蒙特卡洛仿真表明，基线方法（AD-SCvx结合协方差转向）虽能获得名义燃料最优解，但在气动扰动下易因执行器饱和导致鲁棒性下降；DPTC通过主动松弛空间跟踪以保留关键控制权限，实现了约束感知的性能权衡。
AI.conclusion: 将可微物理与集成优化相结合，为高约束航空航天飞行系统提供了一种有效且实用的鲁棒制导框架。

title: ReflectWorld-MM: An Entity-Oriented Multi-Media Memory System for Open-Ended Video Streams
summary: Building assistants that can continually watch the world, remember what they see, and reason over their accumulated experience is a long-standing goal, and recently multimodal agents equipped with long-term memory over video streams have attracted increasing interest. Unfortunately, existing systems either keep their memory inside the model context or in a flat feature store, and organize it around frames rather than around the persistent entities a stream is really about, which confines them to bounded videos and weakens their ability to track who and what reappears over time. In this paper, we propose ReflectWorld-MM, an entity-oriented multi-media memory system for open-ended video streams. It consists of three parts. The first is a perception front-end that turns a streaming video into entity-resolved observations under a bounded short-term memory. The second is a hierarchical long-term memory, grounded in human memory theory, that couples a multi-scale episodic memory, an evolving entity-centric semantic memory, and a procedural memory. The third is a complete realization, built for real-world operation, that ingests arbitrary streams and plugs into off-the-shelf assistants. Across six long-video and lifelong-memory benchmarks, ReflectWorld-MM achieves the best accuracy on all six, outperforming strong memory agents and a frontier model.

AI.tldr: ReflectWorld-MM 是一个面向开放视频流的实体导向多模态记忆系统，通过层次化记忆架构（情节、语义、程序记忆）实现持续感知与推理，在六个长视频基准测试中均取得最优性能。
AI.motivation: 现有系统将记忆局限在模型上下文或扁平特征存储中，以帧而非持久实体组织记忆，无法有效追踪随时间重现的实体，限制了在开放视频流上的持续学习与推理能力。
AI.method: 提出三部分架构：(1) 感知前端，将流视频转化为实体解析的观察并存储于短期记忆；(2) 层次化长期记忆，包括多尺度情节记忆、实体中心语义记忆和程序记忆；(3) 完整实现，可接入任意流视频和现成助手。
AI.result: 在六个长视频和终身记忆基准测试中全部取得最优准确率，超越强记忆智能体及前沿模型。
AI.conclusion: 实体导向的层次化记忆组织方式能有效提升开放视频流中持续感知与跨时间推理的能力。

title: Ablation, Statistical Inference, and Validation for KV-Cache Compression
comment: 15 pages, 8 figures, minimum number of citations
summary: This study systematically compares Turbo-Quant and SpectralQuant KV-cache compression, evaluating non-dominated schemes, including WHT rotation with Beta Lloyd-Max and QJL, through a statistical validation methodology that separates systematic codec differences from implementation variance. Key findings reveal that while eigenbasis-based methods fail on heavy-tailed data due to covariance instability, they excel in structured regimes, with the effective semantic dimension ($d_{eff}$) adapting to calibration budgets rather than true data rank. (this is an abstract of the abstract thank you )

AI.tldr: 系统比较了Turbo-Quant和SpectralQuant两种KV缓存压缩方法，通过统计验证方法分离系统性编解码差异与实现方差，发现基于特征基的方法在重尾数据上因协方差不稳定而失效，但在结构化数据中表现优异，且有效语义维度会随校准预算调整而非反映真实数据秩。
AI.motivation: 现有KV缓存压缩方法缺乏系统性对比，需要一种统计验证框架来区分方法本身的优劣与实现差异造成的影响。
AI.method: 采用统计验证方法论，比较Turbo-Quant和SpectralQuant两种方法，评估包括WHT旋转+贝塔Lloyd-Max和QJL在内的非支配方案，分离系统性编解码差异与实现方差。
AI.result: 基于特征基的方法在重尾数据上因协方差不稳定而失败；在结构化数据中表现优异；有效语义维度随校准预算调整变化，而非反映真实数据秩。
AI.conclusion: 不同KV缓存压缩方法各有适用场景，选择时需考虑数据特性；有效语义维度是一个依赖校准预算的动态指标而非固定值。

title: The Verifier is the Curriculum: Execution-Gated Self-Distillation for Cross-Family Game Generation
summary: Post-training a code generator against a learned judge can optimize proxy features that raise the score without improving the artifact. We study the opposite signal: a deterministic, judge-free, ungameable filter -- whether a generated project launches cleanly under a headless engine (strict-launch). Under this gate, rejection-sampling self-distillation compounds out-of-family generalization. On GameCraft-Bench (mapping a natural-language brief to a complete Godot project), a 14B model (Qwen3-14B+LoRA) distilled under strict-launch raises clean generation on four unseen game families from 8.8% to 42.2% per-candidate and best-of-K coverage from 18/25 to 25/25 (the gold ceiling) over three rounds, each a significant gain (p=0.0019, p<1e-4, p<1e-4). The gain is not from merely adding data: an exactly-matched gold-duplication control regresses below the base model (5.6% vs. 8.8%, p=0.019), while a count-matched decomposition splits the round-1-to-2 jump into comparable quality (+8.8pp) and quantity (+8.5pp) channels. Most directly, rerunning the loop with only the filter swapped -- the lenient BUILD check, which passes 99.9% of generations, in place of the launch gate -- erases the gain entirely (back to base, p=1e-3 vs. the launch-gated round), isolating verifier precision rather than the optimizer. A second ungameable signal, headless execution grounding, rises monotonically across rounds and yields far more grounded candidates than gold-duplication at a matched budget (16 vs. 5), confirming the gains are functional, not launch-but-empty. Game generation is a verifiable testbed for one lesson: the verifier is the curriculum -- what it certifies is what the model learns.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于确定性、不可欺骗的“严格启动”过滤器的拒绝采样自蒸馏方法，用于代码生成后训练。在GameCraft-Bench基准上，使用14B模型进行三轮蒸馏后，干净生成率从8.8%提升至42.2%，最佳K覆盖率达到25/25（满额），验证了验证器精度而非优化器是决定学习效果的关键。
AI.motivation: 针对当前使用学习型评判器进行后训练时，模型容易优化代理特征（提高分数但实际质量未提升）的问题，探索使用确定性、无评判器、不可博弈的过滤器作为监督信号。
AI.method: 采用“严格启动”过滤（严格启动）作为拒绝采样自蒸馏的门控信号，在Godot引擎项目生成任务中，对Qwen3-14B模型进行多轮自蒸馏。通过对比实验（黄金重复控制、分解分析、BUILD检查替换）验证方法有效性。
AI.result: 在四个未见游戏家族上，干净生成率从8.8%提升至42.2%，最佳K覆盖率从18/25提升至25/25（满额）。所有改进均具有统计显著性（p<0.005）。对比实验表明，仅替换过滤器为宽松的BUILD检查则收益完全消失。
AI.conclusion: 游戏生成是一个可验证的试验场，核心结论是：验证器即课程——验证器认证的内容决定了模型学习的内容。

title: SWIFT: A Small-World Interaction Framework for Flow-Aware Trajectory Prediction in Autonomous Driving
comment: Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Pattern Analysis and Machine Intelligence
summary: Accurate trajectory prediction in autonomous driving hinges on modeling dynamic and context-dependent interactions among traffic agents. However, most existing approaches are purely data-driven and lack structural priors, which limits their generalization under distribution shifts. In this work, interaction modeling is revisited through the structure and dynamics of traffic networks, and SWIFT (Small-World Interaction Framework for Trajectory prediction) is proposed as a unified framework that integrates small-world networks with traffic flow theory. SWIFT introduces structural inductive biases via a Small-World Interaction Network that captures both local and global dependencies, and a Flow Regime Encoder that adapts the interaction structure to scene-level traffic states. Interaction reasoning is further enhanced through a multi-relational graph module that explicitly encodes direct and higher-order agent relationships. Extensive experiments on three real-world datasets, nuScenes, MoCAD, and NGSIM, show that SWIFT consistently outperforms strong baselines in prediction accuracy across diverse traffic regimes. Beyond accuracy, SWIFT exhibits improved generalization to unseen locations and regimes, robustness under noisy observations, and strong performance with limited training data, supporting the effectiveness of its structure-aware design.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SWIFT框架，将小世界网络与交通流理论相结合，用于自动驾驶中的轨迹预测，在多个数据集上表现优异，并展现出良好的泛化能力和鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有轨迹预测方法多为纯数据驱动，缺乏结构先验，导致在分布偏移下泛化能力有限。作者希望通过引入交通网络的结构与动力学特性来提升预测性能。
AI.method: 提出SWIFT框架，包含三个核心组件：小世界交互网络（捕捉局部和全局依赖）、流态编码器（根据场景交通状态自适应调整交互结构）、以及多关系图模块（显式编码直接与高阶代理关系）。
AI.result: 在nuScenes、MoCAD和NGSIM三个真实世界数据集上，SWIFT在预测精度上持续优于强基线模型，并展现出更好的跨位置泛化能力、对噪声观测的鲁棒性以及小样本下的强性能。
AI.conclusion: 结构感知的交互建模设计能有效提升轨迹预测的准确性和泛化能力，验证了将交通网络结构与流量理论融入预测模型的有效性。

title: Knowledge-Constrained Shape Optimization with a Mixture-of-Experts Neural Operator for High-Confidence Design
summary: Engineering shape optimization faces challenges in both expert-dependent problem setup and surrogate-model reliability. In practical aerodynamic design, optimization settings such as editable regions, deformation ranges, and design-preservation constraints are typically specified manually by experienced engineers, while surrogate-based optimization may become unreliable for heterogeneous geometry databases and out-of-distribution designs. To address these challenges, we propose a knowledge-constrained shape-optimization framework that translates knowledge-based constraints and user intent into quantifiable parameters of DFFD-based deformation operators, enabling engineering-aware and controllable constrained optimization. We further develop a Mixture-of-Experts Neural Operator (MoE-NO) to improve drag prediction and trend consistency over heterogeneous aerodynamic datasets. Based on the MoE-NO encoder and Mahalanobis distance, an uncertainty-estimation strategy is introduced to detect out-of-distribution geometries and selectively trigger physics-solver feedback for local sample enrichment. Experiments on in-house MPV, SUV, and Sedan datasets show that MoE-NO achieves a test-set MAPE of $1.16\%$ and a trend-prediction accuracy of $94.34\%$, outperforming the best baseline results of $1.52\%$ and $90.34\%$, respectively. Vehicle shape-optimization experiments further yield CFD-validated drag coefficient reductions of approximately $4\%$ to $10\%$.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种知识约束的形状优化框架，结合MoE-NO代理模型和不确定性估计策略，在异构气动数据集上实现了高精度预测，并在车辆形状优化中取得了4%-10%的阻力系数降低。
AI.motivation: 工程形状优化面临专家依赖性强（手动设置优化参数）和代理模型可靠性不足（对异构几何数据库和分布外设计预测不可靠）两大挑战。
AI.method: 提出知识约束形状优化框架，将知识约束和用户意图转化为DFFD变形算子的可量化参数；开发MoE-NO（混合专家神经算子）提升异构气动数据集的阻力预测和趋势一致性；基于MoE-NO编码器和马氏距离的不确定性估计策略检测分布外几何，选择性触发物理求解器反馈进行局部样本丰富。
AI.result: 在MPV、SUV、Sedan数据集上，MoE-NO测试集MAPE为1.16%，趋势预测准确率94.34%，优于基线最优结果（1.52%和90.34%）；车辆形状优化实验获得CFD验证的阻力系数降低约4%-10%。
AI.conclusion: 所提框架有效解决了形状优化中专家依赖和代理模型不可靠的问题，在异构数据集上展现出优异的预测精度和优化效果。

title: SciML in the Wild: A Diagnostic Study of When Structural Priors Help and When They Hurt
summary: Scientific Machine Learning (SciML) methods such as Neural Ordinary Differential Equations (NODEs), Physics-Informed Neural Networks (PINNs), and Universal Differential Equations (UDEs) are most effective when structural priors reflect reliable governing dynamics. We ask what happens when this assumption is violated. Using macroeconomic forecasting as a stress-test domain, we evaluate five model families, ARIMA, LSTM, NODE, PINN, and UDE, across 23 countries using sparse annual data, multiple temporal splits, and five random seeds. Our results show that none of the evaluated models achieve consistently strong forecasting performance, highlighting the difficulty of low-frequency macroeconomic prediction. However, a clear relative hierarchy emerges: less-constrained models, particularly ARIMA and NODE, consistently outperform more-constrained heuristic-prior models such as PINN and UDE. Rather than treating this as a rejection of SciML, we interpret it as a diagnostic result: structural priors can act as misregularizers when they do not match the data-generating process. We identify failure modes including prior misalignment, regime shifts, structural breaks, and optimization instability, and argue that SciML practitioners should test whether structure helps before assuming that more structure is beneficial.

AI.tldr: 本文在宏观经济预测这一低频率、高噪声的场景下，系统评估了五种模型（ARIMA、LSTM、NODE、PINN、UDE），发现没有模型能持续取得强预测性能。但相对排序清晰：约束较少的模型（ARIMA、NODE）优于带有启发式先验的模型（PINN、UDE），表明结构性先验在数据生成过程不匹配时反而会成为不良正则化项。
AI.motivation: 现有SciML方法通常假设结构先验能反映可靠的支配性动力学，但这一假设在现实中常被违背。作者旨在探究当结构先验不匹配时，SciML方法的性能如何，并以宏观经济预测作为压力测试领域。
AI.method: 在23个国家的稀疏年度数据上，使用多个时间划分和5个随机种子，系统评估ARIMA、LSTM、NODE、PINN和UDE五种模型家族的宏观预测性能。
AI.result: 所有模型均未达成持续强预测性能；约束更少的模型（ARIMA、NODE）一致优于强约束先验模型（PINN、UDE）。
AI.conclusion: 结构先验在数据生成过程不匹配时充当"不良正则化器"；SciML从业者在假设"更多结构更有益"之前应先检验结构是否确实有帮助。

title: Closed-Loop Control with Rule-Aligned Small Language Models and Multi-Agent Self-Correction
summary: A key step toward autonomous industrial operation is the ability to create and reconfigure control policies from natural-language requirement specifications, with minimal or no manual redesign. In this setting, policy generation by AI agents can be a credible path when paired with a plant-aware validator (e.g., a digital twin) that can check generated candidate actions before execution. However, practical deployment is constrained by inference latency and compute footprint: large cloud-based models are often too slow, opaque, or data-sensitive for edge closed-loop use. This work investigates whether a compact Small Language Model (SLM) can be retrained for control reasoning and embedded in a validator-guided correction loop. We use a Qwen2.5-1.5B model aligned via Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO), combined with (i) an action agent, (ii) a symbolic/digital-twin-style validation layer, and (iii) a reprompting agent that iteratively steers outputs toward valid actions. In randomized thermal-control simulations (30 experiments with 500 steps each), the framework achieves 91.5% average action-alignment accuracy (86.3%--100% across cases) at 3.84\,s mean inference latency. Under symbolic re-mapping, it maintains a 95% in-range rate, indicating robust physical regulation despite reduced token-level agreement. These results support SLM+validator architectures as a practical path toward reconfigurable autonomous control at the edge.

AI.tldr: 本文研究将小型语言模型（SLM）嵌入验证器引导的修正循环中，用于工业场景的自主控制策略生成。采用Qwen2.5-1.5B模型结合GRPO对齐、动作智能体、数字孪生验证层和重提示智能体，在热控制仿真中达到91.5%的动作对齐准确率和3.84秒的平均推理延迟，证明了SLM+验证器架构在边缘端可重构自主控制中的实用潜力。
AI.motivation: 实现工业自主运行的关键是从自然语言需求规格中创建和重构控制策略，且需最小化手动重新设计。当前基于大语言模型的方法存在推理延迟高、不透明、数据敏感等问题，不适合边缘闭环控制场景。因此需要探索更轻量、高效且具备验证能力的替代方案。
AI.method: 采用Qwen2.5-1.5B小型语言模型，通过Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO)进行对齐训练，构建包含三个组件的框架：(i)动作智能体生成候选动作，(ii)符号化/数字孪生验证层检查动作合法性，(iii)重提示智能体迭代修正输出直到生成有效动作。
AI.result: 在30次随机热控制仿真实验（每次500步）中，框架达到91.5%的平均动作对齐准确率（范围86.3%-100%），平均推理延迟3.84秒。在符号重映射下，保持95%的范围合规率，表明尽管token级一致性降低，但物理调节性能依然稳健。
AI.conclusion: SLM+验证器架构是实现边缘端可重构自主控制的实用路径，能够在保持低延迟和小计算足迹的同时，通过验证循环确保控制动作的有效性，为工业自主运行提供了可行方案。

title: LLM-Centric Agentic AI for UAV Swarms: Architecture, Enabling Technologies, and Open Problems
summary: Uncrewed Aerial Vehicle (UAV) swarms have significant potential for applications such as Search and Rescue (SAR) and environmental monitoring, but their real-world deployment is limited by a lack of situational awareness, intermittent connectivity, and significant cybersecurity risks. Agentic Artificial Intelligence (AI) represents a shift from standalone Large Language Model (LLM) toward closed-loop cognitive architectures that integrate perception, memory, reasoning/planning, and action to enable adaptive, goal-directed swarm behavior. Within this framework, Agentic AI provides a unifying structure for autonomous and adaptive swarm operations while expanding the system attack surface compared to conventional AI systems. This paper proposes LLM-Centric Agentic AI for UAV Swarms (LAUS) and reviews key enabling technologies such as onboard and edge computing, 5G/6G connectivity, multimodal intelligence, and cybersecurity mechanisms, and analyzes threats such as Priority Manipulation Attacks (PMA) that can distort decision-making and degrade network performance. Finally, it identifies open research challenges, including hallucination-resistant reasoning, onboard LLM deployment under SWaP constraints, and standardized security benchmarks for perception-reasoning attacks in agentic UAV systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出LAUS框架，将基于大语言模型的智能体AI应用于无人机蜂群，实现自主、自适应操作，同时分析了安全威胁与挑战。
AI.motivation: 无人机蜂群在实际部署中面临态势感知不足、连接不稳定和网络安全风险等问题，现有方案缺乏统一的智能体架构来整合感知、记忆、推理和行动。
AI.method: 提出LLM-Centric Agentic AI for UAV Swarms (LAUS)框架，综述了机载/边缘计算、5G/6G连接、多模态智能和网络安全等关键技术，并分析了优先级操纵攻击等威胁。
AI.result: 识别出抗幻觉推理、SWaP约束下的机载LLM部署、感知-推理攻击的标准化安全基准等开放研究挑战。
AI.conclusion: Agentic AI为无人机蜂群自主操作提供了统一架构，但需解决安全、计算资源约束和标准化评估等问题。

title: Low-Power License Plate Detection and Recognition on a RISC-V Multi-Core MCU-Based Vision System
comment: 5 pages, 2 figures, 5 tables. This paper has been accepted for publication in the IEEE International Symposium on Circuits and Systems (ISCAS). Copyright 2021 IEEE
summary: In this paper, we present the first (to the best of our knowledge) demonstration of a low-power MCU-based edge device for Automatic License Plate Recognition (ALPR). The design leverages on a 9-core RISC-V processor, GAP8, coupled with a QVGA ultra-low-power greyscale imager. The proposed visual processing pipeline uses a multi-model inference approach based on SSDlite-MobilenetV2 for license plate detection and LPRNet for optical character recognition, reaching a 38.9% mAP score for the first task and a recognition rate of >99.13% for the latter on public datasets. On real-world data, the pipeline recognizes registration numbers when the size of LP crops is as small as 30x5 pixels. Thanks to the applied compression and optimization strategies, the multi-model inference (687 MMAC) achieves a throughput of 1.09 FPS at a power cost of 117 mW when running on GAP8. Our solution is the first MCU-class device embedding such a level of network complexity, resulting to be 73x more energy-efficient w.r.t. precedent mobile-class ALPR system featuring a Raspberry Pi3. The proposed design does not resort to any hardwired acceleration engines, thus retaining full flexibility for future algorithmic improvements.

AI.tldr: 本文首次在低功耗MCU边缘设备上实现自动车牌识别(ALPR)，基于9核RISC-V处理器GAP8和超低功耗灰度图像传感器，采用SSDlite-MobilenetV2检测+LPRNet识别的多模型推理流水线，在117mW功耗下达到1.09 FPS，能效比树莓派3高73倍。
AI.motivation: 现有ALPR系统多依赖高性能计算平台（如树莓派），功耗高；而MCU级设备计算能力有限，难以运行复杂神经网络。本文旨在探索在超低功耗MCU边缘设备上实现复杂ALPR任务的可行性。
AI.method: 采用9核RISC-V处理器GAP8搭配QVGA灰度图像传感器；构建多模型推理流水线：SSDlite-MobilenetV2用于车牌检测，LPRNet用于光学字符识别；应用压缩和优化策略降低计算量（687 MMAC）。
AI.result: 车牌检测mAP达38.9%，字符识别率>99.13%；可识别小至30x5像素的车牌；在GAP8上达到1.09 FPS吞吐量，功耗仅117mW；能效比树莓派3系统高73倍。
AI.conclusion: 这是首个在MCU级设备上实现如此复杂网络推理的方案，且未使用专用硬件加速引擎，保持了对未来算法改进的完全灵活性，证明了超低功耗边缘设备运行复杂视觉任务的潜力。

title: MawForge: Memory-Bounded Expert Materialization for Local Mixture-of-Experts Inference
summary: Sparse Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) language models separate total parameter count from per-token active computation, but local inference systems often still require the full model, key-value cache, runtime buffers, and operatingsystem headroom to fit in fast memory. MawForge tests a different systems hypothesis: local MoE serving can be made practical on constrained unified-memory machines by storing the full model on disk, keeping common tensors resident, and materializing routed expert tensors into a bounded execution cache on demand. The central finding is that MawForge is effective as a bounded execution mechanism and measurement substrate for local MoE inference, but not as a cache-maximization policy. Performance depends on balancing expert reuse against resident footprint, KV-cache size, quantization, route locality, and macOS memory pressure.

AI.tldr: MawForge提出在统一内存设备上通过磁盘存储完整模型、常驻公共张量、按需加载路由专家张量到有限执行缓存的方式，实现本地MoE推理的实用化。
AI.motivation: 现有MoE模型在本地推理时仍需要完整模型及运行时组件全部装入快速内存，对资源受限的统一内存设备不友好，亟需探索更高效的本地MoE服务方案。
AI.method: 将完整模型存储在磁盘上，公共张量常驻内存，路由专家张量按需按量加载到有界的执行缓存中，平衡专家复用率、驻留内存、KV缓存、量化、路由局部性和macOS内存压力等因素。
AI.result: MawForge作为有界执行机制和测量基座是有效的，但作为缓存最大化策略效果不佳；性能关键在于多因素间的平衡。
AI.conclusion: 本地MoE推理在统一内存机器上可行，但需精心设计执行缓存策略，而非单纯追求缓存最大化。

title: Feedback-Coupled Memory Systems in Continuous Time
comment: 19 pages, 4 figures. Extends arXiv:2603.11560 to continuous time. Code: github.com/stevefatz95/fcms-continuous
summary: The Feedback-Coupled Memory Systems (FCMS) architecture formalizes closed-loop coordination through four abstract operators, two of which - the agent update operator $f_i$ and the environmental update operator $Ψ$ - are left axiomatically undefined in the original framework. To address this, $f_i$ is defined by Mechanism-Based Intelligence (MBI), where agents update locally through a decentralized price mechanism and economic principles, and $Ψ$ is defined by the Coupled Memory Graph Process (CMGP), a non-Markovian framework where the environment is treated as a physical substrate that records and responds to trajectory history coherently without external forcing. The resulting continuous-time FCMS instantiation achieves Lyapunov global dissipativity governed by the computable threshold $4β^2 < 2ημγ^2$. This generalizes both the discrete FCMS stability condition $4ηβ^2 < γ$ and CMGP's physical bifurcation threshold $α_c = 1/K$, confirming that memory dissipation must outpace feedback gain as a universal organizing principle. Numerical simulation with $N=2$ agents and mean-field validation at $N=10^6$ confirm the stability threshold and the self-reinforcing coordination cascade that emerges when it is violated.

AI.tldr: 本文形式化定义了FCMS架构中两个未定义的算子$f_i$和$Ψ$，分别通过MBI和CMGP实现，推导出连续时间FCMS的Lyapunov全局耗散性条件$4β^2 < 2ημγ^2$，并通过数值仿真验证了稳定性阈值与自强化协调级联现象。
AI.motivation: FCMS框架中两个核心算子$f_i$和$Ψ$缺乏具体定义，需要赋予其实际意义以完善闭环协调架构的形式化基础。
AI.method: 将$f_i$定义为基于MBI的去中心化价格机制更新，将$Ψ$定义为非马尔可夫CMGP物理基质演化过程，通过Lyapunov理论推导全局耗散性条件。
AI.result: 推导出连续时间FCMS的全局稳定性阈值$4β^2 < 2ημγ^2$，该条件统一了离散FCMS条件$4ηβ^2 < γ$与CMGP的物理分岔阈值$α_c = 1/K$。$N=2$与$N=10^6$的仿真均验证了该阈值及违反时出现的协调级联现象。
AI.conclusion: 记忆耗散必须超过反馈增益是普适的组织原理，该架构弥合了离散与连续模型之间的理论分歧。

title: OmniSCS: Omni Safety-Critical Scenario Synthesis for Autonomous Driving via a Fully Editable Driving World
summary: The synthesis of safety-critical scenarios (SCS) and their evaluation through closed-loop simulations are crucial for developing robust autonomous driving systems. A key aspect of this process involves editing agent states in both appearance and trajectory levels within existing scenes. However, current methods struggle to preserve data fidelity after scene editing and fail to efficiently generate high-quality SCS through such modifications. To overcome these limitations, we propose OmniSCS, an innovative system that generates photorealistic SCS with high physical fidelity while enabling closed-loop testing in synthetic environments. OmniSCS comprises two key modules: 1) A Fully Editable Driving World Construction module that maintains high-fidelity agent appearance and background during scene editing via dual-strategy agent reconstruction and depth-refinement background reconstruction methods. 2) A SCS Synthesis module that facilitates object insertion and agent trajectory editing to synthesize diverse SCS while preserving data fidelity. Experiments on nuScenes, Waymo, and KITTI datasets show that OmniSCS outperforms state-of-the-art methods in edited scene fidelity. We further validate its ability to enhance autonomous driving algorithms and support real-time (13Hz) closed-loop testing. Overall, OmniSCS provides a safer, more effective, and cost-efficient solution for SCS optimization and testing in autonomous driving.

AI.tldr: 提出OmniSCS系统，通过双策略智能体重建与深度细化背景重建模块，实现高保真场景编辑与安全关键场景合成，支持13Hz闭环测试，在多个数据集上优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在场景编辑后难以保持数据保真度，且无法高效生成高质量的安全关键场景，亟需一种能兼顾逼真度与物理保真度的系统。
AI.method: 包含两个核心模块：1) 全可编辑驾驶世界构建模块，采用双策略智能体重建和深度细化背景重建保持高保真；2) 安全关键场景合成模块，支持对象插入和轨迹编辑，在保真的前提下合成多样SCS。
AI.result: 在nuScenes、Waymo、KITTI数据集上，编辑场景保真度优于SOTA方法；可增强自动驾驶算法性能，支持13Hz实时闭环测试。
AI.conclusion: OmniSCS为自动驾驶安全关键场景优化与测试提供了更安全、有效且经济的解决方案。

title: Time Imprint: Learning Time-Aware Representations in Multi-Modal Knowledge Graphs
summary: Multi-Modal Knowledge Graphs (MMKGs) enrich entities with multiple modalities such as text and images, yet entities with highly similar multi-modal features remain difficult to distinguish. Temporal information of an entity can serve as an additional modality to disambiguate such entities, but existing approaches rarely treat time as a separate modality alongside text and images due to two major challenges: (1) sparse temporal semantics, which hinder alignment with richer modalities, and (2) multiple timestamps, which introduce noise or reduce robustness in representation learning. To address these challenges, we propose Time Imprint, a framework that treats time as an entity-level modality and jointly aligns temporal, textual, and visual representations via a three-view contrastive objective. Additionally, to mitigate multi-timestamp ambiguity, Time Imprint studies a compact timestamp subset selection design space and aggregates the selected timestamps into a discriminative temporal embedding with attention pooling, balancing temporal specificity and robustness. Experiments on three MMKG benchmarks demonstrate that Time Imprint achieves state-of-the-art link prediction performance, improving Hits@1 by up to 6.07\% overall and yielding up to 58\% gains on the subset of the top-1\% ambiguity samples. We further examine different fusion strategies and the sensitivity to timestamp availability and quality, clarifying when and why time-as-modality is most beneficial, while adding only modest training overhead. We release our code at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/Time-Imprint.

AI.tldr: 提出Time Imprint框架，将时间作为实体级模态，通过三视角对比学习对齐时间、文本和图像表示，并设计时间戳子集选择与注意力聚合机制，在多模态知识图谱链接预测任务上达到SOTA。
AI.motivation: 多模态知识图谱中高度相似的多模态实体难以区分，现有方法很少将时间作为独立模态来处理，因为存在两个挑战：时间语义稀疏（难以与丰富模态对齐）和多个时间戳（引入噪声或降低鲁棒性）。
AI.method: 提出Time Imprint框架：(1) 将时间视为实体级模态，通过三视角对比学习联合对齐时间、文本和视觉表示；(2) 设计紧凑时间戳子集选择方案，利用注意力池化聚合选定时间戳为判别性时间嵌入，平衡时间特异性和鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在三个MMKG基准上达到SOTA，Hits@1整体提升最高6.07%，在top-1%歧义样本上提升高达58%，且训练开销适中。
AI.conclusion: 时间作为独立模态能有效提升多模态知识图谱中歧义实体的区分能力，不同融合策略和时间戳质量的影响分析进一步说明时间模态的适用场景。

title: Prioritizing Search Space Regions in the Low Autocorrelation Binary Sequences Problem
summary: Low autocorrelation binary sequences problem (LABS) is a hard combinatorial optimization challenge with important applications in communications, signal processing, and satellite navigation. This paper proposes a hybrid search framework that combines Thompson sampling with parallel self-avoiding walks to adaptively allocate computational effort across restriction classes of the LABS search space. By modeling partitions as arms in a multi-armed bandit setting, the proposed method dynamically shifts search resources toward partitions that empirically produce higher merit factors while maintaining exploration of less-sampled regions. The approach is further accelerated through GPU-parallel execution, shared posterior updates, efficient neighborhood evaluation, and a Bloom filter for cycle prevention. In addition, we use a two-stage optimization strategy that first searches constrained partitioned skew-symmetric spaces and then refines the best candidates in the unrestricted space. Experiments on long binary sequences show that the proposed method improves the previously best-known results for 35 sequence lengths in the range $450 \le L \le 527$ and for $L=573$. In particular, we report a new longest sequence with merit factor exceeding $8.0$, obtained for $L=451$. The results also show that Thompson sampling effectively prioritizes partitions with better observed performance, confirming the value of online, data-driven resource allocation in LABS optimization. Overall, the proposed framework provides a scalable and effective strategy for high-performance merit factor maximization.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种结合Thompson采样和并行自避走动的混合搜索框架，用于解决低自相关二进制序列问题，在35个序列长度上改进了先前最优结果，并首次在L=451时获得超过8.0的优值因子。
AI.motivation: 低自相关二进制序列问题（LABS）在通信、信号处理和卫星导航等领域有重要应用，但作为一个困难的组合优化问题，需要更高效的搜索策略来提升长序列的优值因子。
AI.method: 提出混合搜索框架，将Thompson采样与并行自避走动结合，通过多臂赌博机建模动态分配计算资源；采用GPU并行加速、共享后验更新、高效邻域评估和Bloom过滤器防止循环；使用两阶段优化策略，先在约束的分区斜对称空间中搜索，再在无限制空间中优化。
AI.result: 在450≤L≤527范围内的35个序列长度以及L=573上改进了先前最优结果；在L=451时首次获得优值因子超过8.0的新最长序列。
AI.conclusion: Thompson采样能有效优先选择性能更优的分区，验证了在线数据驱动资源分配在LABS优化中的价值；该框架提供了一种可扩展且有效的优值因子最大化策略。

title: AGM-like Paraconsistent Partial Meet Abductive Expansion Operation
summary: In his 1996 doctoral thesis, Maurice Pagnucco created the first AGM-like abductive expansion operation. Taking his operation as a basis, as well as a taxonomy -- inspired by Atocha Aliseda -- responsible for highlighting and formalizing the main components of abductive reasoning, the main aim of this paper is to present a new paraconsistent AGM-like abductive expansion operation -- capable of assimilating contradictory explanatory hypotheses without trivialization and the consequent absurd epistemic state -- with its postulates and its transitively relational partial meet construction. To a large extent, the formal development presented in this paper was only made possible by the recent creation of the paraconsistent logic RCbr, an LFI (Logics of Formal Inconsistencies) that establishes properties especially relevant to belief revision contexts, in particular, the ability to be self-extensional -- i.e., to satisfy the replacement property. This is the first of two papers: the paraconsistent abductive expansion operation announced here -- which is part of a new system called AGMpabd -- despite bringing many interesting features, does not assign any relevant epistemic role to the paraconsistent operators of negation and consistency. Only in a second paper will an analogous paraconsistent abductive expansion operation -- which is part of another new system, AGMcircabd -- be enhanced in this direction. Nevertheless, to the best of my knowledge, the operation developed in this paper is the first of its kind in the AGM literature.

AI.tldr: 本文基于Pagnucco的溯因扩张操作和Aliseda的分类法，提出了一种新的次协调AGM-like溯因扩张操作（AGMpabd），能够在不导致琐碎化和荒谬认知状态的情况下吸收矛盾的解释性假设，并给出了其公设和传递关系偏交构造。
AI.motivation: 现有AGM溯因扩张操作无法处理矛盾的解释性假设，会导致认知状态琐碎化。次协调逻辑RCbr的出现为建立能容纳矛盾的溯因操作提供了基础。
AI.method: 基于Pagnucco的溯因扩张操作和Aliseda的溯因分类法，利用次协调逻辑RCbr（一种LFI逻辑，满足自外延性/替换性质），定义了新的次协调AGM-like溯因扩张操作及其公设，并给出了传递关系偏交构造。
AI.result: 成功构建了首个AGM文献中的次协调溯因扩张操作（AGMpabd），能够合并矛盾假设而不导致琐碎化。但该操作尚未赋予次协调否定算子和一致性算子相关的认知角色。
AI.conclusion: 这是两篇论文的第一篇，提出的操作是开创性的。第二篇论文（AGMcircabd）将在此基础上进一步增强次协调算子的认知角色。

title: A Risk-Field Enhanced Closed-Loop Digital Twin Framework for Autonomous Driving Safety Validation
summary: Autonomous driving systems require reliable safety validation before real-world deployment. However, large-scale road testing is costly, difffcult to reproduce, and inefffcient for exposing rare safety-critical scenarios. Conventional simulation improves repeatability, but an offfine simulator alone cannot continuously connect physical trafffc states, virtual reconstruction, algorithm evaluation, and scenario evolution. This paper proposes a risk-ffeld enhanced closed-loop digital twin framework for autonomous driving safety validation. The framework integrates physical data acquisition, data synchronization, virtual twin reconstruction, risk-aware scenario generation, autonomous driving algorithm evaluation, and safety analysis. A driving risk ffeld is introduced as a uniffed intermediate representation to describe obstacle, lane-departure, road-boundary, time-to-collision, and comfort-related risks around the ego vehicle. The risk ffeld ranks high-risk scenarios in the digital twin scenario library and provides dense safety guidance for reinforcement learning-based driving policies. A simulation-style evaluation protocol is designed to compare conventional reinforcement learning baselines, risk-penalty baselines, and the proposed risk-ffeld guided method. The study indicates that embedding explicit risk structure into digital twins can make autonomous driving validation more targeted, interpretable, and reusable, while its practical effectiveness remains bounded by model ffdelity, risk calibration, and sim-to-real transfer.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种风险场增强的闭环数字孪生框架，用于自动驾驶安全验证，通过集成物理数据采集、虚拟重建、风险感知场景生成和算法评估，实现更精准、可解释和可复用的安全验证。
AI.motivation: 大规模道路测试成本高、难以复现且效率低，传统仿真虽可重复但无法连续连接物理交通状态、虚拟重建、算法评估和场景演化，亟需一种更高效的闭环验证框架。
AI.method: 构建风险场增强的闭环数字孪生框架，引入驾驶风险场作为统一中间表示（涵盖障碍物、车道偏离、道路边界、碰撞时间和舒适性风险），利用风险场对高危险场景进行排序，并为强化学习驾驶策略提供密集安全引导。
AI.result: 与常规强化学习基线及风险惩罚基线相比，风险场引导方法在安全性验证上更具针对性、可解释性和可重用性，但实际效果受限于模型保真度、风险校准和仿真到真实的迁移。
AI.conclusion: 将显式风险结构嵌入数字孪生能够提升自动驾驶验证的效果，但其实际效能仍受到模型保真度、风险校准和虚实迁移等因素的制约。

title: A Generalized Deep Non-negative Matrix Factorization Approach for SAR Automatic Target Recognition
summary: The deep nonnegative matrix factorization (DNMF) technique is proposed to address the low interpretability of deep learning-based methods in extracting multilayer features from synthetic aperture radar (SAR) target samples. However, existing DNMF methods employ a layer-by-layer decomposition strategy, which is prone to causing error accumulation and local optimum, thereby hindering a consistent improvement in recognition accuracy as the number of layer increases. In this paper, a robust multilayer feature extraction method, termed generalized deep non-negative matrix factorization (G-DNMF), is proposed to address the above challenges in SAR automatic target recognition (ATR). The G-DNMF aims global optimality and derives the update rules for each parameter using lagrangian multiplier method. The new update formula indicates that both the DNMF method based on the encoding matrix and the mixing matrix are special cases of the proposed method, theoretically demonstrating the universality of proposed method. In general, the proposed method discards the layer-by-layer decomposition strategy, thereby effectively mitigating the risk of local optima and eliminating error accumulation, leading to a significant improvement in DNMF's multi-layer feature extraction capability. The experimental results, by presenting the feature images extracted from each layer by G-DNMF and the reconstructed original images, verified the proposed method's pure additive understanding of multi-layer features and demonstrated its interpretability. The experimental results based on MSTAR and OpenSARship datasets show that G-DNMF outperforms existing DNMF algorithms and their derivatives in terms of stability and recognition performance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出广义深度非负矩阵分解（G-DNMF）方法，解决现有深度非负矩阵分解（DNMF）在SAR目标识别中逐层分解导致的误差累积和局部最优问题，通过全局优化和新的更新规则提升了多层特征提取能力与识别性能。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习方法在提取SAR目标多层特征时可解释性低，而DNMF虽旨在解决此问题，但其逐层分解策略易导致误差累积和局部最优，使得识别精度无法随层数增加而持续提升。
AI.method: 提出G-DNMF方法，采用全局优化策略，利用拉格朗日乘子法推导各参数更新规则。新更新公式表明基于编码矩阵和混合矩阵的DNMF方法均为本方法的特例，从而在理论上证明了方法的普适性，并摒弃了逐层分解策略。
AI.result: 通过每层提取的特征图像和重构原始图像验证了G-DNMF对多层特征的纯加性理解及其可解释性。在MSTAR和OpenSARship数据集上的实验结果表明，G-DNMF在稳定性和识别性能上均优于现有DNMF算法及其衍生方法。
AI.conclusion: G-DNMF有效克服了DNMF的误差累积和局部最优问题，显著提升了多层特征提取能力，在SAR自动目标识别任务中展现了更优的稳定性和识别效果。

title: What Context Does a Coding Agent Actually Need to Act?
summary: A modern coding agent can hold an entire repository in its context window. Most of its reading is wasted -- and the interesting question is not how much context an agent can use, but what it actually \emph{needs}. We study that question at the moment it matters most: when the agent must \emph{edit} code. Separating \emph{finding} the work site from \emph{acting} on it, we hold localization fixed with an oracle, vary only how the code is represented, and score context against real issue resolution on SWE-bench Verified. The answer is starkly minimal. The signal lives in the code being edited itself: natural-language summaries of it answer almost none of the behavioral questions that the source answers ($4/45$ vs.\ $27/45$, held-out repositories, independent judge), and the gap belongs to the representation, not the summarizer -- a frontier model's summaries score exactly as poorly as a 3B model's. The surrounding context hardly matters either: across every multi-file instance in Verified, under a protocol frozen before any data, rendering a file's remainder as UML skeletons and signatures resolves no more issues than deleting that remainder outright ($N{=}70$, exact McNemar $p{=}0.75$). That was our registered hypothesis, and it failed. Compressed context, meanwhile, matches whole files at a third of the tokens: a resolved issue costs $19$K context tokens, not $94$K. The instrument also yielded a finding the field should keep: temperature-0 API inference flips ${\sim}9\%$ of per-instance outcomes between byte-identical runs. That is a noise floor under every small effect reported on this benchmark, including ours. We release the instrument -- gold-validated environments, per-instance proof that every reference edit is expressible from every arm's context, deterministic patch construction, and pre-registered hypotheses whose nulls we publish.

AI.tldr: 本文研究编码智能体在编辑代码时真正需要的上下文信息，发现核心信号仅存在于被编辑代码本身，自然语言摘要和周围上下文贡献极小，压缩上下文可节省大量token，并揭示了温度0 API推理存在约9%的噪声底限。
AI.motivation: 现有编码智能体虽能容纳整个代码仓库，但大部分阅读是浪费的。作者希望在智能体编辑代码这一关键时刻，分离"定位"与"执行"两个阶段，探究编码表示中真正被需要的信息。
AI.method: 通过固定定位（使用oracle），变化代码表示方式，在SWE-bench Verified上评估不同上下文表示对问题解决率的影响。对比了源代码、自然语言摘要、UML骨架、压缩上下文等多种表示，并测试了不同规模模型（前沿模型vs 3B模型）的摘要效果。
AI.result: 自然语言摘要仅能回答4/45的行为问题（源代码回答27/45）；前缘模型的摘要与3B模型效果相当；将文件剩余部分替换为UML骨架与直接删除无显著差异（p=0.75）；压缩上下文以1/3的token达到与完整文件相同的效果；温度0 API推理在字节相同的运行间会造成约9%的结果翻转。
AI.conclusion: 编码智能体编辑代码时真正需要的信息极其有限，主要集中在被编辑的代码本身。自然语言摘要和周围上下文几乎不提供额外价值。压缩上下文是高效的选择。同时，该研究揭示了SWE-bench上存在约9%的噪声底限，提醒领域关注这一方法论问题。

title: Coresets Before Score Sets: Evaluation-Unsupervised Prompt Subset Selection for LLM Benchmarks
summary: We study LLM benchmark coreset selection: selecting a small subset of prompts over multiple benchmarks whose induced model scores and rankings approximate those obtained from the full benchmark suite. In evaluation-unsupervised benchmark coreset selection (our approach), the selection algorithm uses no model evaluation outcomes, and operates on a fine granularity by producing subsets of prompts over multiple benchmarks rather than producing a sub-collection of entire benchmarks. We use submodular subset selection, and we develop and evaluate many different submodular functions for this purpose, including determinantal point process (DPP) based approaches, submodular mutual information functions, and facility location-based functions. On a new large-scale suite of 35 heterogeneous benchmarks spanning five different capability categories, 18 frontier LLMs, and over 61K prompts, we find that the facility location (FL) function operating exclusively on inexpensive semantic prompt embeddings preserves LLM scores better than twelve separate score-based and diversity-based baselines, across a range of coreset budgets. Moreover, we show our proposed objective is not limited to the evaluation-unsupervised regime: in the setting where only a handful of whole benchmarks must be selected and a large amount of model scores are available, the same objective matches or outperforms state-of-the-art baselines on the MMLU and MTEB leaderboards, while being substantially cheaper to compute. Together, our results suggest that submodularity, in general, is a strong and reliable tool for benchmark compression.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于子模函数（特别是设施选址函数）的无监督基准测试核心集选择方法，仅利用廉价的语义嵌入即可在35个异构基准、18个前沿LLM和超过6.1万条提示的规模上，有效压缩基准测试集，同时保持模型分数和排名的一致性，性能优于12种基线方法。
AI.motivation: 随着大语言模型评估基准数量激增，完整评估所有基准的成本高昂，亟需一种能够在无监督（无需模型评估结果）条件下高效压缩基准测试集的方法，以降低评估成本同时保持评估准确性。
AI.method: 采用子模子集选择框架，在多个基准的提示级别进行细粒度选择，而非粗粒度的整基准选择。设计了多种子模函数（包括DPP、子模互信息和设施选址函数），其中设施选址函数基于廉价的语义嵌入（而非模型分数）进行选择。
AI.result: 在35个异构基准、18个LLM和6.1万条提示的大规模实验中，设施选址函数在多种核心集预算下优于12种基于分数和多样性的基线方法。此外，在监督场景（需选择整基准）下，该方法在MMLU和MTEB排行榜上与SOTA持平或更优，且计算成本更低。
AI.conclusion: 子模性是基准压缩的强有力工具，设施选址函数在无监督和有监督场景中均表现出色，为高效LLM评估提供了可靠且廉价的核心集选择方案。

title: Maximizing Human Efficiency in Large-Scale Robot Post-Training via VLAC-Cut Guided Pipeline
summary:
When adapting Vision Language Action (VLA) models to downstream tasks, multiple rounds of post training are required because a single round of data cannot resolve all issues, making continuous iterations necessary to progressively address the weaknesses exposed in previous rounds. In this report, we aim to maximize human efficiency during post-training, defined as the policy improvement and task throughput achieved per unit of human labor and time.
  We propose a human-efficient post-training pipeline that enables a small number of human operators to supervise multiple robots. The pipeline is built around a specialized division of labor: a trained Teleoperator focuses on high-value remote interventions and recovery demonstrations, while a Floor Operator monitors multiple robots, triggers takeovers, and performs physical resets. This role specialization reduces task switching, lowers operator training costs, and allows limited human labor to supervise more robot interaction across a larger fleet. To improve data utilization efficiency, we introduce VLAC-CUT as an automatic rollout curation tool. It segments autonomous robot trajectories into progress-making, idle, failure-inducing, and recovery portions, preserving useful segments while filtering harmful or uninformative ones. The curated rollout data are combined with Human-in-the-Loop data for the next post-training round. We validate the proposed pipeline on four real-world manipulation tasks. Across iterative post-training rounds, the final policies achieve 80\%--95\% success rates and improve task throughput by 1.7$\times$--4.2$\times$ over the base model. Under the same human-intervention budget, VLAC-CUT guided rollout reuse outperforms HITL-only training in both success rate and throughput.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种面向VLA模型后训练的人效优化流程，通过角色分工（远程操作员+地面监控员）和自动轨迹筛选工具VLAC-CUT，在少量人工监督下实现多机器人协同训练，最终在四个真实操作任务中取得80%-95%的成功率，任务吞吐量提升1.7-4.2倍。
AI.motivation: VLA模型在下游任务后训练中需多轮迭代，而单轮数据无法解决所有问题。现有方法人工成本高、效率低，亟需一种最大化单位人工投入所获得策略提升和任务吞吐量的高效后训练流程。
AI.method: 提出人效后训练流程：(1) 角色专业化分工——Teleoperator负责高价值远程干预和恢复演示，Floor Operator监控多台机器人、触发接管和物理重置；(2) 引入VLAC-CUT自动轨迹筛选工具，将自主机器人轨迹分割为进展、空闲、失败诱导、恢复四部分，过滤无效数据；(3) 将筛选后的数据与人在环数据合并用于下一轮训练。
AI.result: 在四个真实操作任务上，多轮迭代后策略成功率达80%-95%，任务吞吐量较基础模型提升1.7-4.2倍。在相同人工干预预算下，VLAC-CUT引导的轨迹复用训练优于纯HITL训练。
AI.conclusion: 通过角色分工和自动数据筛选，可有效降低人工成本、提高数据利用效率，实现少量操作员监督多机器人集群的高效后训练迭代。

title: Towards Real-World Wearable Motion Reconstruction
summary: The modern-day surge in popularity of wearable devices poses a fundamentally unique motion capture problem: reconstructing full-body movement from any set of sensing hardware worn at a given moment. Yet, most research efforts assume fixed sensor configurations (e.g. IMU suits or HMD-centric rigs) and cannot generalize across them. In contrast, we argue that motion capture should prioritize unobtrusive and lightweight devices such as smartphones, smartwatches, smart glasses, and smart insoles, and study the interplay between them. To this end, we make three contributions. First, we present a large-scale multi-modal dataset synchronizing these consumer-grade sensors with ground-truth 3D motion, spanning 50 diverse activities including everyday tasks, sports, and social interactions. Second, we propose WHIP, a baseline generative model that reconstructs motion from arbitrary subsets of available sensors, robustly handling missing modalities and producing physically plausible motions. Third, we conduct a systematic study of sensor complementarity, quantifying how different modalities complement one another. Code and dataset are available at https://vcai.mpi-inf.mpg.de/projects/WHIP/

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种从任意可穿戴传感器子集重建全身运动的方法，发布多模态数据集和WHIP生成模型，并系统研究了传感器之间的互补性。
AI.motivation: 现有动作捕捉研究大多假设固定传感器配置（如IMU套装），无法泛化到不同穿戴设备组合。实际中用户可能仅佩戴智能手表、手机、眼镜等轻量设备，需要一种能处理任意传感器子集的动作重建方法。
AI.method: 构建大规模多模态数据集，包含消费级传感器（手机、手表、眼镜、鞋垫）与真实3D运动数据。提出WHIP生成模型，可从任意可用传感器子集重建运动，鲁棒处理缺失模态并生成物理合理的动作。
AI.result: 发布涵盖50种活动的多模态数据集；WHIP模型能处理任意传感器组合的缺失情况；通过系统实验量化了不同传感器模态之间的互补性。
AI.conclusion: 动作捕捉应优先使用轻量无扰的消费级设备，WHIP模型为灵活的多模态动作捕捉提供了有效基线，传感器互补性研究有助于指导实际部署中的设备选择。

title: Reference-Based Distillation Detection in LLMs
summary: Model distillation -- training on outputs from stronger third-party models -- is widely used to boost performance, but raises concerns about unfair advantages and policy violations. This motivates a fundamental question: can we detect whether a model was distilled from another? We show that, while identifying a teacher model from a student in isolation is highly challenging, it becomes tractable in a reference-based setting: given a model and an earlier-generation checkpoint from the same lineage, we can identify the teacher model used to train the later checkpoint. We introduce a distillation detection method based on reference-based membership inference. By comparing how strongly a student model preferentially aligns with outputs from different candidate teachers relative to a reference checkpoint, our method identifies the most likely teacher and detects evidence of distillation. To handle unknown distillation pipelines such as hidden prompts, we infer proxy prompt templates directly from model outputs. We additionally identify a distinctive glyph-level signal specific to o1/o3 models. Evaluating distillation detection is challenging because modern model lineages are already heavily entangled. To address this, we develop a hybrid evaluation spanning both controlled distillation experiments and real-world models. Across both settings, our approach recovers the true teacher with near-perfect accuracy in single-teacher distillation scenarios, even when the underlying distillation pipeline is largely unknown. We further introduce statistical tests for both teacher attribution and distillation detection, and extend our framework to open-world settings where no teacher is guaranteed to be present among the candidates. Applying our method to contemporary models yields new evidence regarding potential distillation relationships involving QwQ, DeepSeek-R1, and GPT-OSS.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于参考的成员推理方法，通过比较模型对不同候选教师输出的偏好程度，能够高精度地检测模型是否从其他模型蒸馏而来，并在真实模型中发现了QwQ、DeepSeek-R1和GPT-OSS之间潜在的蒸馏关系。
AI.motivation: 模型蒸馏被广泛使用但带来了不公平优势和违反政策的风险，现有方法难以在孤立情况下判断模型是否经过蒸馏，因此需要一种有效的蒸馏检测方法。
AI.method: 提出基于参考的成员推断方法，通过比较学生模型对不同候选教师输出的对齐程度来识别教师模型；针对未知蒸馏流程，从模型输出中推断代理提示模板；还识别了o1/o3模型特有的字形级信号。
AI.result: 在单教师蒸馏场景下，该方法以近乎完美的准确率恢复真实教师模型；在真实世界模型中成功揭示了QwQ、DeepSeek-R1和GPT-OSS之间潜在的蒸馏关系。
AI.conclusion: 基于参考的蒸馏检测方法是可行且有效的，能够从统计上归因教师模型并检测蒸馏行为，为模型蒸馏的合规性评估提供了新工具。

title: A Dynamic Scene Interaction Reasoning Framework for Scene-level Lane-Change Intention and Trajectory Prediction of Multiple Interacting Vehicles
summary: Safe motion planning in advanced driver-assistance systems and autonomous vehicles requires an accurate understanding of how the surrounding traffic scene is likely to evolve. However, many existing lane-change prediction methods remain centered on a single target vehicle, while multi-agent forecasting approaches often describe scene evolution only through future positions and provide limited explicit information about the maneuver associated with each vehicle. This study proposes a dynamic scene graph attention framework that predicts the lane-change intention and future trajectory of every relevant vehicle within a local traffic scene. The scene is represented as a time-varying interaction graph in which vehicles are modeled as nodes and their spatial and kinematic relationships are encoded through explicit edge features. Temporal graph-attention message passing captures evolving inter-vehicle dependencies and pre-maneuver cues, while an intention-guided decoder links each predicted maneuver to its corresponding future motion. A scene-level consistency objective further encourages compatible multi-vehicle futures. Experiments on the NGSIM I-80, NGSIM US-101, and highD datasets demonstrate consistent improvements over competing baselines. DSiGAT achieves intention prediction accuracies of 90.12% and 90.97% on NGSIM I-80 and US-101, respectively, and reduces trajectory RMSE by up to 52.94% relative to the strongest baseline. It also produces lower inter-agent collision rates and joint displacement errors, indicating more coherent scene-level predictions.
