AI.tldr: LLM推理生态中广泛使用的乘法重复惩罚（repetition penalty）依赖于原始logit的符号分支，但logit的零点任意，导致惩罚定义不明确、破坏结构化输出。将惩罚应用于归一化的log概率可消除这两类问题。
AI.motivation: 当前LLM推理生态（HuggingFace、vLLM、llama.cpp等）中广泛使用的乘法重复惩罚存在根本性缺陷：它基于原始logit的符号进行分支判断（正logit除θ，负logit乘θ），但softmax对logit加常数不变，因此logit的零点是任意的。这导致惩罚变得不明确且产生有害后果。
AI.method: 通过理论分析证明logit零点任意性，并在五个模型（最高7B，包括base和RLHF模型）上实验测量：(1) logit重中心化（加常数）在θ=1时无影响，但在θ=1.3时改变58-96%的贪婪解码token；(2) 在200个真实JSON schema上，θ=1.3将有效符合schema的输出从97%降至23%。提出将惩罚应用于归一化log概率而非原始logit的修正方案。
AI.result: (1) 惩罚不是良定义的：不同checkpoint的零点差异很大，相同repetition_penalty在不同模型上产生不同效果；(2) 惩罚破坏结构化输出：JSON schema符合率从97%骤降至23%；(3) 将惩罚应用于归一化log概率可消除这两种不良效应，且HuggingFace已提供该算子（LogitNormalization），但默认关闭且在惩罚之后应用。
AI.conclusion: LLM推理生态中广泛使用的符号分支重复惩罚存在根本性缺陷，应使用归一化log概率上的惩罚替代。HuggingFace已具备相关算子但配置不当，需修正默认行为。

title: Verification of Adaptive Agentic Controllers through Finite Rule Revision
summary: Industrial agentic AI systems increasingly exhibit a gap between prototype capability and production deployment. In particular, adaptive agents may generate plausible outputs while remaining difficult to verify under non-determinism, confidentiality constraints, limited context, and weak observability. This paper formulates a bounded verification protocol for adaptive agentic controllers represented by finite symbolic rules, explicit diagnostic predicates, explanation logs, and held-out re-evaluation. The central research question is: when an adaptive agentic controller is represented through finite rules, explicit diagnostic predicates, explanation logs, and held-out re-evaluation, which classes of controller failure can be detected, locally repaired, or rejected without relying on unrestricted human-in-the-loop judgment? The proposed framework treats the controller as a finite revisable object. Diagnostic failures are mapped to predefined rule-level edits, including rule addition, rule deletion, and priority revision. Repaired controllers are then evaluated on held-out simulation seeds or cloned initial states. Experiments in a stylized financially constrained inventory-control benchmark show three outcomes: resource-induced failures that remain non-repairable by one rule edit, partial repairs that are rejected because they violate thresholds or guardrails, and a local one-step repair of an order-volatility failure induced by removing a smoothing rule. The contribution is methodological and provides a simulation-compatible procedure for testing whether specific controller-level failures can be made observable, explainable, locally revisable, and empirically re-tested under controlled conditions.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对自适应智能体控制器的有界验证协议，通过有限符号规则、诊断谓词、解释日志和留出重评估，来检测、局部修复或拒绝控制器故障，并在库存控制基准实验中展示了三种修复结果。
AI.motivation: 工业智能体AI系统从原型到生产部署存在差距，自适应智能体可能生成看似合理但难以验证的输出，面临非确定性、保密性、有限上下文和弱可观性等挑战。
AI.method: 将有界验证协议形式化为有限可修订对象：将诊断失败映射到预定义的规则级别编辑（添加、删除、优先级调整），然后在留出的模拟种子或克隆初始状态上评估修复后的控制器。
AI.result: 在库存控制基准实验中，发现了三种结果：资源导致的故障无法通过单次规则编辑修复；部分修复因违反阈值或护栏被拒绝；以及通过移除平滑规则实现对订单波动故障的局部一步修复。
AI.conclusion: 该方法提供了一种与模拟兼容的程序，用于测试特定控制器级故障是否能在受控条件下实现可观察、可解释、可局部修订和可经验重测。

title: Chalito: An Extensible Library for Filtering-Based State Estimation in Quadruped Robots
summary: State estimation is essential for quadruped robots, enabling robust locomotion, navigation, and control. While many estimators have been proposed in the literature, existing implementations are often tied to specific robots or software stacks, making fair comparisons difficult. This lack of a general-purpose benchmarking framework hinders reproducibility and slows down algorithmic innovation. In this paper, we introduce Chalito, an extensible MATLAB/Python library for benchmarking filter-based state estimation algorithms in quadruped robots. Chalito imports robot models directly from URDF, supports multiple filtering approaches, and is designed to be easily extended with new methods. The framework runs on both simulated and real datasets, enabling systematic evaluation across robots and filters. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first open-source library exclusively dedicated to benchmarking filtering algorithms for quadruped robots.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了Chalito，一个用于四足机器人状态估计算法基准测试的开源MATLAB/Python库，支持多种滤波方法、URDF模型导入和系统性评估。
AI.motivation: 现有四足机器人状态估计实现常与特定机器人或软件栈绑定，缺乏通用基准测试框架，阻碍了可重复性和算法创新。
AI.method: 开发了Chalito库，支持从URDF导入机器人模型，集成多种滤波方法，可在模拟和真实数据集上运行，并易于扩展新算法。
AI.result: 首次提出了专门针对四足机器人滤波算法基准测试的开源库，实现了跨机器人和滤波器的系统评估。
AI.conclusion: Chalito填补了四足机器人状态估计领域缺乏通用基准测试工具的空白，有望促进该领域的可重复研究和算法进步。

title: Prompting-MammAlps: Fine-Grained Text-to-Video Retrieval for Camera-Trap Data
comment: Accepted at ECCV 2026; Project page: https://cnai.epfl.ch/prompting-mammalps
summary: Automatically retrieving videos from large camera-trap datasets remains challenging. Text-to-Video retrieval (TVR) methods based on large video-language models (VLMs) have potential to retrieve events of interest by describing them with simple text queries. However, current methods often lack spatiotemporal understanding and do not generalize well to ecological data. In this work, we introduce Prompting-MammAlps, the first camera-trap TVR benchmark, and propose a fine-grained and interpretable TVR method. Specifically, we trained a vision transformer to perform spatiotemporal action localization, and convert its output to structured text, describing each video. Independently, ethology-inspired queries are processed by a Large-Language Model (LLM) based coding agent to parse the structured text per video and retrieve videos accordingly. We harnessed the LLM to use functions from a custom parsing library to minimize the risk of LLM hallucinations and to improve method interpretability. This retrieval approach applied on the Prompting-MammAlps benchmark achieved a set-based F1-score of 34\% on a test set of 135 ecologically-relevant queries and 775 candidate videos. In comparison the best zero-shot VLM achieved a F1-score of 18\%, while also lacking interpretability. Project page: https://cnai.epfl.ch/prompting-mammalps

AI.tldr: 本文提出Prompting-MammAlps基准数据集和一种细粒度、可解释的文本-视频检索方法，通过将视频中的时空动作定位转化为结构化文本，并利用LLM解析检索，在生态相机陷阱数据上显著优于现有零样本VLM方法（F1: 34% vs 18%）。
AI.motivation: 现有Text-to-Video检索方法缺乏时空理解能力，且难以泛化到生态相机陷阱数据，难以从大规模数据集中自动检索特定事件。
AI.method: 1) 训练Vision Transformer进行时空动作定位，将输出转化为结构化文本描述视频；2) 基于动物行为学的查询通过LLM编码代理解析每段视频的结构化文本；3) LLM调用自定义解析库函数来减少幻觉风险并增强可解释性。
AI.result: 在Prompting-MammAlps基准的135个生态查询和775个候选视频上，提出方法F1-score达34%，而最佳零样本VLM仅18%。
AI.conclusion: 提出的结构化文本+LLM解析方法在相机陷阱视频检索任务上优于现有零样本VLM方法，且具备更好的可解释性。

title: Metadata-Free Meta-Reweighted Direct Preference Optimization under Noisy Preference Labels
summary: Direct Preference Optimization (DPO) has become an important method for aligning large language models (LLMs) with human preferences because it removes the need for explicit reward modeling and reinforcement learning optimization. However, its performance depends heavily on the quality of preference data, and noisy preference data in real-world settings can weaken alignment performance. To address this issue, we propose a bilevel optimization framework and prove, under certain assumptions, that this framework can recover the DPO optimum under clean data. We further derive a prior form for the learnable weighting function under asymmetric label-flipping noise. Considering that high-quality metadata may be difficult to obtain, we propose a task-agnostic meta-knowledge-driven method that enables meta-learning even when metadata is completely unavailable. To reduce the high cost of higher-order gradients in LLM meta-learning, we combine central-difference approximation with LoRA fine-tuning and develop a scalable training scheme. Experiments on TL;DR summarization and Anthropic HH single-turn dialogue show that the proposed method improves training performance over multiple DPO baselines under different noise rates.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于双层优化的元学习框架，用于解决DPO在噪声偏好数据下的对齐性能下降问题，并设计了任务无关元知识驱动方法和高效训练方案，在摘要和对话任务上验证了有效性。
AI.motivation: DPO依赖于高质量偏好数据，但现实场景中数据常含有噪声，导致对齐性能下降，亟需一种能处理噪声偏好数据的鲁棒方法。
AI.method: 提出双层优化框架，证明其可在干净数据下恢复DPO最优解；推导非对称标签翻转噪声下可学习加权函数的先验形式；提出任务无关元知识驱动方法，无元数据时仍可进行元学习；结合中心差分近似与LoRA微调降低高阶梯度计算成本。
AI.result: 在TL;DR摘要和Anthropic HH单轮对话任务上，所提方法在不同噪声率下均优于多个DPO基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 该框架有效提升了DPO在噪声偏好数据下的对齐鲁棒性，且训练方案具备可扩展性。

title: EvoCUA-1.5: Online Reinforcement Learning for Multi-turn Computer-Use Agents
summary: Computer-use agents must solve long-horizon tasks through repeated interaction with partially observable, multimodal desktop environments. Although imitation learning and offline trajectory refinement provide strong priors, static traces cannot cover the causal feedback loop of real computer use: each action changes the screen state, future action space, and recovery options. EvoCUA-1.5 extends self-evolving computer-use agents from offline experience learning to online reinforcement learning, where policies interact with executable sandbox environments and improve from verifiable task outcomes. Online RL in this setting requires more than directly reusing single-turn language-RL recipes. Multi-turn interaction introduces context-managed observations, sparse terminal rewards, variable-length trajectories, and slow environment feedback. EvoCUA-1.5 addresses these challenges with Step-Level Policy Optimization (STEPO), which preserves trajectory-level advantage balance after decomposition into step-level samples; policy-aware filtering and pass-rate calibration over verifiable synthesized tasks; Dynamic Tri-Adaptive Curriculum (DTAC), which combines learnable tasks, difficult positive replay, and controlled infeasible-task exposure; and a fully asynchronous RL infrastructure with staleness control and mini-group batching. Experiments show that these components improve training stability and downstream performance. EvoCUA-1.5 achieves 63.2\% success on OSWorld-Verified, outperforming comparable 32B/35B-scale open-weight baselines and even approaching models with significantly larger parameter counts. Overall, EvoCUA-1.5 provides a practical framework for scaling online RL in multi-turn computer-use agents.

AI.tldr: EvoCUA-1.5 将自进化计算机使用智能体从离线经验学习扩展到在线强化学习，通过 STEPO、DTAC 和异步 RL 基础设施等组件解决了多轮交互中的挑战，在 OSWorld-Verified 上达到 63.2% 的成功率，优于同类开源基线，甚至接近更大参数规模模型的表现。
AI.motivation: 离线轨迹无法覆盖真实计算机使用的因果反馈循环（每次操作改变屏幕状态、未来动作空间和恢复选项），因此需要将智能体从离线学习扩展到在线强化学习。
AI.method: 提出了 EvoCUA-1.5 框架，包含四个关键组件：(1) Step-Level Policy Optimization (STEPO)，将轨迹级优势平衡分解为步骤级样本；(2) 策略感知过滤与通过率校准；(3) Dynamic Tri-Adaptive Curriculum (DTAC)，结合可学习任务、困难正样本回放和可控不可行任务暴露；(4) 完全异步的 RL 基础设施，包含陈旧性控制和小组批处理。
AI.result: 在 OSWorld-Verified 上达到 63.2% 的成功率，优于同规模的 32B/35B 开源基线，甚至接近更大参数规模模型的表现。
AI.conclusion: EvoCUA-1.5 提供了一个实用的框架，用于在多轮计算机使用智能体中扩展在线强化学习。

title: PinFT: Miniature 5-Axis Force/Torque Sensor Embeddable to Tweezer-like Tool
summary: We present PinFT, a miniature five-axis capacitive force/torque sensor designed for direct tip-level integration into tweezer-like tools. The sensor employs a compact three-PCB stack with segmented plated through-hole electrodes and a silicone elastomer dielectric, enabling five-degree-of-freedom force and torque sensing ($F_x$, $F_y$, $F_z$, $T_x$, $T_y$) through displacement of a central 2\,mm-diameter stainless steel pin. The fabricated prototype was calibrated using a higher-order polynomial mapping, yielding mean absolute errors of approximately 0.23\,N for forces and 2.5\,mN$\cdot$m for torques, with coefficients of determination ($R^2$) exceeding 0.97 across all axes. To demonstrate practical utility, a 3D-printed tweezer integrating PinFT sensors at both tips was mounted on a parallel-jaw gripper and evaluated across three representative manipulation tasks: grasping a sub-millimeter SMD capacitor, pulling a simulated hair from a silicone substrate, and tearing a compliant silicone specimen. In all cases, per-tip force sensing reliably captured characteristic force signatures that distinguish successful manipulation from failure events -- including slip and object ejection -- using gradient-based features derived from internal grasp force and net interaction force. These results demonstrate that direct, per-tip force sensing enables standard parallel-jaw grippers to monitor and interpret fine manipulation tasks performed through a handheld tweezer.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为PinFT的微型五轴电容式力/扭矩传感器，可集成到镊子尖端。该传感器采用三PCB堆叠结构和硅胶弹性体介电材料，通过2mm不锈钢针的位移实现五自由度力/扭矩感知。实验表明其具有高精度（R²>0.97），并在三种精细操作任务中验证了其能够可靠区分成功操作与失败事件。
AI.motivation: 现有力传感器难以直接集成到镊子类工具的尖端，无法实现每个尖端的独立力感知，限制了精细操作任务的监测与失败检测能力。
AI.method: 设计三PCB堆叠结构，采用分段镀通孔电极和硅胶弹性体介电层，通过2mm不锈钢针位移实现五轴（Fx, Fy, Fz, Tx, Ty）力/扭矩测量；使用高阶多项式映射进行校准。
AI.result: 力的平均绝对误差约0.23N，扭矩约2.5mN·m，R²>0.97；在抓取SMD电容、从硅胶基板拔模拟毛发、撕裂硅胶样本三项任务中，成功捕捉到区分成功操作与失败（滑移、弹出）的特征力信号。
AI.conclusion: 单尖端力感知使标准平行颚夹爪能够监测和解读通过手持镊子执行的精细操作任务，为机器人精细操控提供新方案。

title: A Dual-Stream Challenge-Response Protocol for Ocular Liveness Verification
comment: 6 pages, 2 figures. Simulation-based theoretical framework; human-subject validation identified as future work
summary: Ocular biometric systems face sophisticated presentation attacks, including high-resolution video replays and real-time generative deepfakes, which easily bypass static liveness checks. Current Presentation Attack Detection (PAD) frameworks typically rely on isolated physiological metrics, such as gaze tracking or the Pupillary Light Reflex (PLR), which can be spoofed independently. This paper proposes a Spatio-Luminance Sensor Fusion protocol, which introduces a dual-stream challenge-response framework for ocular liveness verification by uniting these metrics into a simultaneous authentication challenge. By generating a randomized, time-varying visual stimulus that fluctuates in both spatial trajectory and luminance intensity, we construct a mathematically coupled state-space likelihood model, termed the Synchronization Matrix, to evaluate the continuous cross-correlation between the expected biological latencies of smooth pursuit tracking and pupillary constriction. Using Monte Carlo simulation grounded in literature-derived latency distributions, we demonstrate theoretical separability between genuine and simulated attack conditions, and show that a multi-round challenge design improves the detection of generative deepfakes when a non-zero rendering-latency gap exists. This work provides a simulation-supported theoretical framework for next-generation dynamic spoofing defense in ocular and iris biometrics; human-subject validation is identified as necessary future work before deployment claims can be made.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种时空-亮度传感器融合协议，通过随机变化的视觉刺激（空间轨迹+亮度强度）同时激发平滑追踪和瞳孔光反射，利用同步矩阵评估两者之间的连续互相关，从而检测眼部呈现攻击（包括高清视频回放和生成式深度伪造）。蒙特卡洛仿真验证了该方法在理论上的可分离性，多轮挑战设计可提升对生成式深度伪造的检测能力。
AI.motivation: 现有眼部生物特征呈现攻击检测（PAD）框架通常依赖孤立的生理指标（如注视追踪或瞳孔光反射），这些指标容易被单独欺骗。高清视频回放和实时生成式深度伪造等高级攻击能够轻易绕过静态活体检测，亟需一种将多个生理指标耦合联动的新型检测机制。
AI.method: 提出时空-亮度传感器融合协议：设计一个在空间轨迹和亮度强度上均随机波动的时变视觉刺激作为挑战；构建同步矩阵（Synchronization Matrix），这是一个数学耦合的状态空间似然模型，用于评估平滑追踪延迟与瞳孔收缩延迟之间的连续互相关；通过蒙特卡洛仿真基于文献推导的延迟分布进行理论验证。
AI.result: 蒙特卡洛仿真表明：该方法在理论层面能够区分真实活体与模拟攻击条件；多轮挑战设计在存在非零渲染延迟差距的情况下，能够提升对生成式深度伪造的检测性能。
AI.conclusion: 本文提供了一个仿真支持的理论框架，为下一代眼部及虹膜生物特征的动态欺骗防御奠定基础；同时明确指出，在做出部署声明之前，需要进行人类受试者验证作为未来工作。

title: JEPA for AI-Native 6G: Predictive Representations and Open Challenges
comment: 14 pages, 4 figures, 3 tables. Tutorial and review on Joint-Embedding Predictive Architecture (JEPA) for AI-native 6G. Submitted to IEEE Communications Magazine
summary: Sixth-generation (6G) networks are moving toward AI-native operation, where learning modules are embedded across the radio access network (RAN), edge, and core. This transition requires learning from limited labels, heterogeneous wireless and network data, partial observations, non-stationary propagation, and latency-constrained control loops. Joint-embedding predictive architecture (JEPA) is a promising self-supervised paradigm for this setting because it predicts missing or future representations in latent space instead of reconstructing raw measurements or using contrastive negative samples. This article presents a wireless-oriented tutorial on JEPA for 6G intelligence. We define the JEPA training mechanism, describe how CSI, beam measurements, KPIs, topology graphs, and sensing observations can be tokenized and masked, and position the learned encoder as a predictive representation layer for RAN, O-RAN, edge, and core functions, with task-specific heads or controllers producing final decisions. Then we present an illustrative, beam-management case study suggesting that a wireless-aware target, specifically an auxiliary future beam-energy target during self-supervised pretraining, can improve label efficiency and robustness across shifted deployment conditions relative to a supervised source domain. Finally, we outline open challenges in multi-timescale prediction, action-conditioned modeling, distributed training, trustworthiness, efficient deployment, benchmarking, and standardization.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了面向6G网络的无线联合嵌入预测架构（JEPA）教程，该架构通过在潜在空间中预测缺失或未来表示，实现自监督学习，以解决6G AI原生操作中标签有限、数据异构、非平稳传播和延迟约束等挑战。通过波束管理案例验证了无线感知目标预训练可提升标签效率和鲁棒性，并指出了多时间尺度预测、分布式训练等开放挑战。
AI.motivation: 6G网络正朝着AI原生操作演进，但面临标签有限、数据异构、部分观测、非平稳传播和延迟约束等挑战，现有监督学习和对比学习范式难以满足需求，亟需更适合无线环境的自监督学习架构。
AI.method: 提出JEPA自监督学习框架，在潜在空间预测缺失/未来表示而非重构原始数据或使用负样本对比；定义了CSI、波束测量、KPI、拓扑图、传感观测的token化与掩码机制；将编码器作为RAN/O-RAN/边缘/核心的预测表示层，附加任务特定头或控制器。
AI.result: 波束管理案例表明：在自监督预训练中使用辅助的未来波束能量目标（无线感知目标），相比监督源域，在标签效率和跨部署场景鲁棒性方面均有提升。
AI.conclusion: JEPA是6G AI原生网络中有前景的自监督范式，但仍需解决多时间尺度预测、动作条件建模、分布式训练、可信性、高效部署、基准测试和标准化等开放挑战。

title: From Patterns to Maze Structures: SMT-Based Path Synthesis and 2D/3D Construction
summary: We present a pipeline for constructing maze structures from input patterns such as text or shapes. The central path-synthesis problem is encoded in Satisfiability Modulo Theories as global constraints on adjacency, continuity, and pattern-constrained coverage, allowing each fixed-bound instance to be solved in one call. The resulting path is either a planar, self-avoiding route or a layered traversal with prescribed over--under crossings, and it serves as a scaffold for constructing planar mazes and three-dimensional realizations of woven mazes. This report extends the published Bridges 2026 conference paper with more representative SMT-LIB examples and a fuller account of how synthesized paths become concrete maze constructions in planar and three-dimensional form.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个基于SMT求解的迷宫结构生成流水线，能够从文本或形状等输入模式自动合成平面自避路径或具有指定上下交叉的分层遍历路径，并进一步将其转化为平面迷宫和三维编织迷宫的具体构建。
AI.motivation: 现有迷宫生成方法大多依赖特定算法（如递归回溯），难以从任意输入模式（如文字、形状）直接生成符合全局约束的路径，且缺乏统一的框架来同时支持平面迷宫和三维编织迷宫的结构化生成。
AI.method: 将路径合成问题编码为SMT（可满足性模理论）公式，以邻接性、连续性和模式约束覆盖为全局约束，对每个固定边界实例通过一次求解得到路径；路径可以是平面自避路线或具有指定上下交叉的分层遍历；以此路径为骨架构建平面迷宫及三维编织迷宫。
AI.result: 成功从输入模式（文本、形状）合成满足约束的路径，并实现了平面迷宫和三维编织迷宫的实物构建。相比会议论文，本文提供了更丰富的SMT-LIB示例及从合成路径到具体迷宫构建的完整流程说明。
AI.conclusion: 基于SMT的路径合成方法能灵活地将任意输入模式转化为迷宫结构，为平面和三维编织迷宫的设计提供统一框架，拓展了迷宫生成的自动化与定制化能力。

title: Runtime Safety Filtering for Learned Small UAS Separation Policies under GNSS Degradation
comment: Accepted for publication at the 2026 IEEE/AIAA Digital Avionics Systems Conference (DASC). 9 pages, 8 figures
summary: Learning-based separation assurance for small Unmanned Aircraft Systems (sUAS) achieves near-zero collision rates in simulation, but assumes accurate position and velocity information from Global Navigation Satellite Systems (GNSS). This assumption fails in urban environments, where multipath propagation, signal blockage, and intentional interference degrade navigation integrity. This raises a fundamental architectural question for deploying learned separation policies under GNSS degradation: should runtime safety mechanisms filter the policy's actions or its observations? This work evaluates both approaches for multi-agent sUAS separation under adversarial GNSS degradation. Both architectures first estimate a worst-case traffic state consistent with bounded observation uncertainty, then diverge: action filtering constrains policy outputs via discrete-time control barrier functions evaluated at the worst-case state, while observation filtering presents the worst-case state directly to the policy as corrected input. Experimental results show that action filtering provides negligible safety improvement, while observation filtering reduces near mid-air collisions by 90% and remains robust to the barrier function's tradeoff between separation distance and closing rate. These results suggest that, for policies with learned safety behaviors, preserving the policy's decision authority outperforms overriding its actions with hand-designed constraints.

AI.tldr: 在GNSS退化环境下，对比两种安全机制——动作过滤（通过控制障碍函数约束策略输出）与观测过滤（将最坏情况状态作为策略输入）。实验表明观测过滤能减少90%的近距碰撞风险，且优于动作过滤，说明对于已学习安全行为的策略，保留决策权比用人工设计的约束覆盖其动作更有效。
AI.motivation: 基于学习的sUAS分离保障策略在仿真中表现优异，但假设GNSS提供准确的位置速度信息。城市环境中的多径传播、信号阻塞和有意干扰会破坏导航完整性，因此需要研究在GNSS退化条件下如何部署学习型分离策略。
AI.method: 首先估计与有界观测不确定性一致的最坏情况交通状态，然后分别采用两种架构：1) 动作过滤——在最坏情况状态上通过离散时间控制障碍函数约束策略输出；2) 观测过滤——将最坏情况状态直接作为修正输入提供给策略。
AI.result: 动作过滤对安全性提升微乎其微；观测过滤将近距空中碰撞减少90%，且对分离距离与接近速率之间的权衡具有鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 对于已学习安全行为的策略，保留策略的决策权优于用手工设计的约束覆盖其动作。

title: ShapKO: Shapley-Adaptive Modality Knockout for Robust Multimodal Learning
summary: Multimodal medical models often degrade when inputs are missing, a common scenario in real-world clinical workflows. Separately, even when all modalities are present, modality dominance is observed during training, where optimization over-relies on a highly predictive modality and undertrains complementary sources, resulting in poor robustness under partial availability. While training-time modality knockout improves missing-modality robustness, existing approaches use static masking rates that cannot adapt to evolving modality utility during training. We introduce ShapKO (Shapley-Adaptive Modality Knockout), a dynamic training strategy that learns modality-specific knockout probabilities based on validation utility. ShapKO periodically evaluates performance across modality subsets, estimates modality importance via Shapley values, and updates masking probabilities to suppress dominant modalities more frequently. This adaptive process promotes complementary representations, while requiring no architectural modifications. We evaluate ShapKO on three datasets covering multitask clinical classification, survival prediction, and cancer detection. ShapKO consistently improves performance under modality absence and yields interpretable trajectories of learned masking behavior. Code is available at: https://github.com/sumona00/ShapKO

AI.tldr: 提出ShapKO动态训练策略，通过Shapley值自适应调整模态淘汰概率，提升多模态医学模型在模态缺失时的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 多模态医学模型在模态缺失时性能下降，且训练中存在模态主导现象（过度依赖高预测性模态，忽视补充模态），现有静态淘汰策略无法适应训练过程中模态效用的变化。
AI.method: ShapKO动态训练策略：周期性评估模态子集性能，通过Shapley值估计模态重要性，据此更新淘汰概率，更频繁地抑制主导模态，无需修改模型架构。
AI.result: 在三个数据集（多任务临床分类、生存预测、癌症检测）上，ShapKO在模态缺失情况下持续提升性能，并产生可解释的淘汰行为轨迹。
AI.conclusion: ShapKO通过自适应模态淘汰有效缓解了模态缺失和模态主导问题，提升多模态模型的鲁棒性，且无需架构修改。

title: The Silent Freeze: Predicting When Low-Precision Training Stops Learning
summary: Training in reduced floating-point precision can silently halt learning: when a gradient-descent weight update falls below half the unit in the last place (ULP) of the weight, it rounds away and that coordinate freezes while its gradient is still nonzero. The freeze is deterministic, governed by a per-coordinate half-ULP condition, and predictable from a high-precision trajectory and the target mantissa length alone, without low-precision data. In a small GPT trained under the standard AdamW-plus-cosine recipe with bf16-equivalent stored weights, training proceeds normally and then permanently freezes just past mid-run, within four steps of the a-priori prediction. In a $124$-million-parameter GPT-2 transformer whose weights are constrained to the $8$-bit floating-point grid after every optimizer step, with no master weights, the dense weights freeze at initialization in both fp8 formats -- predicted \emph{a priori} from an fp32 reference -- and validation loss plateaus while full precision keeps improving. Stochastic rounding removes the persistent freeze, and the same reference predicts that too. The condition transfers across frozen-feature regression, a mantissa-truncation emulator spanning $128\times$ in precision, small networks, and a CNN on MNIST: a computable axis of low-precision training, not diffuse noise.

AI.tldr: 低精度浮点训练中，当权重更新幅度小于半个ULP时，训练会静默冻结；该冻结是可预测的，且随机舍入可以消除这一现象。
AI.motivation: 揭示低精度浮点训练中一个被忽视的风险：权重更新因精度不足而被舍去，导致训练永久停滞，而梯度仍在计算，造成"静默失败"。
AI.method: 通过理论分析建立半ULP冻结条件，并在多种模型（GPT、GPT-2、CNN）和精度格式（bf16、fp8）上验证预测；使用随机舍入作为缓解方案。
AI.result: 在bf16训练的GPT中，训练在预定时间点冻结；在8位浮点的GPT-2中，权重在初始化时即冻结，验证损失平台化；随机舍入成功消除冻结。
AI.conclusion: 低精度训练中的冻结现象是确定性的、可预测的，而非随机噪声；随机舍入是有效的缓解手段。

title: Length Penalties Make Chain-of-Thought Less Monitorable
summary: Length-penalized reinforcement learning can shorten chain-of-thought reasoning while hiding an influence that drives the model's answer. In our experiments, training with length penalties does not stop misleading hints from steering models, even though the models' chains of thought mention the hint much less often. A token-accuracy evaluation would count these runs as successful because they use fewer reasoning tokens with little accuracy loss; it would miss whether the remaining trace still shows what drove the answer. We train Qwen3-4B and Qwen3-14B variants with different target chain lengths, then evaluate them with biasing-hint interventions on held-out MMLU-Pro-R and four transfer benchmarks. Compression sharply cuts reasoning tokens, preserves most multiple-choice accuracy, and leaves hint influence near baseline. At the strongest target, lower-bound faithfulness falls to 63.1% of baseline for Qwen3-14B and 69.4% for Qwen3-4B; the raw rate at which a monitor catches hint use falls from 69% to 49% and from 60% to 48%. To separate length from content, we randomly delete sentences from uncompressed baseline chains until the remaining text matches the compressed length. Even after this length matching, compressed chains disclose the hint 7-35 percentage points less often than baseline chains that we shorten at random, for both Qwen3 sizes and all five evaluation distributions. Compression therefore does more than shorten reasoning, preferentially removing the cues a monitor needs to see what influenced the answer. Together, these results reveal a compression-monitorability frontier in which cheaper reasoning can preserve answers while making the influences behind them harder to detect.

AI.tldr: 长度惩罚强化学习会缩短思维链推理，同时隐藏影响模型答案的提示信息。压缩后的思维链虽然保留了大部分准确率，但显著降低了提示的可监测性，揭示了一个压缩-可监测性前沿。
AI.motivation: 探究长度惩罚强化学习在缩短推理链时，是否会影响模型答案的可解释性和提示信息的可监测性。
AI.method: 训练Qwen3-4B和Qwen3-14B变体，设定不同目标链长度；通过偏置提示干预在MMLU-Pro-R和四个迁移基准上评估；通过随机删除句子进行长度匹配对照实验。
AI.result: 压缩大幅减少推理token，保全多数选择题准确率，但提示影响接近基线；强压缩下忠实性降至基线的63.1%（14B）和69.4%（4B）；提示监测率从69%降至49%（14B）和60%降至48%（4B）；压缩链比随机缩短的基线链提示披露率低7-35个百分点。
AI.conclusion: 推理压缩不仅缩短了推理长度，还优先移除了监测提示影响所需的线索，揭示了压缩与可监测性之间的权衡前沿。

title: Plug-and-Play Reweighting for Resilient Collaborative Decision-Making in Connected Autonomous Driving
comment: 8 pages, 4 figures, 2 tables. Accepted to the 2026 IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS 2026)
summary: Collaborative decision-making is a fundamental capability in multi-robot systems, such as connected autonomous vehicles. However, perceptual noise and adversarial attacks in collaborators can severely affect decision reliability. Overall, existing methods typically rely on retraining with attack-specific defenses or on restrictive perturbation assumptions to improve resilience, which limits their practicality. In this paper, we propose a novel Resilient Collaborative Decision-Making (RCDM) framework that consists of an attention-based encoder for extracting individual robot perceptual embeddings and an attention-based decoder for fusing collaborator perceptions and making decisions. To improve resilience to corrupted observations, we design a novel plug-and-play reweighting module that down-weights the influence of corrupted inputs by analyzing the consistency of neighborhood points relative to the local structure and assigning smaller weights to points that deviate strongly from the local median. This module can be seamlessly integrated into attention-based collaborative decision-making without requiring additional training. We evaluate our method in high-fidelity simulations, considering perceptual noise and five types of attacks across diverse accident-prone scenarios. Experimental results demonstrate that our approach consistently outperforms existing methods by up to 26% and achieves state-of-the-art resilient performance.

AI.tldr: 提出一种鲁棒协作决策框架(RCDM)，通过可插拔的重加权模块降低噪声和攻击感知的影响，无需额外训练，在仿真中性能提升达26%。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖针对特定攻击的重新训练或限制性扰动假设，实用性有限，亟需一种无需额外训练的通用鲁棒协作决策方法。
AI.method: 构建基于注意力机制的编码器-解码器架构，并设计可插拔重加权模块：通过分析邻域点与局部中位数的一致性，动态降低异常输入权重，无需额外训练即可集成。
AI.result: 在高保真仿真中，在感知噪声和五种攻击类型下，相比现有方法性能提升最高达26%，达到最先进鲁棒性能。
AI.conclusion: 提出的RCDM框架结合可插拔重加权模块，有效提升了多机器人系统在感知噪声和攻击下的决策鲁棒性，且无需额外训练，具有较好的实用价值。

title: Bridging the Catalog-to-Real Gap: Scalable Product Recognition via Multi-Stage Contrastive Learning
summary: Automated product recognition is a cornerstone of modern retail intelligence; however, accurately matching real-world, in-store images against extensive corporate catalogs remains a major scalability bottleneck for large-scale applications. In this work, we address this challenge by reformulating the task as an embedding-based cross-domain retrieval problem rather than a standard closed-set classification task. Specifically, we define the objective as retrieving the most corresponding catalog reference image for a given real-world product query crop from an expansive inventory. To bridge the severe domain gap between pristine studio packshots and noisy in-store queries, we introduce a novel catalog-to-real multi-stage contrastive learning paradigm (Cat2Real). This framework fine-tunes a vision backbone by systematically exploiting both item-level and image-level similarities to drive targeted hard negative mining. Extensive empirical evaluations demonstrate that our paradigm scales seamlessly to unseen products and categories, yielding outstanding zero-shot generalization performance even in the complete absence of real-world training images for novel inventory.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Cat2Real框架，通过多阶段对比学习将产品识别重构为跨域检索任务，实现了在无真实训练图像情况下的零样本泛化。
AI.motivation: 现有方法将产品识别当作封闭集分类任务，无法应对真实场景下产品品类繁多、域差异大的可扩展性瓶颈。
AI.method: 提出Cat2Real多阶段对比学习范式，利用物品级和图像级相似性进行针对性难负样本挖掘，弥合工作室照片与店内照片的域差距。
AI.result: 模型可无缝扩展到未见产品和类别，在完全缺乏真实训练图像时仍展现出色的零样本泛化性能。
AI.conclusion: 将产品识别重构为嵌入检索问题并采用多阶段对比学习，能有效解决大规模产品识别中的域适应和可扩展性挑战。

title: Discovering Latent Response Laws in Forced Physical Systems
comment: 23 pages, 5 figures and 2 tables. Supplementary Information provided as an ancillary file
summary: Governing equations provide compact descriptions of physical systems, yet the variables in which they are simple are often hidden in high-dimensional measurements. This challenge is sharper for forced systems, whose responses depend on both intrinsic dynamics and time-dependent inputs. Here we introduce FLARE, a forced latent autoencoder for response equations that learns compact response coordinates, identifies sparse input-dependent latent dynamics and decodes equation rollouts to full responses. By estimating latent dimension from data and separating state estimation from external forcing, FLARE enables forecasts to be initialized from past responses and driven by prescribed future inputs. Across known dynamical systems, application-scale forced responses and visual observations, FLARE recovers compact forced dynamics and predicts long-horizon high-dimensional responses under inputs not used for training. By turning learned coordinates into a dynamical interface, FLARE extends equation discovery to systems whose effective states are hidden within complex observations, providing a route for interpretable modelling and prediction of high-dimensional responses in forced dynamical systems.

AI.tldr: FLARE是一种强制潜变量自编码器，能够从高维测量数据中学习紧凑的响应坐标和稀疏的输入相关潜变量动力学，实现对外部驱动系统的高维响应进行长期预测和方程发现。
AI.motivation: 在高维测量数据中，物理系统的简单描述变量往往是隐藏的，特别是对于受外力驱动的系统，其响应既依赖于内在动力学又依赖于随时间变化的输入，现有方法难以有效处理这类问题。
AI.method: 提出FLARE（Forced Latent Autoencoder for Response Equations），一种强制潜变量自编码器，通过从数据中估计潜变量维度、将状态估计与外部驱动分离，学习紧凑响应坐标和稀疏输入依赖的潜变量动力学，并将方程滚动解码为完整响应。
AI.result: 在已知动力学系统、大规模应用级受迫响应和视觉观测数据上，FLARE能够恢复紧凑的受迫动力学，并在未参与训练的新输入条件下预测长时间跨度的、高维的系统响应。
AI.conclusion: 通过将学习到的坐标转化为动力学接口，FLARE将方程发现扩展到有效状态隐藏在复杂观测中的系统，为受迫动力系统中高维响应的可解释建模和预测提供了途径。

title: PHITSBench: an execution-scored benchmark for AI-assisted PHITS radiation-transport input generation using natural language
summary: We introduce PHITSBench, an execution-scored benchmark for the Monte Carlo Particle and Heavy Ion Transport code System (PHITS). PHITSBench comprises 282 transport-scorable tasks spanning three common workflow categories: parameter editing (Edit), syntax repair (Repair ), and complete simulation generation from natural-language descriptions (Reproduce). Each task is evaluated using a Composite Metric Score that combines execution success with agreement between generated and reference transport observables. Using PHITSBench, we evaluate five GPT-5.4-based configurations ranging from zero-shot prompting to knowledge-augmented and agentic workflows. Without domain-specific knowledge, the model performs well on editing and repair tasks (95% and 70% success, respectively) but fails to generate correct simulations from scratch (0% success on the Reproduce track). A structured, machine-readable PHITS knowledge catalog, supplied alongside the user manual, raises single-shot Reproduce-task success to 57%. Agentic execution provides a further improvement to 66-73%, but at increased computational cost. Failure analysis shows that the remaining errors are dominated by incorrect selection and configuration of physical observables rather than syntax generation. These results suggest that future progress in AI-assisted radiation-transport modeling will depend as much on machine-readable knowledge bases, curated domain-training datasets, and execution-grounded evaluation environments as on advances in foundation models themselves.

AI.tldr: PHITSBench是一个针对PHITS粒子输运模拟代码的282个任务的执行评分基准，涵盖编辑、修复和完整生成三类任务。无领域知识时，GPT-5.4在编辑/修复任务上表现良好（95%/70%），但完全生成任务成功率为0%；加入知识库后提升至57%，智能体工作流进一步升至66-73%。错误主要由物理观测量的配置错误导致。
AI.motivation: 现有基准缺乏针对蒙特卡罗粒子输运模拟代码的自动化评估方法，作者希望填补这一空白，为AI辅助辐射输运建模提供可量化的评测标准。
AI.method: 构建包含282个任务的PHITSBench基准，分为三类（Edit/Repair/Reproduce），采用复合度量评分（执行成功+输出与参考值的一致性）。评估GPT-5.4的5种配置：零样本提示、知识增强、智能体工作流等。
AI.result: 无领域知识时Edit/Repair成功率为95%/70%，Reproduce为0%；知识库将Reproduce提升至57%；智能体工作流进一步提升至66-73%。主要错误来源是物理观测量的选择与配置错误。
AI.conclusion: AI辅助辐射输运建模的未来进步不仅取决于基础模型，更依赖于机器可读知识库、领域训练数据集和执行环境评测环境的建设。

title: Direct Rotor Thrust Sensing and Feedback Control for Disturbance Rejection of Multirotors Using Load-cells
summary:
Gust disturbances, dynamic vertical inflow and ground effect are key adverse aerodynamic phenomena that induce variations in the forces acting on a multirotor and complicate its flight control. Miniature rotorcraft typically rely on simplified modelling of such effects to compute adjustments in thrust to counteract these forces. In the most basic case, disturbance force estimations are derived from the aircraft's motion and the generated thrust is assumed to exactly match that requested by the controller. However, such systems rely on the aircraft's trajectory to be affected before disturbances can be sensed and compensated. Numerous approaches presented over the last 15-20 years aim to reject external disturbances more quickly, but challenges remain.
  This paper presents a new approach in this category by measuring the instantaneous force of the rotors directly at the point of generation using load-cells and implementing high-speed control to accurately track the desired thrust. Measurements from load-cells were previously considered too noisy to provide meaningful input, but the experiments presented in the paper using purpose-built hardware from low-cost commodity components in single- and dual rotor see-saw models and a flying aircraft demonstrate both the feasibility and the effectiveness of the approach in the presence of complex aerodynamic phenomena.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通过载荷传感器直接测量旋翼瞬时力并实现高速控制的新方法，以应对多旋翼飞行器中的阵风、动态垂直 inflow 和地面效应等复杂空气动力学扰动。实验使用低成本组件在单/双旋翼跷跷板模型和飞行器上验证了该方法的可行性和有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖飞行器轨迹变化来感知扰动，响应较慢，需要在扰动影响飞行状态前更快速地检测并补偿干扰力。
AI.method: 在旋翼力产生点使用载荷传感器直接测量瞬时力，并实现高速控制以精确跟踪期望推力。
AI.result: 在单/双旋翼跷跷板模型和实际飞行器上验证了该方法的可行性，证明其能有效应对复杂空气动力学现象。
AI.conclusion: 过去认为载荷传感器噪声过大难以提供有效输入，但本实验证明该方法可行且有效，为多旋翼抗扰动控制提供了新途径。

title: Do Transformer Temporal Heads and Post-Pooling Motion Gates Help CorrNet-based CSLR? An Empirical Study
summary: CorrNet is a strong baseline for continuous sign language recognition (CSLR) because it models inter-frame correlations inside the visual encoding stage. In this paper, we study two natural extensions of a reproduced CorrNet system: replacing the BiLSTM temporal head with a Transformer encoder, and injecting motion cues after temporal pooling. We find that the Transformer head does not outperform the BiLSTM baseline, even with a training strategy adjusted for the Transformer, and the two heads have almost the same computational and runtime cost. For the second extension, we design a lightweight module called MotionGate. In our experiments, MotionGate consistently collapses to an identity-like mapping: the gate loses motion selectivity, and the injected residual becomes a weak, non-selective perturbation of the pooled features. These results suggest that explicit motion injection after CorrNet's correlation-based encoding is largely redundant, and that natural-looking architectural extensions in CSLR should be tested carefully instead of being assumed to help.

AI.tldr: 本文复现了CorrNet连续手语识别系统，发现两个看似合理的改进——用Transformer替换BiLSTM时序头和在时序池化后注入运动信息——均未带来性能提升，表明该领域架构扩展需谨慎验证。
AI.motivation: 探索CorrNet系统的两个自然扩展方向（Transformer时序头和运动信息注入）是否能进一步提升连续手语识别性能。
AI.method: 1) 用Transformer编码器替换CorrNet中的BiLSTM时序头，并调整相应训练策略；2) 设计轻量级MotionGate模块，在时序池化后注入运动线索。
AI.result: Transformer头未优于BiLSTM基线，两者计算开销几乎相同；MotionGate退化为恒等映射，失去运动选择性，注入的残差仅为微弱的非选择性扰动。
AI.conclusion: 在CorrNet基于相关性的编码之后显式注入运动信息是冗余的；CSLR领域看似自然的架构扩展应经过仔细测试，而非假设其有效。

title: Quota Marketplace: Dynamic Pricing for Efficient Allocation of ML Training Resources
summary:
The escalating demand for Machine Learning (ML) training resources in recent years has resulted in a substantial gap between the high demand and the available supply. Efficient allocation of these scarce and expensive resources is crucial for organizations to maximize their return on investment. Existing resource allocation mechanisms, like Karma [OSDI'23], are designed to guarantee Pareto efficiency and max-min fairness in settings with dynamic (time-varying) user demands, but fail to preserve these key properties in the presence of demands with heterogeneous values. Given the ubiquity and inevitability of heterogeneity in organizational values of different workloads, effective resource allocation policies must accommodate these variations.
  In this paper, we describe the design, implementation, deployment, and theoretical analysis of Quota Marketplace, a market-based mechanism to efficiently allocate ML training chips (like GPUs), explicitly addressing scenarios with demands of heterogeneous value. We detail the implementation of this mechanism within Google and present metrics that demonstrate its impact. We also discuss many business-critical requirements that the Quota Marketplace handles quite effectively, and document the gains and opportunities it has unlocked. We establish theoretically how this market-based approach achieves the essential properties of Pareto efficiency and max-min fairness by allowing the users to express the value of their workloads and enabling dynamic resource pricing based on supply and demand fluctuations. Ultimately, the market facilitates resource allocation that aligns with organizational priorities.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了Quota Marketplace，一种基于市场的机制，用于在异构价值需求下高效分配机器学习训练芯片（如GPU），在Google内部实现并证明了其帕累托效率和最大最小公平性。
AI.motivation: 现有资源分配机制（如Karma）在用户需求具有异构价值时无法保持帕累托效率和最大最小公平性，而组织中不同工作负载的价值异质性是普遍且不可避免的。
AI.method: 设计并实现了基于市场的配额交易机制（Quota Marketplace），允许用户表达工作负载价值，并根据供需波动进行动态资源定价。
AI.result: 在Google内部部署并展示了该机制的影响力指标，有效处理了多种关键业务需求，带来了显著的收益和机会。
AI.conclusion: 该市场机制通过让用户表达工作负载价值并动态定价，实现了帕累托效率和最大最小公平性，使资源分配与组织优先级对齐。

title: Semantic Drift and the Stability of Operator Control in Reasoning-Class Decision Support Systems
summary: The article investigates the fundamental problem of ensuring the stability of operator control and preserving goal-targeting in hybrid human-machine decision support systems (DSS) of a new generation. Based on a two-month continuous longitudinal experiment on the joint design of a monograph-format textual array, the latent phenomenon of semantic context drift in large language models of deep logical reasoning (Reasoning LLMs) is verified and described. A mathematical model of interaction in the human-machine interface is proposed, and an original metric is introduced - the operator control stability coefficient, which takes into account the non-linear contextual pressure of hidden reasoning chains. Within the paradigm of the cognitome theory, a critical point of control functions inversion is captured. Engineering recommendations are formulated for implementing dynamic relational arbitration loops based on a modified hierarchical similarity model.

AI.tldr: 本文研究新一代混合人机决策支持系统中操作控制稳定性与目标保持问题，通过两个月纵向实验验证了深度逻辑推理大语言模型中的语义上下文漂移现象，提出了人机交互数学模型及操作控制稳定性系数，并给出了工程建议。
AI.motivation: 确保混合人机决策支持系统中操作控制的稳定性以及目标保持能力。
AI.method: 基于两个月连续纵向实验（联合设计专著格式文本阵列），验证了推理型大语言模型中的语义上下文漂移现象；提出人机交互数学模型并引入操作控制稳定性系数；采用认知组学理论范式，捕捉控制函数反转临界点。
AI.result: 验证并描述了深度逻辑推理大语言模型中语义上下文漂移的潜在现象；提出了操作控制稳定性系数这一原创度量指标；捕捉到控制函数反转的临界点。
AI.conclusion: 应构建基于改进层次相似性模型的动态关系仲裁回路来应对上述问题。

title: TAC-LOCO: Unified Whole-Body Control for Quadrupedal TACtile-Informed LOCO-Manipulation
summary: Dynamic loco-manipulation requires legged robots to coordinate whole-body motion while maintaining stable physical interaction with grasped objects under uncertain external forces. While tactile sensing has been widely studied for robotic manipulation, its role in dynamic whole-body control remains largely unexplored. Existing works without tactile feedback commonly grasp firmly rather than regulate the grasp according to the interaction. We propose TAC-LOCO, a tactile-augmented unified reinforcement learning framework that encodes tactile array observations from compliant grippers into a compact latent representation and joins it with proprioception for unified control of the legs, arm, and gripper. With effective grasp stability reward design, the policy learns to simultaneously track body velocity and end-effector trajectories, moderate grasp force, and prevent object slip under both gradual load changes and sudden release events. We deploy the policy zero-shot on a Unitree Go2 with an Interbotix WidowX 250 arm and tactile gripper, demonstrating dynamic tactile-informed loco-manipulation under varying external interactions, achieving a 47% reduction in grasping force and an object drop rate of less than 1%.

AI.tldr: 提出TAC-LOCO框架，利用触觉传感增强四足机器人全身动态操控，通过强化学习统一控制腿、臂和夹爪，实现抓取力降低47%，掉落率低于1%。
AI.motivation: 现有动态操控研究缺乏触觉反馈，机器人通常采用刚性抓取而非根据交互力动态调节抓取力，导致能耗高且易掉落物体。
AI.method: 提出TAC-LOCO统一强化学习框架，将触觉阵列观测编码为紧凑隐表征，与本体感觉结合，实现腿、臂、夹爪的联合控制，并设计抓取稳定性奖励。
AI.result: 零样本部署于Unitree Go2机器人，抓取力降低47%，物体掉落率低于1%，能在逐渐加载和突然释放事件中保持稳定。
AI.conclusion: 触觉传感可显著提升动态全身操控性能，使机器人能够根据交互力主动调节抓取力，实现更安全、高效的操控。

title: Banshee: Target Switch Attacks on Gimbal-Stabilized Visual Tracking Systems via Acoustic Injection
comment: Accepted by the 47th IEEE Symposium on Security and Privacy (IEEE S&P 2026). 20 pages. Artifact: https://github.com/U1ltra/Banshee
summary: Gimbal-stabilized visual tracking is critical for modern autonomous systems such as Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs). While prior work shows acoustic signals can disturb gimbal internals, the impact of such attacks on real-world applications like UAV tracking and following remains underexplored. Existing demonstrations largely overlook practical challenges for real-world attacks, such as object-motion uncertainty and runtime latency. To bridge this gap, we present Banshee, the first physically realizable attack that induces target switching in UAV visual tracking systems by exploiting acoustic vulnerabilities in gimbal-camera systems. Banshee generates carefully crafted acoustic waveforms that induce optimized adversarial gimbal oscillations, causing directionally biased camera-view drifts that break inter-frame target associations. Consequently, the onboard tracker is driven to switch from the original target to an attacker-selected object with high probability, with occasional target loss. Banshee achieves a 93.6% success rate in simulation across two commercial gimbal systems and five trackers. Real-world benchtop and in-flight black-box attacks against a commercial drone across varied scenarios show an overall 95.5% attack success rate. Our results reveal a practical cross-domain vulnerability between acoustics and vision, highlighting the need for robust designs of gimbal systems and applications. Our code is available at: https://github.com/U1ltra/Banshee.

AI.tldr: Banshee 是首个通过声波攻击诱导无人机视觉跟踪系统发生目标切换的物理可实现攻击方法，在仿真和实机测试中分别达到 93.6% 和 95.5% 的成功率。
AI.motivation: 现有研究虽然表明声学信号可以干扰云台内部结构，但尚未在真实无人机跟踪与跟随场景中深入探索此类攻击的实际影响，缺乏对目标运动不确定性和运行时延迟等实际挑战的考虑。
AI.method: Banshee 精心设计声学波形，诱导云台产生优化的对抗性振荡，导致相机视角发生方向性漂移，破坏帧间目标关联，迫使跟踪器从原始目标切换到攻击者选定的对象。
AI.result: 仿真实验中在两种商用云台系统和五种跟踪器上达到 93.6% 成功率；真实环境下对商用无人机的黑盒攻击在多种场景下总体成功率为 95.5%。
AI.conclusion: 该工作揭示了声学与视觉之间的跨域安全漏洞，强调了云台系统及应用鲁棒性设计的必要性。

title: Spectral Origins of the Self-Correction Blind Spot in Autoregressive Generation
summary: Large autoregressive language models exhibit a self-correction blind spot: they reliably fix identical errors when attributed to an external source yet fail to fix the same errors in their own outputs. Prior work has documented this phenomenon empirically, through controlled error injection, error-depth decompositions, RL-based verifier-corrector training, and intrinsic self-verification, but offers no formal model of why generating a token suppresses the ability to detect its error, no quantitative activation condition for correction markers, and no convergence guarantee for reinforcement-learning-based self-correction. We close these gaps with SPARC, a spectral-algebraic theory of self-correction in autoregressive generation. We define the error-propagation operator as the product of per-step attention Jacobians on the residual stream and prove that the blind spot arises if and only if the spectral radius of this operator is at least one. We derive a sharp activation threshold, given as a function of the spectral radius, that a correction marker must exceed, recovering the 89.3\% blind-spot reduction observed with a simple ``Wait'' marker. We further prove that RL-based verifier-corrector training converges at a rate proportional to the squared coupling strength over the square root of the number of samples if and only if the verifier-corrector coupling matrix has spectral norm below one, and that this criterion is invariant across residual-stream autoregressive modalities, unifying text LLMs and autoregressive image and video generation. Experiments across four backbones and a visual autoregressive probe validate every theorem, with spectral predictions matching measured blind-spot rates within 3.2\% RMSE.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SPARC理论，通过谱代数分析证明自回归语言模型的自校正盲点源于误差传播算子的谱半径≥1，推导出校正标记的激活阈值，并给出RL训练收敛条件。
AI.motivation: 现有研究仅实证了自校正盲点现象，缺乏对其成因的形式化建模，也没有量化校正标记的激活条件，以及RL自校正训练的收敛性保证。
AI.method: 定义误差传播算子为残差流上每步注意力Jacobian的乘积，利用谱半径分析盲点成因；推导校正标记的激活阈值函数；基于谱范数条件证明RL训练的收敛率。
AI.result: 盲点出现当且仅当谱半径≥1；"Wait"标记可减少89.3%盲点；RL收敛当且仅当验证器-校正器耦合矩阵谱范数<1；谱预测与实测盲点率的RMSE为3.2%。
AI.conclusion: SPARC理论统一解释了文本LLM和自回归图像/视频生成中的自校正盲点，提供了可验证的定量预测和收敛保证。

title: Agentic Context Learning with Self-Discovered Specification
summary: Context learning is an emerging inference-time task where LLMs must learn and apply novel, task-specific knowledge from intricate contexts absent from pre-training; even frontier models score under 24% task success. In this work, we conduct a comprehensive empirical study to understand why this setting remains difficult. A natural hypothesis is that failures stem from content access; yet across twelve retrieval, reflection, and verification baselines on CL-Bench, an extensive context learning benchmark, we find limited gains over direct full-context prompting. Further failure analysis reveals a key finding: unlike typical long-context tasks such as long document understanding, context learning requires not only recovering local content but also acquiring local specifications that are often unspecified in the query but distributed across the context: domain-specific formats, local rules, and completeness conditions. Across all 31,592 rubric items, we find that 55.4% clearly evaluate specification acquisition, while only 22.6% evaluate content acquisition. Moreover, despite 76.7% of specifications being unspecified in the user query, 95.5% are traceable to the context, indicating these are learnable obligations rather than hidden requirements. To validate this diagnosis, we design a deliberately simple intervention PSCI (private specification-contract induction) which extracts local specifications and enforces them through adversarial checking and repair; PSCI achieves state-of-the-art 28.14% with GPT-5.1 (+5.59 pp absolute and +24.8% relative) on CL-Bench, replicated on Qwen3.5-27B (+5.28 pp) and Gemini 3 Pro (+6.17 pp). Seventeen ablations further isolate the role of task-specific specifications. Overall, our results suggest context learning hinges on not only content acquisition but also specification acquisition.

AI.tldr: 本文发现上下文学习（Context Learning）的难点不仅在于内容获取（Content Acquisition），更在于规范获取（Specification Acquisition）——即从上下文中提取那些用户查询中未明确提及但分散在上下文中的领域特定格式、局部规则和完整性条件。基于此发现，作者提出PSCI方法，通过提取局部规范并利用对抗性检查与修复来强制执行，在CL-Bench上取得了SOTA结果。
AI.motivation: 尽管已有大量研究关注长上下文任务，但前沿模型在上下文学习（一种推理时任务，LLM需从复杂上下文中学习并应用新颖的任务特定知识）上的成功率仍低于24%。作者试图通过系统的实证研究来理解为何这一设置仍然困难。
AI.method: 首先进行全面的实证研究，在12种检索、反思和验证基线方法上测试，发现相较于直接全上下文提示，改进有限。进一步失败分析揭示：上下文学习的核心挑战是规范获取。基于此诊断，设计PSCI（私有规范-契约归纳）方法，提取局部规范并通过对抗性检查和修复来强制执行。
AI.result: 在CL-Bench的31,592个评分项目中，55.4%明确评估规范获取，仅22.6%评估内容获取。76.7%的规范在用户查询中未指定，但95.5%可追溯至上下文。PSCI在GPT-5.1上达到28.14%（+5.59 pp，+24.8%相对提升），在Qwen3.5-27B（+5.28 pp）和Gemini 3 Pro（+6.17 pp）上也得到复现。17项消融实验进一步分离了任务特定规范的作用。
AI.conclusion: 上下文学习的性能不仅取决于内容获取，更取决于规范获取。提取并强制执行局部规范是提升上下文学习能力的有效方向。

title: Millimeter Wave Radar: From Synthetic Aperture to Probabilistic Mapping
summary: Robust probabilistic mapping is essential for autonomous robotic systems operating in challenging environments. While traditional sensors fail in adverse conditions such as smoke and fog, millimeter wave (mmWave) radar sensors offer reliable sensing in such conditions. However, creating accurate probabilistic maps from radar data presents significant challenges due to the inherently sparse and noisy characteristics of radio wave measurements and signal processing steps. In an attempt to address these issues, we establish a complete pipeline from raw radar signals to probabilistic occupancy maps, incorporating Synthetic Aperture Radar processing followed by a probabilistic modeling step. We conduct extensive validation across indoor environments, comparing our approach against different signal processing and probabilistic modeling approaches. We also evaluate mapping quality through downstream path planning performance analysis. Furthermore, we investigate the impact of key parameters and antenna array configuration on mapping performance. The experimental results demonstrate both the effectiveness and limitations of SAR-based probabilistic mapping for real-world robotic deployment. To facilitate future research and broader adoption, we contribute an open-source cascaded mmWave radar dataset with an accompanying GPU-accelerated signal processing pipeline available at https://github.com/rpl-cmu/rpm.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一套从原始毫米波雷达信号到概率占用地图的完整处理流程，结合合成孔径雷达（SAR）处理与概率建模，在室内环境中验证了其有效性，并开源了相关数据集和代码。
AI.motivation: 传统传感器在烟雾、雾等恶劣环境下失效，而毫米波雷达虽能应对这些挑战，但其数据稀疏、噪声大，难以构建准确的概率地图，因此需要建立完整的处理管线来解决这一问题。
AI.method: 建立了从原始雷达信号到概率占用地图的完整流水线，包括合成孔径雷达（SAR）处理步骤，随后进行概率建模，并在室内环境中通过与不同信号处理和概率建模方法对比进行验证。
AI.result: 实验结果表明了基于SAR的概率地图构建在真实机器人部署中的有效性和局限性，同时评估了关键参数和天线阵列配置对建图性能的影响。
AI.conclusion: 该工作在恶劣环境下的机器人感知方面取得了进展，提供了有效的概率建图方案，并开源了数据集与GPU加速信号处理管线以促进后续研究。

title: UniPose9D: Universal Category-Agnostic Object Pose Estimation
summary: Object pose estimation is a fundamental problem in 3D vision. Although recent state-of-the-art approaches achieve strong performance, they often overfit to existing benchmarks and exhibit limited generalization to novel categories and unseen scenes. We propose UniPose9D, a category-agnostic foundation model for 9D object pose estimation: given an instance mask/ROI and either an RGB-D observation or an RGB image with predicted depth, the model estimates rotation, translation, and metric size without category labels, CAD models, mean-shape priors, or reference views. Specifically, UniPose9D samples point pairs from the observed object geometry and uses DINOv2 and PointNet features to predict NOCS coordinates for each pair. To improve accuracy, we introduce a point-pair-based RANSAC N-hop Kabsch--Umeyama algorithm with an adaptive threshold. We further employ flow matching to address symmetric ambiguities and construct a large-scale training set by curating and aligning pose annotations from existing public datasets. Experiments across six datasets show that a single unified model can match or surpass specialist methods while generalizing to unseen objects and in-the-wild scenarios. Our code and model are available on https://github.com/qq456cvb/UniPose9D.

AI.tldr: UniPose9D是一个类别无关的9D物体姿态估计基础模型，无需类别标签、CAD模型或先验形状信息，仅通过实例掩码和RGB-D（或RGB+预测深度）输入即可估计物体的旋转、平移和度量尺寸。它结合DINOv2和PointNet特征预测NOCS坐标，引入点对RANSAC N-hop Kabsch-Umeyama算法提升精度，并用流匹配处理对称模糊性。在六个数据集上，单一统一模型可匹配或超越专业方法，并泛化到未见物体和野外场景。
AI.motivation: 现有物体姿态估计方法在基准上表现良好，但过度拟合已有数据集，对新颖类别和未见场景的泛化能力有限。
AI.method: 1) 从观测物体几何中采样点对，使用DINOv2和PointNet特征预测NOCS坐标；2) 提出点对RANSAC N-hop Kabsch-Umeyama算法，带自适应阈值；3) 使用流匹配处理对称歧义；4) 构建大规模训练集，整合和校准现有公开数据集的姿态标注。
AI.result: 在六个数据集上，单一统一模型匹配或超越专业方法，并泛化到未见物体和野外场景。
AI.conclusion: 类别无关的9D姿态估计基础模型是可行的，无需类别标签和CAD先验即可实现良好的泛化性能。

title: RUBRIC: Realism--Utility Balanced Ranking for Imbalanced Classification
summary:
Class imbalance poses a fundamental challenge in risk-sensitive applications such as fraud detection and medical diagnosis, where minority-class samples are scarce yet critical for accurate classification. Existing oversampling methods generate synthetic samples to rebalance class distributions; however, they often produce large numbers of low-quality candidates that distort decision boundaries or introduce artifacts, leading to overfitting and degraded generalization.
  In this work, we introduce RUBRIC, a generator-agnostic filtering framework that formulates synthetic sample selection as a quality-over-quantity optimization problem. RUBRIC ranks candidates using a realism-utility trade-off: realism is quantified by a learned discriminator that distinguishes real samples from synthetic samples, while utility captures proximity to the decision boundary through a concave margin-based scoring function. We show that, under mild regularity conditions, the proposed filtering strategy monotonically tightens the generalization bound for margin-based classifiers by jointly reducing distribution shift and suppressing near-negative tail contributions.
  Through extensive experiments on credit-card fraud detection and other imbalanced benchmarks, we demonstrate that RUBRIC improves F1-macro and recall while maintaining comparable ROC-AUC across several generators. We also provide explicit lambda-sensitivity analysis to show how users can recover AUPRC when ranking quality is prioritized.

AI.tldr: 本文提出RUBRIC框架，通过质量优先的过滤策略选择合成样本，在保持ROC-AUC的同时提升F1-macro和召回率，并理论证明了其泛化边界改进。
AI.motivation: 现有过采样方法生成大量低质量合成样本，导致决策边界扭曲、引入伪影、过拟合和泛化下降，尤其在风险敏感应用中危害严重。
AI.method: 提出RUBRIC框架，将合成样本选择建模为质量优先优化问题，通过真实感-效用权衡排序候选样本：真实感由判别器量化，效用通过基于决策边界的凹边际评分函数衡量，并理论证明该策略可收紧泛化边界。
AI.result: 在信用卡欺诈检测等多个不平衡基准上，RUBRIC相比多种生成器提升了F1-macro和召回率，同时保持可比的ROC-AUC，并提供了lambda敏感性分析指导用户优化AUPRC。
AI.conclusion: RUBRIC是一种生成器无关的过滤框架，通过质量优先的样本选择有效缓解了过采样带来的过拟合问题，在风险敏感场景下显著提升分类性能。

title: Exploring Agentic Workflows for Generating High Quality Math Visual Aids
comment: 13 pages, 9 figures. Exploratory course project on agentic workflows for generating and evaluating K 12 mathematical diagrams
summary: Mathematical diagrams play a crucial role in K 12 education, both as problem components and as scaffolding for student comprehension. However, current AI tools, including Large Language Models (LLMs), struggle to reliably generate accurate and pedagogically sound visual diagrams, even when provided with detailed descriptions. A significant gap therefore remains in the reliable generation of diagrams for middle school mathematics. To address this, we introduce an agentic workflow that enables LLM agents to evaluate the quality of generated visuals and use this feedback to iteratively improve their outputs. This self improvement loop aims to enhance the accuracy and educational appropriateness of AI generated diagrams. Our research investigates two questions. First, can LLMs accurately generate quality assurance questions for a visual aid given specific criteria for visual quality? Second, given valid quality assurance questions, can Vision Language Models effectively evaluate generated K 12 visual aids and use the resulting feedback to improve them iteratively? We conduct an exploratory evaluation of our agentic workflow and identify key areas for improvement, including stronger spatial reasoning and more comprehensive coverage of diagram features in the generated quality assurance questions. Our results provide preliminary evidence that this approach can improve the reliability and educational value of AI generated mathematical diagrams.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于智能体工作流的自改进方法，利用LLM生成质量评估问题，再通过VLM迭代优化K-12数学图示的生成质量，初步实验表明该方法能提升AI生成图示的准确性和教育适用性。
AI.motivation: 当前AI工具（包括LLM）在生成准确且教学合理的K-12数学图示方面表现不佳，缺乏可靠的可视化生成能力，亟需一种能自我评估和迭代改进的机制来填补这一空白。
AI.method: 设计了一个智能体工作流：1) LLM根据质量标准生成质量保证问题；2) VLM利用这些问题评估生成的图示；3) 将评估反馈给生成模型进行迭代优化，形成自改进循环。
AI.result: 探索性评估表明该工作流能初步提升图示的可靠性和教育价值，但在空间推理能力和质量保证问题的特征覆盖范围方面仍有改进空间。
AI.conclusion: 该自改进方法有望提高AI生成数学图示的可靠性和教育价值，但仍需在空间推理和质量评估的全面性上进一步优化。

title: From Non-Rigid to Rigid: Safe Acquisition of Rigid Communication Graphs under Limited Sensing
summary: Communication graph rigidity is a fundamental requirement in many multi robot formation control approaches. However, ensuring and maintaining a rigid communication topology becomes challenging in practice due to limited sensing ranges and dynamic operating conditions. This paper provides a method for achieving an inter robot collision free, rigid time varying communication graph, where communication links are established or broken according to limited sensing ranges, without assuming an initial rigid graph. In addition, the proposed approach guarantees the realization of a rigid graph for heterogeneous nonlinear multi robot systems. A computationally lean, distributed quadratic optimization-based controller is developed for a leader follower architecture, acquiring rigidity based on hierarchical second-order consensus among robots. Follower agents do not require global absolute positions of any agent, including their own. The proposed method is validated through both simulations and hardware experiments in a motion-capture environment, demonstrating reliable performance under the limited sensing capabilities of individual robots.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种在有限感知范围下实现异构多机器人系统无碰撞刚性通信图构建的方法，通过分布式二次优化控制器实现层次化二阶一致性，无需初始刚性图，并采用领导者-跟随者架构，在仿真和硬件实验中验证了有效性。
AI.motivation: 多机器人编队控制中，通信图刚性是基本要求，但实际中由于有限感知范围和动态环境，确保和维护刚性通信拓扑具有挑战性，且现有方法通常假设初始刚性图，不符合实际场景。
AI.method: 提出一种分布式二次优化控制器，采用领导者-跟随者架构，通过层次化二阶一致性获取刚性；通信链接根据有限感知范围动态建立或断开，无需全局绝对位置信息；适用于异构非线性多机器人系统。
AI.result: 通过仿真和运动捕捉环境下的硬件实验验证，该方法在有限感知能力下能够可靠地实现无碰撞的刚性时变通信图。
AI.conclusion: 该方法能有效解决有限感知范围和动态条件下多机器人系统刚性通信图的构建与维护问题，具有实际应用价值。

title: Model Guides You How to Draw: Adaptive Visual Gating for Unified Multimodal Reasoning
summary: Unified multimodal models (UMMs) with interleaved reasoning, which generate both textual and visual steps as part of intermediate reasoning traces, have demonstrated great potential for visual mathematical reasoning tasks. However, we identify a key insight in this paradigm: generating intermediate visual reasoning steps is not always beneficial and can even be harmful, as self-generated visual steps may introduce erroneous visual evidence that misleads subsequent reasoning. Moreover, frequently triggering visual steps during reasoning incurs substantial computational and memory overhead, degrading inference efficiency. To address these accuracy and efficiency challenges, we observe that the model's internal signals can indicate whether a visual step will benefit reasoning before the entire visual generation is completed. Specifically, this work identifies two internal signals: 1) Generation Intent, which reflects whether the model has a concrete textual plan for what to draw, and 2) Visual Fidelity, which measures whether the visual generation remains grounded in the original input image. Leveraging these internal signals, we propose AdaViG, a training-free adaptive visual gating method for unified multimodal reasoning. AdaViG dynamically evaluates each triggered visual step at an early visual generation stage and aborts it when both signals are weak, thereby preventing misleading visual evidence from entering the reasoning trace while avoiding unnecessary computation. Comprehensive experiments demonstrate that AdaViG improves accuracy by up to 5.7% while reducing visual generation FLOPs by 25.0%-91.0% and wall-clock latency by 15.4%-45.6%.

AI.tldr: 本文提出AdaViG方法，通过模型内部信号（生成意图和视觉保真度）在早期阶段动态判断是否生成中间视觉推理步骤，从而在统一多模态推理中既提升准确率（最高5.7%）又大幅降低计算开销（FLOPs减少25%-91%，延迟降低15.4%-45.6%）。
AI.motivation: 现有统一多模态模型在视觉数学推理中生成中间视觉步骤可能引入错误视觉证据误导后续推理，且频繁触发视觉步骤带来大量计算和内存开销，影响推理效率。
AI.method: 提出AdaViG，一种无需额外训练的自适应视觉门控方法。通过两个内部信号（生成意图：模型是否有具体的文本绘制计划；视觉保真度：视觉生成是否忠实于原始输入图像）在视觉生成的早期阶段评估每个触发视觉步骤的效用，当两个信号都较弱时中止该步骤。
AI.result: 准确率提升最高5.7%，视觉生成FLOPs减少25.0%-91.0%，端到端延迟降低15.4%-45.6%。
AI.conclusion: 证明了通过内部信号早期判断视觉步骤的效用可以有效平衡多模态推理中准确性与效率的权衡，为统一多模态推理提供了新的优化思路。

title: Estimation, Prediction, and Assortment Optimization for Markov Chain Choice Models with Panel Data
summary: We propose a framework for the Markov chain (MC) choice model with panel data, including parameter estimation, personalized choice prediction, and personalized assortment optimization. In contrast to the traditional setting, which assumes that each transaction is independently drawn from a random utility model, our framework accounts for dependencies among transactions for the same customer in historical data, captured by partial-ordering preference information. To the best of our knowledge, our framework initiates the study of choice modeling with panel data under MC. As our primary result, we propose novel expectation-maximization (EM) algorithms for MC parameter estimation by incorporating partial-ordering-based customer preference information. On synthetic datasets and the sushi dataset, our EM algorithms outperform the traditional EM algorithm of Simsek and Topaloglu (Operations Research, 66, 2018) and multinomial-logit-based partial-order benchmarks adapted from Jagabathula and Vulcano (Management Science, 64, 2018). As our secondary contribution, we present hardness and computational results for conditional choice prediction and assortment optimization problems. These results complement our estimation framework and clarify the computational landscape of conditional choice and assortment optimization, which may be of independent interest.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了基于马尔可夫链的面板数据选择模型框架，包含参数估计、个性化选择预测和分类优化，通过EM算法利用部分排序偏好信息，在合成数据和寿司数据集上优于传统方法。
AI.motivation: 传统选择模型假设交易独立同分布，忽略了同一顾客历史交易间的依赖关系。本文首次在马尔可夫链框架下研究面板数据的选择建模，以更好地利用顾客的部分排序偏好信息。
AI.method: 提出基于期望最大化（EM）的新算法，通过融入部分排序偏好信息进行MC参数估计；并研究了条件选择预测和分类优化问题的计算复杂度。
AI.result: 在合成数据集和寿司数据集上，所提EM算法优于Simsek和Topaloglu的传统EM算法以及基于多项Logit的部分排序基准方法。
AI.conclusion: 所提框架有效解决了面板数据下的MC选择建模问题，参数估计更准确，且对条件选择预测和分类优化的计算复杂性进行了理论刻画。

title: TopoExplore: Topological Discrimination for Archive-Based Exploration
summary: Archive-based exploration methods such as Go-Explore select which visited state to return to using visitation rarity, and frontier methods return to the boundary of the unknown; neither asks whether the unexplored region behind a boundary is enterable at all. Exploration is not just about finding reward - it is about collecting a structurally complete experience for downstream learning and planning. We introduce TopoExplore, which augments Go-Explore cell selection with a periodic topological pass: enclosed unexplored regions (voids) of the visited-set occupancy grid are detected by flood fill (the H1 classes of its cubical complex), and a decaying selection bonus is placed only on their strict entrances (gap or door cells), so sealed regions are never targeted and entered regions retire. On a controlled 18-environment MiniGrid suite (15 seeds, frozen hyperparameters) TopoExplore attains a 1.52x geometric-mean speedup in median steps-to-first-entry over its exact Go-Explore ablation, versus 1.37x for a frontier baseline; frontier exploration degrades when sealed decoy structure appears (0.83-1.48x on decoy environments vs. 1.65-2.11x for TopoExplore), while TopoExplore holds its largest win on hard multi-interaction doors (10.9x). We report an honest negative on Montezuma's Revenge - without wall knowledge, unreachable occupancy artifacts capture the bonus and performance degrades as it grows, isolating the wall-aware entrance test as the load-bearing component - and a preliminary positive on HM3D scanned buildings, where the speedup over Go-Explore tracks scene difficulty (r=0.69) even as frontier selection dominates blanket coverage. The evidence supports a deliberately scoped claim: topology-aware selection pays off where enclosed structure must be discriminated, and remains competitive at open coverage, where frontier methods are strongest, despite not being tuned for that regime.

AI.tldr: 本文提出TopoExplore，通过拓扑检测识别被封闭的未探索区域（空洞），仅对严格入口（门或缝隙）给予探索奖励，避免无效探索，在多项实验中取得显著加速效果。
AI.motivation: 现有基于存档的探索方法（如Go-Explore）选择访问过的状态时仅依赖访问稀有性或前沿边界，但没有判断边界后的未探索区域是否可进入。探索不仅是为了找到奖励，更是为了收集结构完整的经验用于下游学习和规划。
AI.method: TopoExplore在Go-Explore的单元格选择基础上增加周期性拓扑检测：通过洪泛填充检测已访问占位网格中的封闭未探索区域（空洞，即立方复形的H1类），仅在其严格入口（间隙或门单元）上放置衰减的选择奖励，从而避免选中密封区域，并使已进入的区域退出探索目标。
AI.result: 在18个环境的MiniGrid套件上（15个种子，固定超参数），TopoExplore相比精确Go-Explore消融实现1.52倍几何中位步数加速（首次进入），前沿基线为1.37倍；在包含密封诱饵结构的环境中，前沿探索性能下降（0.83-1.48倍），而TopoExplore保持1.65-2.11倍加速；在复杂多交互门任务上获得最大优势（10.9倍）。在Montezuma's Revenge上报告了诚实的负面结果——无墙体知识时不可达占用伪影捕获奖励，性能随其增长而下降；在HM3D扫描建筑上获得初步正面结果。
AI.conclusion: 拓扑感知的选择在需要区分封闭结构的环境中有明显优势，在开放覆盖场景（前沿方法最强处）也能保持竞争力，尽管未针对该场景调优。

title: On the Efficiency of LoRA Fine-Tuning for Vision-Language-Action Models in Industrial Robotic Manipulation
comment: 12 pages, 5 figures, 3 tables. Accepted at the International Conference on Artificial Neural Networks (ICANN 2026); to appear in Springer LNCS
summary: Deploying billion-parameter Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models on industrial hardware requires fine-tuning to bridge the embodiment gap. Full Fine-Tuning (FFT) provides maximal plasticity but requires data centre-grade GPUs. We present a systematic study of Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) for $π_0$, a flow-matching VLA, evaluated on four precision assembly tasks with a UR5e robotic manipulator. Across a sweep of LoRA ranks (r=8 to 256), allocation strategies, and component-freezing ablations, we find no statistically significant advantage of FFT over certain LoRA configurations. Performance saturates at r=32, and uniform allocation across the Vision-Language-Model (VLM) backbone and action expert proves sufficient. Freezing the VLM or restricting the vision encoder to LoRA significantly degrades performance, indicating that embodiment adaptation requires both semantic and visual plasticity. These results suggest that LoRA at r=32 with full vision encoder fine-tuning is a practical approach, reducing static peak VRAM from 36.2 to 10.8 GiB (parameters and optimizer states, activation memory excluded) without detectable performance loss.

AI.tldr: 这篇论文系统研究了低秩适配（LoRA）在π₀视觉-语言-动作模型上的微调效果，发现在UR5e机器人精密装配任务中，LoRA（r=32）能达到与全参数微调相当的性能，同时将静态峰值显存从36.2 GiB降至10.8 GiB。
AI.motivation: 将十亿级视觉-语言-动作模型部署到工业硬件上需要微调以弥合具身智能的差距，但全参数微调需要数据中心级别的GPU资源，成本过高。
AI.method: 对π₀（流匹配VLA模型）进行LoRA秩（r=8到256）、分配策略和组件冻结消融实验的系统性研究，在UR5e机械臂的四种精密装配任务上评估。
AI.result: 性能在r=32时饱和；在VLM骨干和动作专家上均匀分配LoRA足够；冻结VLM或限制视觉编码器仅使用LoRA会显著降低性能；LoRA r=32结合完整视觉编码器微调可将静态峰值VRAM从36.2 GiB降至10.8 GiB，且无性能损失。
AI.conclusion: LoRA在r=32且全视觉编码器微调的配置是一种实用的微调方法，能大幅降低显存需求而不损失性能，为工业部署提供了可行方案。

title: FlashBEV: Fast and Memory-Efficient Exact BEV Transformation with IO-Awareness
summary: Bird's-eye-view (BEV) perception is a core component of camera-based 3D understanding in autonomous driving, where view transformation (VT) maps multi-camera image features into a unified BEV representation. Sampling-based view transformation (Sampling-VT) is attractive because it supports dense and continuous BEV aggregation for high-resolution and long-range perception. Its deployment bottleneck, however, is systems-level: standard tensorized implementations of Sampling-VT -- which we refer to as Tensorized Sampling-VT -- explicitly materialize large height-dependent intermediate tensors, causing memory and latency costs that scale poorly with vertical resolution and the number of cameras. We revisit Tensorized Sampling-VT from an operator-execution perspective and show that it follows a gather-reduction pattern: each BEV query independently accumulates contributions across cameras and height bins, enabling thread-local accumulation with on-the-fly recomputation that eliminates the need to materialize height- and camera-dependent intermediates. Based on this insight, we propose FlashBEV, a fully fused and IO-aware execution strategy mathematically equivalent to Tensorized Sampling-VT (same operator output) while substantially reducing global memory traffic and kernel-launch overhead. Experiments show that FlashBEV achieves more than an order of magnitude lower peak GPU memory and significant inference-latency speedups, with memory effectively independent of the number of height bins, reducing the operator's peak memory to O(BCXY) (output only). This unlocks higher BEV range/resolution and vertical discretization within fixed deployment budgets on memory-constrained devices. Our contribution is an execution redesign -- same math, different execution -- that removes a key scalability barrier for deployment-ready Sampling-VT. Code available at https://github.com/yokosyun/FlashBEV

AI.tldr: FlashBEV是一种针对鸟瞰图感知中采样式视图变换（Sampling-VT）的IO感知融合执行策略，通过消除高度和相机相关的中间张量物化，将峰值内存从O(BCXYZ)降低到O(BCXY)，实现一个数量级以上的内存和延迟优化，且数学等价于原始算子。
AI.motivation: 标准张量化Sampling-VT在执行时显式物化了巨大的高度相关中间张量，导致内存和延迟随垂直分辨率和相机数量急剧增长，成为部署在内存受限设备上的关键瓶颈。
AI.method: 重新审视Sampling-VT的算子执行模式，发现其遵循"收集-归约"模式：每个BEV查询独立跨相机和高度bin累加贡献。基于此提出FlashBEV，采用线程本地累加与即时重计算策略，完全融合消除中间张量物化，减少全局内存访问和内核启动开销。
AI.result: 峰值GPU内存降低一个数量级以上，推理延迟显著加速，内存开销与高度bin数量解耦，算子峰值内存降至O(BCXY)。在固定部署预算下支持更高的BEV范围/分辨率和垂直离散化。
AI.conclusion: FlashBEV通过执行层面的重新设计（相同数学计算，不同执行方式）消除了Sampling-VT部署中的关键可扩展性障碍，为自动驾驶中高分辨率、长距离BEV感知的实用化部署提供了可行方案。

title: Learning Predictive Ambiguity Sets for Decision-Focused Distributionally Robust Optimization
summary: Predict-then-optimize systems usually compress uncertainty into a point forecast and then solve a downstream optimization problem as if the forecast were reliable. Distributionally robust optimization (DRO) offers protection against misspecification, but the ambiguity set is often centered at historical samples and uses a fixed radius. We propose \emph{learned predictive ambiguity sets} (LPAS): a deep contextual model outputs a finite nominal scenario distribution, a state-dependent Wasserstein radius, and optionally an anisotropic ground metric. These outputs define a contextual ambiguity set that feeds a DRO decision layer. The radius is trained by a combination of conditional quantile calibration, size regularization, and downstream decision loss, so that robustness is adaptive rather than globally fixed. We derive the finite dual form used by the decision layer, present a staged training algorithm, and evaluate the method on distributionally robust portfolio optimization with 20 S&P 500 constituents from 2018--2026. The proposed method substantially improves over equal-weight, predict-then-optimize, and historical Wasserstein DRO baselines, achieving 26.28% annualized return, Sharpe ratio 1.30, final wealth 1.61, and lower tail loss than a deep fixed-radius DRO baseline while using a smaller average radius. The results show that learned ambiguity radii can recover most of the performance of strong fixed-radius DRO while reducing unnecessary conservatism and improving regime adaptivity.

AI.tldr: 本文提出学习预测模糊集（LPAS），通过深度上下文模型输出有限的名义场景分布、状态依赖的Wasserstein半径和各向异性地基度量，实现自适应的分布鲁棒优化，在2018-2026年20只标普500成分股的投资组合优化中实现年化收益26.28%、夏普比率1.30，显著优于传统预测后优化和固定半径DRO基线。
AI.motivation: 传统的预测后优化系统将不确定性压缩为点预测，忽略了预测的不准确性；而分布鲁棒优化（DRO）虽能抵御模型误设，但其模糊集通常以历史样本为中心且使用固定半径，缺乏对状态变化的适应性。
AI.method: 提出学习预测模糊集（LPAS），利用深度上下文模型输出：①有限的名义场景分布；②状态依赖的Wasserstein半径；③可选的各向异性地基度量。半径通过条件分位数校准、尺寸正则化和下游决策损失联合训练，实现自适应鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在2018-2026年20只标普500成分股的投资组合优化中，LPAS实现年化收益26.28%、夏普比率1.30、最终财富1.61，尾部损失低于深度固定半径DRO基线，且使用更小的平均半径。
AI.conclusion: 学习模糊半径可以恢复强固定半径DRO的大部分性能，同时减少不必要的保守性并提高对市场状态的适应性。

title: Who&When Pro: Can LLMs Really Attribute Failures in AI Agents?
summary: Automated failure attribution uses LLMs to identify where and why agentic systems fail. As agents become more capable, their failures become subtler, making automated attribution increasingly important. We introduce Who&When Pro, a large-scale benchmark for automated failure attribution in agentic systems. Using a strictly controlled pipeline that injects a failure only after exactly replaying a successful prefix, we construct 12,326 failed trajectories with golden labels across 3 modalities and 26 benchmarks covering various scenarios. Beyond benchmarking, we conduct extensive experiments and analyses, revealing systematic patterns in how models attribute failures across modalities, protocols, and model families, and providing empirical guidance for future automated failure attribution systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了Who&When Pro基准，用于自动化故障归因（定位agent系统失败的位置和原因），包含12,326条带标注的失败轨迹，覆盖3种模态和26个基准，并揭示了不同模型在故障归因上的系统性模式。
AI.motivation: 随着agent系统能力增强，其失败模式变得更加微妙，手动诊断困难，因此需要自动化的失败归因方法来定位和解释失败。
AI.method: 通过严格控制的数据管线（先精确重放成功前缀再注入失败），构建了包含12,326条失败轨迹的大规模基准，涵盖3种模态和26个基准场景，并进行了广泛的实验分析。
AI.result: 成功构建了大规模基准，并揭示了模型在跨模态、跨协议和跨模型家族中进行故障归因时的系统性模式，为未来自动化故障归因系统提供了实证指导。
AI.conclusion: 自动化故障归因对提升agent系统可靠性至关重要，Who&When Pro为这一方向提供了标准化评估平台和重要实证发现。

title: ActiveFly-Bench: Aligning Embodied Question Answering with Vision-Language-Action for Aerial Embodied Perception
summary: We introduce ActiveFly-Bench, the first benchmark to bridge cyberspace reasoning and physical-world interaction for UAV embodied perception. The benchmark decomposes active perception into three hierarchical tasks: Aerial Embodied Question Answering (Air-EQA), Observation Behavior Planning (OBP), and Fine-grained Language-guided UAV Control (FLUC), explicitly connecting high-level task understanding, behavior planning, and low-level control. The datasets are collected from both real-world and simulated outdoor environments for training and evaluation. We further develop ActiveFly, a closed-loop UAV agent that integrates visual-language reasoning with fine-grained control, and deploy it on a physical UAV platform. Experiments with representative VLMs and VLA models show that current UAV agents still struggle with behavior planning, viewpoint adjustment, and robust task completion in active perception. These results establish ActiveFly-Bench as a new testbed for embodied aerial intelligence.

AI.tldr: 提出了ActiveFly-Bench基准测试，用于评估无人机在物理世界中的主动感知能力，包含三个层级任务（Air-EQA、OBP、FLUC），并开发了ActiveFly无人机智能体系统。
AI.motivation: 现有无人机研究缺乏连接高层语义理解与底层物理控制的基准测试，无法全面评估无人机在主动感知任务中的能力。
AI.method: 构建三层级任务框架（Air-EQA、OBP、FLUC），收集真实与模拟场景数据集，开发ActiveFly闭环无人机智能体并部署到物理平台。
AI.result: 当前VLM和VLA模型在行为规划、视角调整和鲁棒任务完成方面仍存在明显不足。
AI.conclusion: ActiveFly-Bench为具身空中智能提供了新的评估基准，揭示了现有模型在主动感知中的局限性。

title: Label-Free Target-Domain Adaptation for Unconstrained Event-Image Feature Matching via Dual-Stage Distillation
comment: Accepted to ACM MM 2026. The source code and benchmark will be made publicly available at https://github.com/ZhonghuaYi/nexus2-official
summary: Building pixel-level correspondence between event and image data is a fundamental task for multi-sensor systems. However, existing cross-modal matching methods are largely restricted by their reliance on either matching labels or strictly aligned hardware, which limits them to unlabeled and unconstrained real-world scenarios where neither matching ground truth nor prior sensor relationships are available. To address this, we propose a novel two-stage training paradigm. First, we leverage large-scale data to perform label-agnostic distillation pretraining, upgrading optimization objectives with distribution-based and contrastive losses to learn highly generalizable representations. Second, to tackle unlabeled and unconstrained downstream data, we introduce an epipolar-guided self-distillation framework. By utilizing consistency verification to isolate robust matches and incorporating geometric confidence derived from an external epipolar prior, our model can effectively self-evolve directly on target domains without any supervision. Furthermore, we introduce a rigorous cross-modal evaluation benchmark based on TUM-VIE, featuring physically separated cameras with distinct intrinsic parameters and resolutions. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our proposed method achieves state-of-the-art performance on both MVSEC and TUM-VIE pose estimation tasks. The source code and benchmark will be made publicly available at https://github.com/ZhonghuaYi/nexus2-official.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种无标签、无约束条件下事件与图像数据跨模态匹配的两阶段训练范式，通过标签无关的蒸馏预训练和外极引导的自蒸馏框架，在无监督情况下实现像素级对应，并在MVSEC和TUM-VIE位姿估计任务上达到SOTA。
AI.motivation: 现有跨模态匹配方法过度依赖匹配标签或严格对齐的硬件，无法应用于无标签、无约束的真实场景。
AI.method: 两阶段训练范式：1) 标签无关的蒸馏预训练，利用大规模数据和分布级/对比损失学习通用表示；2) 外极引导的自蒸馏框架，通过一致性验证和几何置信度实现无监督自演化。
AI.result: 在MVSEC和TUM-VIE位姿估计任务上均达到SOTA性能。
AI.conclusion: 提出的方法有效解决了无标签、无约束场景下的跨模态匹配问题，且引入的TUM-VIE基准为未来研究提供了更严格的评估标准。

title: A Strong Balanced-Softmax Classifier-Retraining Baseline for Long-Tailed Recognition
summary: Long-tailed recognition methods often modify losses, margins, or representations to reduce the dominance of frequent classes. We ask whether, after Balanced Softmax training, the remaining tail error can be reduced by retraining only the classifier. We evaluate BS-cRT, a two-stage procedure that trains a backbone and cosine classifier with Balanced Softmax, freezes the backbone, and updates only the classifier on balanced episodic batches. The second stage keeps the empirical-prior Balanced Softmax objective and uses raw cosine logits at inference. Across CIFAR-100-LT, CIFAR-10-LT, ImageNet-LT, and Places-LT, this classifier-only step consistently improves Few-shot accuracy over the matched Balanced Softmax checkpoint. At imbalance factor 100, Few-shot gains are +5.15 points on CIFAR-100-LT and +5.83 on CIFAR-10-LT; on ImageNet-LT and Places-LT, gains are +6.92 and +9.78 points, respectively, with a Top-1/Few-shot trade-off on ImageNet-LT.
