Agent models are drawn from a hot-swappable Expert Registry; per-agent calibration maps allow experts to be replaced at inference time without retraining. At $\sim$17B average active parameters, GRADE outperforms all baselines on GSM8K, MMLUPro, and GPQA, surpassing the strongest baseline by 4.8 points on MMLUPro at half the active compute. On AIME-2025, where model depth dominates, GRADE remains competitive to existing frameworks. Ablations isolate the hierarchy and masked cross-attention as the largest contributors to accuracy, and show that per-agent calibration is necessary for safe hot-swapping.

AI.tldr: GRADE是一个分层多智能体系统，通过四个轻量级门控机制和CoGRPO训练策略，在约17B活跃参数下以更低计算成本超越多个基准，同时支持推理时专家热替换。
AI.motivation: 现有集成方法不加区分地增加参数与推理成本，未解决三个关键问题：咨询哪些智能体、查询应深入层级多深、以及智能体间通信何时值得其开销。
AI.method: 提出GRADE系统，包含四个门控机制（智能体选择、层级深度、智能体间通信、分支剪枝），使用CoGRPO（协作组相对策略优化）训练，并引入专家注册表和每智能体校准映射支持推理时热替换。
AI.result: 在约17B活跃参数下，GRADE在GSM8K、MMLUPro、GPQA上超越所有基线，MMLUPro上比最强基线高4.8分且计算量减半。AIME-2025上竞争力相当。
AI.conclusion: 消融实验表明层级结构和掩码交叉注意力是精度最大贡献者，每智能体校准对于安全热替换是必要的。

title: GeoGS-SLAM: Online Monocular Reconstruction Using Gaussian Splatting with Geometric Priors
summary: SLAM methods based on 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) have demonstrated impressive tracking and mapping performance, but typically require additional geometric information from external depth sensors. Meanwhile, recent SLAM systems that leverage geometric priors from pre-trained feed-forward models enable real-time dense reconstruction, yet often discard original RGB information during optimization, thus degrading overall reconstruction quality. We present GeoGS-SLAM, an online monocular dense reconstruction system that combines the 3DGS-based map representation with learned geometric priors. Given uncalibrated RGB input, we first employ a feed-forward visual geometry model to predict camera and scene priors. The Gaussian scene map is then expanded by directly sampling Gaussian primitives from both RGB input and geometric priors. Camera poses and the scene map are jointly optimized through a coarse-to-fine strategy that minimizes both photometric and geometric losses. To ensure global consistency, we further incorporate online loop closure detection and pose graph optimization. Extensive experiments across indoor and outdoor benchmarks demonstrate that GeoGS-SLAM achieves superior rendering quality and tracking accuracy compared to state-of-the-art methods while maintaining online real-time performance. Project page: https://rlgao.github.io/geogs_slam.

AI.tldr: GeoGS-SLAM提出了一种结合3D高斯泼溅与学习几何先验的在线单目稠密重建系统，在无需外部深度传感器的情况下，实现了优于现有方法的渲染质量和跟踪精度，并支持实时运行。
AI.motivation: 现有基于3DGS的SLAM方法依赖外部深度传感器获取几何信息，而利用几何先验的SLAM系统在优化过程中丢弃了原始RGB信息，导致重建质量下降。为此，GeoGS-SLAM旨在结合RGB信息与几何先验，实现高质量且实时的单目稠密重建。
AI.method: 1) 使用前馈视觉几何模型预测相机与场景先验；2) 从RGB输入和几何先验中直接采样高斯原语以扩展场景地图；3) 通过粗到细策略联合优化相机位姿和场景地图，同时最小化光度损失和几何损失；4) 引入在线闭环检测与位姿图优化保证全局一致性。
AI.result: 在室内外基准测试中，GeoGS-SLAM在渲染质量和跟踪精度上均优于现有最先进方法，同时保持在线实时性能。
AI.conclusion: GeoGS-SLAM成功将3DGS表示与几何先验结合，解决了单目SLAM中几何信息缺失与RGB信息浪费的矛盾，为在线稠密重建提供了高效且高质量的解决方案。

title: Towards Autonomous and Auditable Medical Imaging Model Development
summary: Large language model (LLM) agents are beginning to automate machine learning engineering (MLE) by coupling planning, code execution, debugging, and empirical feedback. Translating this capability to medical imaging remains difficult because each task imposes modality-specific experimentation and strict requirements for validation protocols and prediction artifacts. Here we introduce AMID, an autonomous multi-agent framework for medical imaging model development. AMID first proposes Data-Conditioned Method Planning, which refines coarse task-level search spaces into executable, parallelizable method lanes grounded in task-specific data analysis and runnable medical-imaging resources. It then develops Verification-Guided Two-Stage Optimization, moving from broad early exploration of diverse method lanes to selective exploitation of promising candidates while enforcing strict verification of validation protocols, metric computation, and prediction artifacts throughout the optimization. Across 20 medical imaging challenge tasks spanning diverse modalities and prediction types, AMID outperformed evaluated general-purpose MLE systems and, on several tasks, approached or matched strong human-designed challenge solutions. These results suggest that AMID can turn task-specific medical imaging model development from bespoke manual engineering into an agentic workflow for producing high-performing and auditable model artifacts across heterogeneous tasks.

AI.tldr: AMID是一个自主多智能体框架，用于医学影像模型开发。它通过数据条件方法规划和验证引导的两阶段优化，在20项医学影像挑战任务中优于通用MLE系统，部分任务接近或达到人类专家的水平。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型智能体已开始自动化机器学习工程，但将其能力迁移到医学影像领域仍面临挑战，因为每项任务都有特定的模态实验要求、严格的验证协议和预测产物标准。
AI.method: AMID提出数据条件方法规划（将粗粒度的任务搜索空间细化为可执行、可并行的方法通道）和验证引导的两阶段优化（从广泛探索到选择性利用，全程强制验证协议、指标计算和预测产物的正确性）。
AI.result: 在20项涵盖多种模态和预测类型的医学影像挑战任务中，AMID优于评估的通用MLE系统，并在若干任务上接近或匹敌人类专家设计的解决方案。
AI.conclusion: AMID能够将特定任务的医学影像模型开发从定制化手工工程转变为智能体工作流，跨异构任务生成高性能且可审计的模型产物。

title: A Hyperbolic Neural Closure for M1 Radiation Transfer
summary: In radiation transfer simulations, an M1 method achieves substantial computational savings by replacing the full angular transport equation with a low-order moment system. Because this reduced system is not closed, a closure model is required to represent the unknown higher-order moments using lower-order moments. While machine learning (ML)-based closures can improve accuracy beyond classical analytic closures, unconstrained learned closures may produce non-real characteristic speeds and consequently cause numerical solver breakdown. To guarantee real eigenvalues of the Jacobian associated with ML closures, we propose a hyperbolic neural closure for the M1 radiative transfer system. Rather than directly predicting closure terms, we parameterize the Jacobian through two neural networks: (i) a symmetric matrix network and (ii) a strictly convex entropy network whose Hessian defines a positive definite symmetrizer. These components are combined to yield a Jacobian that is similar to a symmetric matrix, thereby ensuring real eigenvalues. The closure is then reconstructed by numerical integration of the learned Jacobian field along a prescribed integration path. Numerical experiments show that the proposed closure not only achieves higher closure accuracy than classical analytic closures, but also improves solution accuracy and remains stable in discontinuous Galerkin simulations for radiative transfer problems.

AI.tldr: 针对M1辐射传输方法中机器学习闭包可能导致非实数特征速度的问题，提出了一种通过双神经网络参数化雅可比矩阵来保证实特征值的双曲神经闭包，在提高精度的同时保持数值稳定性。
AI.motivation: M1方法用低阶矩系统替代全角度传输方程可大幅节省计算量，但经典解析闭包精度有限；而机器学习闭包虽能提升精度，但无约束的学习闭包可能产生非实数特征速度，导致数值求解器崩溃。因此需要一种既能保证实数特征值又能提高精度的闭包方法。
AI.method: 提出双曲神经闭包（Hyperbolic Neural Closure）：不直接预测闭包项，而是用两个神经网络参数化雅可比矩阵——(1) 对称矩阵网络，(2) 严格凸熵网络（其Hessian矩阵定义正定对称化器）。两者组合得到与对称矩阵相似的雅可比矩阵，保证实特征值；再沿指定积分路径数值积分重建闭包。
AI.result: 数值实验表明，该闭包在闭包精度上优于经典解析闭包，同时在辐射传输问题的间断伽辽金模拟中提升了求解精度并保持了数值稳定性。
AI.conclusion: 提出了一种可保证实特征值的双曲神经闭包方法，成功解决了机器学习闭包在M1辐射传输系统中的稳定性问题，在精度和稳定性上均优于传统方法。

title: Toward Contemplative LLM: A Modular Framework for Evaluating and Enhancing LLM Alignment in Mental Health
comment: Accepted as an oral presentation at HARMONY 2026 (Human-centered AI Research for Mental Health, an Open Networking Symposium), co-located with IEEE/ACM Conference on Connected Health: Applications, Systems, and Engineering Technologies (CHASE 2026) held in Pittsburgh, August 6, 2026
summary: Contemplative traditions have long guided ethical behavior and prosocial interaction, and recent work suggests that contemplative principles (e.g., mindfulness, compassion, non-dual reasoning) may offer a promising paradigm for aligning large language models (LLMs), improving cooperation and reducing ethical violations in LLM outputs. However, as new models, evaluation metrics, and benchmarks emerge rapidly, it remains challenging to systematically assess whether and how contemplative principles enhance LLM alignment across diverse and evolving scenarios, and existing approaches are often ad hoc and fail to generalize. We present a modular, extensible evaluation framework, initially targeted at the mental health domain, that enables seamless integration of new models, metrics, and benchmarks through a reusable pipeline. The framework currently reproduces existing state-of-the-art results and supports systematic cross-evaluation by flexibly mixing and matching models, metrics, and benchmarks, enabling fair comparison and deeper insight. Its plug-and-play prompting module offers a principled pathway for incorporating ethical perspectives such as contemplative principles, allowing domain experts to define alignment criteria without requiring technical expertise. Although initially focused on mental health, the framework is domain-agnostic and extends naturally to areas such as decision-making, moral reasoning, and human-AI collaboration. By bridging computational evaluation with human-centered ethical reasoning, this work lays the groundwork for interdisciplinary research spanning cognitive science, behavioral economics, philosophy, and system design, toward robust, trustworthy, and socially beneficial human-AI ecosystems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个模块化、可扩展的评估框架，用于系统评估沉思性原则（如正念、慈悲、非二元推理）是否及如何增强大语言模型的对齐能力，初始应用于心理健康领域，支持模型、指标和基准的灵活组合与交叉评估。
AI.motivation: 现有评估沉思性原则对LLM对齐效果的方法往往是临时性的、无法泛化，且新模型、指标和基准快速涌现，缺乏系统性评估框架。
AI.method: 提出一个模块化、可扩展的评估框架，包含可重用管道，支持灵活混合搭配模型、指标和基准，并设计了即插即用的提示模块，允许领域专家定义对齐标准而无需技术背景。
AI.result: 该框架目前能够复现现有最先进的结果，并支持系统性交叉评估，实现公平比较和深入洞察。
AI.conclusion: 该框架桥接了计算评估与人类中心伦理推理，为认知科学、行为经济学、哲学和系统设计等跨学科研究奠定基础，迈向稳健、可信且有益社会的人机生态系统。

title: Stop to Decide: Latency-Aware Proprioceptive Navigation Primitives for Mapping-Free Quadruped Inspection
comment: 30 pages, 10 figures, 8 tables. Hanting Suo and Haonan Yan contributed equally. Submitted to Intelligent Service Robotics
summary: Compute-constrained quadrupeds often run their navigation loop far below the controller's design rate: sharing the onboard Jetson Orin with the vision pipeline slows our stair loop to about 15 Hz. This latency breaks a standard proprioceptive pattern: declaring stair-summit arrival from the body-pitch signal while still climbing. On a stepped platform whose 50 cm top is shorter than the robot (Unitree Go2, about 75 cm), in-motion detection overshoots the top edge with probability rising with the per-period advance v/f (the slowest about 15 Hz cell partly diluted by a separate non-arrival mode), whereas a climb-settle cadence holds overshoot near zero at every loop rate (pooled 22/45 vs 1/45 over about 30/20/15 Hz; Fisher p about 2.4e-7; 7/15 vs 0/15 at the deployed about 15 Hz). A logistic dose-response model in v/f captures the failure; a pre-specified 40 Hz out-of-sample test favours the protocol-clean fit (33% observed vs 43%/22% predicted), giving a deployment rule (critical loop rate about 19 Hz at 0.30 m/s). The detector sits in a fully onboard, mapping-free and learning-free stack: built-in inertial measurement unit, four foot-force channels, three 1-D ranges, one line camera, chaining line-following, a three-segment maneuver for 90-degree corners in a 55 cm corridor (20/20 contact-free vs 14/20 with 12 wall contacts for in-place yaw; exit-heading error 1.56 degrees vs 5.64 degrees), and stair traversal, completing the inspection course in 18/20 trials (90%). Results are from a single course geometry, platform, and operator.

AI.tldr: 受计算资源限制的四足机器人导航循环频率远低于控制器设计频率（约15Hz），导致爬楼梯时身体俯仰信号检测到达顶部边缘失败。本文提出一种"爬升-稳定"节奏，使过冲概率在各类频率下趋近于零（约15Hz时0/15），并通过逻辑剂量-响应模型给出部署规则（临界循环频率约19Hz）。整体系统为全板载、无地图、无学习方案，在检测课程中18/20次成功完成。
AI.motivation: 计算受限的四足机器人在导航循环中因视觉管线占用资源导致频率远低于控制器设计值（约15Hz），传统的身体俯仰信号检测方法在短平台楼梯上容易因过冲而失败，需要一种新的节奏控制策略来消除过冲问题。
AI.method: 提出"爬升-稳定"节奏替代传统检测模式；构建逻辑剂量-响应模型（v/f参数）捕捉故障规律；全板载、无地图、无学习堆栈（IMU、四足力传感器、三个1D测距、一个线相机），包含线跟随、三节段90度转角机动及楼梯遍历。
AI.result: 慢速约15Hz时，传统模式过冲概率7/15，新节奏降至0/15；Fisher检验p≈2.4e-7；40Hz样本外测试验证模型预测（33%观测 vs 43%/22%预测）；部署规则：临界循环频率约19Hz（0.30m/s）；转角无接触20/20 vs 原地偏航14/20（12次墙接触）；课程完成率18/20（90%）。
AI.conclusion: 在计算资源受限条件下，采用"爬升-稳定"节奏策略可有效消除楼梯到达检测的过冲故障，且该方案不依赖地图或学习，具备实际部署价值。

title: Improving Sample Diversity in Autoregressive Text-to-Image Generation via Cluster Truncation
summary: While diffusion models achieve state-of-the-art image quality for text-to-image (T2I) generation, recent work has demonstrated that they suffer from sample diversity collapse. In this work, we investigate whether autoregressive (AR) image generation models can push the Pareto frontier between image quality and sample diversity. With recent advances in quality and efficiency, AR models have emerged as a viable alternative to diffusion-based image generation. Beyond enabling new use cases such as interleaved image-text generation, their sequential generation process makes them compatible with a wide range of token-based decoding strategies originally developed to improve diversity in text generation. Motivated by the potential of a better diversity-quality tradeoff in the AR paradigm, we present the first systematic study of sample diversity in AR image generation models. We show that two key properties of AR image generation, persistently high token-level entropy and substantial redundancy in visual token spaces, limit the effectiveness of existing token-level decoding methods for diversity enhancement. We therefore propose $p$-less cluster, a new decoding strategy that performs entropy-based truncation sampling at cluster level rather than at token level. We evaluate our approach and baseline decoding methods across four autoregressive T2I models and two datasets using a comprehensive suite of metrics spanning image quality, prompt alignment, and diversity. Our results show that $p$-less cluster unlocks the greatest diversity across most evaluated autoregressive T2I models and datasets while maintaining image quality and prompt alignment.

AI.tldr: 本文系统研究了自回归图像生成模型的样本多样性问题，发现现有token级解码方法因高熵和视觉token冗余而效果有限，提出了一种新的聚类级解码策略p-less cluster，在保持图像质量和提示对齐的同时显著提升多样性。
AI.motivation: 扩散模型虽在文本到图像生成中达到SOTA质量，但存在样本多样性坍塌问题。本文探索自回归模型是否能推动图像质量与样本多样性的帕累托前沿，实现更好的多样性-质量权衡。
AI.method: 首次系统研究自回归图像生成模型的样本多样性，识别出两个关键属性（高token级熵和视觉token空间冗余）限制了现有token级解码方法的效果，提出聚类级熵基截断采样策略p-less cluster。
AI.result: 在四个自回归T2I模型和两个数据集上，p-less cluster在大多数情况下实现了最大的多样性提升，同时保持了图像质量和提示对齐。
AI.conclusion: p-less cluster策略有效克服了自回归图像生成中token级解码方法的局限性，为自回归图像生成模型的多样性-质量权衡提供了新的解决方案。

title: Machine Learning-based Correlation of Charpy Impact Properties Between Sub-sized and Standard-sized Specimens for Nuclear Structural Materials
summary: Reliable correlations of Charpy impact test results between sub-sized and full-sized specimens are essential for structural integrity assessments, particularly in nuclear applications, where spatial constraints and limited material volume restrict specimen size. Although standards such as ASTM A370 and BS 7910 provide guidance on conversion methodologies, and numerous analytical correlation methods have been proposed in prior studies, these approaches generally have limited accuracy and their applicability is often constrained to specific materials, treatment conditions, and specimen geometries. In this study, a Machine Learning (ML)-based framework is proposed for correlating Charpy impact properties across specimen sizes. The proposed approach maps absorbed energy values across the full ductile-to-brittle transition region by applying a temperature shift combined with scaled residual projection, to align sub-sized test data with full-sized response. From the resulting temperature-energy profiles, the correlated values for upper shelf energy (USE) and ductile-to-brittle transition temperature (DBTT) are extracted by fitting data with a hyperbolic tangent model. The framework is validated using a dataset comprising 389 matched sub-sized and full-sized Charpy impact tests on SA533B steel. This ML-based approach demonstrates an improved correlation performance relative to conventional analytical methods, achieving R2 values of 0.942 for USE and 0.892 for DBTT. The trained ML models do not require access to full-sized Charpy data during inference, making this approach suitable for material surveillance programs, accelerated irradiation testing, and other applications involving small-size Charpy impact testing.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于机器学习的框架，用于关联不同尺寸夏比冲击试样的吸收能数据，在SA533B钢上取得了比传统方法更高的精度（USE的R²=0.942，DBTT的R²=0.892），且推理时无需全尺寸试样数据。
AI.motivation: 现有标准（如ASTM A370、BS 7910）和传统解析方法在关联子尺寸与全尺寸夏比冲击试验结果时精度有限，且仅适用于特定材料、处理条件和试样几何形状，亟需一种更通用、更准确的关联方法。
AI.method: 提出基于机器学习的框架，通过温度平移结合缩放残差投影来对齐子尺寸与全尺寸试样的能量-温度曲线，随后利用双曲正切模型拟合数据，提取上平台能（USE）和韧脆转变温度（DBTT）。
AI.result: 在SA533B钢的389组匹配试验数据集上，USE的R²达到0.942，DBTT的R²达到0.892，优于传统解析方法。
AI.conclusion: 该ML框架无需全尺寸夏比数据即可进行推理，适用于材料监督计划、加速辐照测试等受空间和材料量限制的应用场景。

title: LOGOS: A Living Logic for AI Agent Teams That Evolve With Humans
summary: AI agents are evolving from answer engines into persistent teams that use tools, delegate work, learn from experience, and modify the artifacts that shape their future behavior. The defining question for deployment is no longer merely what agents can do, but who controls what they are allowed to become. We introduce logos, a pluggable layer for self-evolution and governance that strengthens existing multiagent frameworks rather than replacing them. logos compiles heterogeneous multimodal inputs, including documents, images, audio, tables, databases, APIs, and human instructions into versioned agent packs containing agents, tools, knowledge, tests, permissions, and policies. During operation, it transforms agent activity into portable, auditable event traces and applies fail-closed verification across frameworks and backends. Every learned prompt, memory, skill, tool, role, or workflow remains an untrusted release candidate until held-out execution evidence, human-controlled policy, and explicit authorization permit its promotion. This architecture enables "verifiable human-agent loop engineering": agents can act, ask, learn, and propose improvements, while humans can steer objectives, permissions, approvals, and irreversible actions without interrupting continuous operation. logos provides a living logic for accountable automation. Agents may evolve at machine speed, but only evidence and human authority can close the loop.

AI.tldr: 本文提出logos——一个可插拔的多智能体自演化与治理层，通过版本化智能体包、审计追踪和故障封闭验证，实现"可验证人机环路工程"：智能体可快速学习进化，但所有变更需经证据验证和人类授权才能正式生效。
AI.motivation: AI智能体正从单纯的问答引擎演变为持续运行的团队系统，核心问题不再是智能体能做什么，而是谁控制它们被允许成为什么——需要解决智能体自我进化过程中的可控性和治理问题。
AI.method: logos包含三大核心机制：1）将多模态输入编译为版本化智能体包（含智能体、工具、知识、测试、权限和策略）；2）将智能体活动转化为可移植可审计的事件轨迹，跨框架和后台执行故障封闭验证；3）所有学习产生的提示、记忆、技能等均视为未发布候选版本，需经执行证据、人类控制策略和明确授权才能晋升。
AI.result: 实现了"可验证人机环路工程"：智能体可以行动、提问、学习和提出改进，人类可以在不中断持续运行的情况下引导目标、权限、审批和不可逆操作。
AI.conclusion: logos为自动化提供了活逻辑，智能体可以以机器速度进化，但只有证据和人类权威才能闭合环路。

title: Towards Predictive, Aligned, and Scalable Robot Learning
summary: Learning, at its core, extends beyond memorization to the ability to reason and solve novel problems by navigating a space of possibilities. We introduce Lumo-2, a latent world-action model that generates actions by reasoning over world dynamics in latent space. The learned latent world dynamics capture physically grounded visual transitions, naturally encoding future possibilities and providing a unified substrate for cross-modal alignment. This formulation enables predictive reasoning akin to world modelling while remaining lightweight and focused on physical dynamics relevant to control. Central to our approach is the hypothesis that action generation quality is governed by the geometry of the latent space. We observe that standard reconstruction-based action tokenization objectives induce representations biased toward low-level signal fidelity, leading to misalignment between reconstruction quality and downstream control performance. To address this limitation, we propose a multi-stage modality pre-alignment strategy in which action representations are progressively aligned with latent world dynamics, vision, and language. This process enforces cross-modal consistency, promotes abstraction, and induces a structured latent space for predictive reasoning. We provide a systematic empirical study of latent world modelling and modality alignment, analyzing their roles in scaling laws and out-of-distribution generalization. Results show that Lumo-2 consistently outperforms strong vision-language-action (VLA) and world-action model (WAM) baselines, with gains on challenging real-world tasks requiring temporal reasoning, physical understanding, or high control complexity, including long-horizon and dexterous manipulation. These findings suggest that structured multimodal alignment and predictive reasoning are fundamental principles for advancing embodied intelligence.

AI.tldr: Lumo-2是一种潜在世界-动作模型，通过在潜在空间中推理世界动态来生成动作。它采用多阶段模态预对齐策略，将动作表示逐步与潜在世界动态、视觉和语言对齐，从而在复杂机器人控制任务上优于传统VLA和WAM基线。
AI.motivation: 标准的基于重建的动作分词化目标会导致表示偏向低层信号保真度，使得重建质量与下游控制性能之间出现错配。作者假设动作生成质量受潜在空间几何结构支配，因此需要更好的模态对齐策略。
AI.method: 1) 学习潜在世界动态模型，捕捉物理上合理的视觉转换；2) 提出多阶段模态预对齐策略，逐步将动作表示与潜在世界动态、视觉和语言对齐；3) 通过跨模态一致性约束促进抽象化，形成结构化的潜在空间用于预测推理。
AI.result: Lumo-2在需要时间推理、物理理解或高控制复杂度的具有挑战性的真实世界任务（包括长时程和灵巧操作）上，持续优于强VLA和WAM基线。
AI.conclusion: 结构化的多模态对齐和预测推理是推进具身智能的基本原则。

title: Physics-inspired Pseudo Anomaly Generation and Prototype Feature Guidance for 3D Anomaly Detection
comment: 20 pages; already accepted by Pattern Recognition
summary: 3D point cloud anomaly detection plays a vital role in industrial manufacturing, yet it faces significant challenges due to the scarcity and high acquisition cost of real anomalous samples. The inherently anomaly-free training data further hinders detection methods from effectively learning discriminative features between normal and abnormal instances. To address these issues, we propose PA3AD, a novel framework that introduces a physics-inspired pseudo-anomaly generation strategy to create physically plausible anomalous samples from normal data. Additionally, we incorporate prototype features via a weight-sharing mechanism to guide the model in capturing the distribution shifts between normal and anomalous samples. Specifically, PA3AD introduces two key innovations to tackle the scarcity of real anomalies. First, a physics-inspired module generates diverse pseudo-anomalous point clouds from normal data via multi-physics modeling. Second, momentum-updated prototypes and a difference-aware fusion block capture stable normal representations and their discrepancies with pseudo-anomalies. This design effectively learns distribution shifts, achieving superior detection performance. Extensive experiments on the Anomaly-ShapeNet and Real3D-AD datasets demonstrate that our method consistently outperforms existing state-of-the-art approaches. Our code will be made publicly available at https://github.com/NingxiaoJian/PA3AD.

AI.tldr: 提出PA3AD框架，通过物理启发式伪异常生成策略和原型特征引导，解决3D点云异常检测中真实异常样本稀缺的问题，在Anomaly-ShapeNet和Real3D-AD数据集上取得最优性能。
AI.motivation: 3D点云异常检测在工业制造中至关重要，但面临真实异常样本稀缺且获取成本高的挑战，且训练数据本身无异常，导致模型难以有效学习正常与异常之间的判别特征。
AI.method: 提出PA3AD框架，包含两个核心创新：（1）物理启发式伪异常生成模块，通过多物理场建模从正常数据生成物理上合理的多样化伪异常点云；（2）动量更新原型和差异感知融合模块，捕获稳定正常表示及其与伪异常的差异，从而有效学习分布偏移。
AI.result: 在Anomaly-ShapeNet和Real3D-AD数据集上的大量实验表明，该方法一致优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: PA3AD通过物理启发的伪异常生成和原型特征引导机制，有效解决了真实异常样本稀缺问题，显著提升了3D点云异常检测性能。

title: Context by Distinct Information: An Auditable Dirichlet-Process Working Memory for Long, Redundant Context Streams
summary: Context engineering decides what information a model carries forward, and current designs meter it in tokens: compressing the past into a bounded recurrent state, keeping a key-value entry for every token, or imposing a fixed budget through a window or eviction rule. All three make the token the unit of memory even when the stream is redundant and the task depends on the distinct information it carries. Building on a companion mechanism paper that opens a cache slot only when an incoming key is novel, so memory scales with the number of distinct items rather than tokens, we develop that allocate-on-novelty cache as a working-memory component and organize context by how a task depends on the past: recall-carried information belongs in a content-addressed novelty cache, summary-carried information in a recurrent state, and locality-carried information in a recency window. The claim is empirical and bounded. On a matched character-level control, novelty-gated attention reaches full-attention performance while attending to about half the tokens, and coupling the cache with a state-space summary matches full-attention coupling at that reduced cost; the advantage grows as context lengthens, while a sliding window is preferable on short, locality-dominated spans. On next-code prediction over synthetic Medicare claims the coupled component leads full attention and every fixed-budget eviction policy at a thousand-event horizon, whereas cost forecasting over the same stream is summary-carried and the cache is neutral. The retained memory is an inspectable table of templates, codes, drugs, or places rather than an opaque state. The experiments are small-scale and use only public data; they establish the primitive that context can scale with distinct information rather than tokens, in a working memory that is content-addressable and auditable.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于信息新颖性分配缓存的工作记忆机制，使上下文规模与不同信息数量而非令牌数量成比例，通过将上下文按任务依赖类型（召回、摘要、局部性）分别存储在内容寻址新颖性缓存、循环状态和近期窗口中，在多个任务上实现了更高效且可审计的记忆管理。
AI.motivation: 当前的上下文工程设计（包括循环状态、键值缓存、滑动窗口）都以令牌为记忆单元，忽略了信息流的冗余性和任务对不同信息的需求，导致记忆效率低下。
AI.method: 基于伴随机制论文的新颖性门控方法，仅在输入键新颖时才开辟缓存槽位；将上下文分为三类：召回型信息存入内容寻址新颖性缓存、摘要型信息存入循环状态、局部型信息存入近期窗口。
AI.result: 在字符级控制实验中，新颖性门控注意力以约一半的令牌数量达到全注意力性能；与状态空间摘要耦合后以更低的成本匹配全注意力耦合；在长上下文场景中优势更明显；在合成医保理赔序列的任务中，耦合组件在千步长上优于全注意力和所有固定预算策略。
AI.conclusion: 上下文可以与不同信息而非令牌数量成比例扩展，构建的内容寻址和可审计的工作记忆是可行的，且具有可解释性。

title: First-Order Modal Logic in HOL: Deep and Shallow Embeddings with Automated Faithfulness (Extended Preprint)
comment: 21 pages. Extended version, with a source-code appendix, of a paper accepted at ARQNL 2026 (International Workshop on Automated Reasoning in Quantified Non-Classical Logics). The full Isabelle/HOL development is included as ancillary files
summary:
We extend, in Isabelle/HOL, the deep-and-shallow embedding methodology of our prior work from propositional to first-order modal logic (FML) with constant-domain Kripke semantics. Three embeddings of FML into classical higher-order logic (HOL) are provided side by side: a deep embedding, a heavyweight maximal-shallow embedding, and a lightweight minimal-shallow embedding. The minimal-shallow embedding is presented as an Isabelle/HOL locale, parametrised by an accessibility relation, a world-indexed interpretation, a universe of worlds, and a variable assignment; the locale form admits a global faithfulness theorem, stating that quantifying over all minimal-shallow interpretations recovers exactly deep validity.
  A central technical contribution is a mechanisation, for FML under constant-domain Kripke semantics, of the (countable) downward Löwenheim-Skolem theorem, which underpins the automation of our faithfulness proof between the deep and minimal-shallow embeddings. Deploying it inside an extension of the minimal-shallow locale resolves the surjectivity problem that arises against an uncountable domain of individuals -- where the locale's variable assignment, having countable domain V = nat, cannot be surjective onto the domain -- and thereby yields faithfulness over the full domain.
  Since prior work treats only the propositional fragment, we develop here the substitution machinery (free/bound-variable predicates, the fresh-variable function, capture-avoiding substitution, alphabetic renaming, the substitutability predicate, the substitution lemma, and size-based induction principles) needed for the first-order quantifiers.

AI.tldr: 本文在Isabelle/HOL中将深度-浅层嵌入方法从命题逻辑扩展到一阶模态逻辑（FML），提出了三种嵌入方式（深度嵌入、重量级最大浅层嵌入、轻量级最小浅层嵌入），并通过机械化（可数）下向Löwenheim-Skolem定理解决了忠实性证明中的满射性问题。
AI.motivation: 将先前工作中针对命题逻辑的深度-浅层嵌入方法论扩展到一阶模态逻辑（FML），以支持更丰富的逻辑表达能力。
AI.method: 在Isabelle/HOL中提供了三种FML到经典高阶逻辑的嵌入：深度嵌入、重量级最大浅层嵌入和轻量级最小浅层嵌入；最小浅层嵌入以locale形式参数化；机械化了下向Löwenheim-Skolem定理以解决满射性问题；开发了一阶量词所需的替换机制。
AI.result: 成功将深度-浅层嵌入方法扩展到一阶模态逻辑；通过机械化Löwenheim-Skolem定理解决了最小浅层嵌入在不可数个体域上的满射性问题，实现了全域上的忠实性；开发了完整的替换机制基础设施。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为FML的形式化验证提供了灵活高效的嵌入方案选择，且最小浅层嵌入的locale形式具有全局忠实性定理，量化所有最小浅层解释可恢复深度有效性。

title: CR-Solver: GPU-Accelerated Kinematics Solver for Tendon-driven Continuum Robots
summary: Continuum robots provide intrinsic compliance, high dexterity, and safe physical interaction, enabling navigation and manipulation in confined and unstructured environments. Despite recent advances in sensing and control, heightening the need for precise motion generation, most widely used planning libraries are grounded in rigid-body assumptions, creating a critical gap for fast and practical tools for continuum robots. To address this, we present CR-Solver, a two-stage, optimization-based solver for the motion generation of tendon-driven continuum robots. Our method unifies inverse kinematics, path following, and trajectory planning within a single constrained nonlinear optimization framework. Leveraging GPU-accelerated parallel optimization, CR-Solver delivers fast, accurate, and constraint-aware solutions. We validate our approach on three tasks, demonstrating significant speedups over traditional CPU-based solvers while achieving a consistently high success rate above 95% and millimeter-level accuracy. The solver is implemented in pure Python, reducing the barrier to adoption and offering a practical, extensible foundation for continuum robots' high-performance motion planning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CR-Solver，一种基于GPU加速的两阶段优化求解器，用于腱驱动连续体机器人的运动生成，统一了逆运动学、路径跟踪和轨迹规划，在三个任务中实现了95%以上的成功率和毫米级精度，且纯Python实现降低了使用门槛。
AI.motivation: 现有运动规划库大多基于刚体假设，缺乏针对连续体机器人的快速实用工具，难以满足其高精度运动生成需求。
AI.method: 提出CR-Solver，一种两阶段优化求解器，将逆运动学、路径跟踪和轨迹规划统一到约束非线性优化框架中，并利用GPU加速并行优化。
AI.result: 在三个任务上验证，相比传统CPU求解器显著加速，成功率稳定在95%以上，达到毫米级精度。
AI.conclusion: CR-Solver以纯Python实现，降低了采用门槛，为连续体机器人高性能运动规划提供了实用且可扩展的基础。

title: Quantum Compressed Sensing CT Reconstruction Algorithm Based on Penalized Weighted Least Squares and Guided Total Variation
summary: Objective. Existing quadratic unconstrained binary optimization (QUBO)-based sparse-view computed tomography (CT) reconstruction neglects photon-counting statistics and anatomical heterogeneity. We address both limitations within the QUBO framework.Approach. We propose a quantum compressed-sensing CT method combining penalized weighted least squares (PWLS) and guided total variation (GTV). PWLS weights projection residuals by photon-count reliability, whereas GTV uses gradients from a prior image reconstructed by the simultaneous algebraic reconstruction technique (SART) to preserve edges and suppress noise in homogeneous regions. After binary encoding, both terms form a unified QUBO model. Experiments used four 40 times 40 CT images under a 10-view fan-beam geometry with Poisson noise. Comparisons included conventional reconstruction methods, QUBO variants, gradient descent, simulated annealing, and a D-Wave hybrid quantum-classical solver.Main results. PWLS-GTV achieved the best reconstruction quality across all cases. In the representative chest case, it reached a peak signal-to-noise ratio (PSNR) of 36.64 dB, compared with 22.48 dB for SART, the best conventional baseline. GTV consistently outperformed conventional total variation. Simulated annealing and the D-Wave hybrid solver produced similar reconstructions, whereas gradient descent was ineffective. Repeated hybrid-solver runs showed stable performance.Significance. The framework incorporates photon-statistical weighting and structure-guided regularization into QUBO-based CT reconstruction without changing its quadratic form, providing a proof of concept for quantum-assisted sparse-view CT reconstruction.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于QUBO框架的量子压缩感知CT重建方法（PWLS-GTV），通过融合加权最小二乘（考虑光子计数统计）和引导全变分（利用先验图像梯度保持边缘），在稀疏视角、低剂量条件下显著优于传统方法，在胸部试验中PSNR达到36.64 dB（传统SART仅22.48 dB），验证了量子辅助CT重建的可行性。
AI.motivation: 现有基于QUBO的稀疏视角CT重建忽略了光子计数统计特性（即不同投影数据的可靠性差异）和解剖结构的异质性（即不同区域的边缘和均匀性需求不同），作者旨在QUBO框架内同时解决这两点局限。
AI.method: 提出PWLS-GTV方法：PWLS项通过光子计数可靠性加权投影残差，GTV项使用SART重建的先验图像梯度来引导正则化，在保持边缘的同时抑制均匀区域噪声。两项经二进制编码后统一为QUBO模型。使用40×40图像、10视角扇束几何，加入泊松噪声进行实验。
AI.result: PWLS-GTV在所有测试案例中重建质量最佳。胸部案例中PSNR达36.64 dB，远超最佳传统基线SART（22.48 dB）。GTV始终优于传统全变分。模拟退火与D-Wave混合求解器结果相似，梯度下降效果差，混合求解器多次运行性能稳定。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在不改变二次型的前提下，将光子统计加权和结构引导正则化融入QUBO框架，为量子辅助稀疏视角CT重建提供了概念验证。

title: Pitfalls of Administrative Censoring in Survival Models with Time-Indexed Inputs
summary: Survival models can model time-to-event outcomes using partially observed data. They are widely used in clinical prediction, including cancer risk, disease progression, treatment response, and mortality. Recent models often rely on rich inputs collected at a specific clinical encounter, such as medical images, laboratory tests, electronic health record snapshots, or sensor measurements. In large retrospective datasets, these inputs are usually collected over many calendar years. As a result, they may contain clues about when they were acquired through changes in devices, protocols, documentation, patient mix, or clinical practice. This creates a potential failure mode when outcomes are observed only up to a fixed study end date. More recent records necessarily have less potential follow-up than older records. A model that can infer the record date from the input may therefore learn to predict how much follow-up was available rather than the patient's true risk of experiencing the event. We call this failure mode administrative-cutoff leakage. In this paper, we characterize when this leakage can occur, distinguish it from classical informative censoring and genuine temporal changes in risk, and propose practical ways to detect it. In simulations, we show that administrative-cutoff leakage can inflate fixed-horizon AUC and can also affect Harrell's C-index under realistic follow-up patterns. We then demonstrate the same behavior in a real mammography cohort. These results motivate a simple design principle for survival prediction: for an n-year prediction task, the dataset should provide at least n years of potential follow-up after the latest input date. Otherwise, the models may be subject to bias induced by administrative-cutoff leakage.

AI.tldr: 本文提出并系统分析了生存预测模型中的“行政截断泄漏”问题：当模型输入包含采集时间线索且结局仅观察到固定截止日期时，模型可能学会预测随访时长而非真实风险。通过模拟和真实数据验证了该偏差会高估模型性能，并提出了至少需要n年随访的设计原则。
AI.motivation: 现有生存预测模型在回顾性数据中，输入数据跨越多年采集，可能隐含时间线索。模型若学会识别输入的时间信息，可能错误地预测剩余随访时长而非事件风险，导致性能虚高。作者旨在揭示、检测并防止这一被忽视的偏差。
AI.method: 1. 理论刻画行政截断泄漏的发生条件，区别于经典信息删失和时变风险。2. 通过模拟实验展示泄漏对固定时间AUC和Harrell's C-index的影响。3. 在真实乳腺X光队列中验证同样现象。4. 提出简单设计原则：对n年预测任务，需确保最新输入数据后有至少n年随访。
AI.result: 模拟实验表明行政截断泄漏会虚增固定时间AUC，且在现实随访模式下也会影响C-index。真实乳腺X光队列数据复现了该偏差。
AI.conclusion: 行政截断泄漏是生存预测中的潜在严重偏差，遵循“n年预测需至少n年随访”的设计原则可有效避免该问题。

title: SETA: Scaling Environments for Terminal Agents
summary: Large language models (LLMs) are rapidly shifting toward agents that solve tasks through diverse interfaces, including web and graphical user interfaces (GUIs). Among these, the terminal command line provides a text-based, general-purpose interface, covering tasks from system operations to data science and machine learning. However, scaling terminal-agent training remains challenging, as it requires diverse and coherent task instructions, executable environments, and reliable verification, while lacking naturally grounded supervision data. In this work, we propose SETA, a scalable framework for generating verifiable terminal environments for reinforcement learning (RL). The framework consists of two pipelines sharing a unified verification mechanism: SETA-Synth converts diverse sources into standardized RL environments, and SETA-Evol further expands from existing environments with adaptive control of difficulty and diversity. Together, we construct and release SETA-Env, the largest open-source verifiable terminal RL dataset to date, containing over 4,500 environments. We evaluate our dataset by training Qwen3-8B with GRPO on SETA-Env, achieving 12% pass rate on Terminal-Bench 2.0, the best reported result for an RL-trained model at the 8B scale. We further observe gains on DeepSeek-V4-Flash under the same terminal agent harness, with pass@1 on Terminal-Bench 2.0 improving from 40% to 43% and pass@5 improving from 54% to 58%. These results demonstrate that SETA- Env provides high-quality training environments for terminal agents and serves as a valuable resource for advancing research on terminal-based agent learning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SETA框架，用于生成可验证的终端环境以训练强化学习智能体。构建了包含4500+环境的SETA-Env数据集，训练Qwen3-8B在Terminal-Bench 2.0上达到12%通过率，为8B规模RL模型最佳结果；同时使DeepSeek-V4-Flash的pass@1从40%提升至43%。
AI.motivation: 终端命令行是文本化、通用的接口，覆盖从系统操作到数据科学等多种任务，但扩展终端智能体训练面临指令多样性不足、可执行环境缺乏、验证机制不可靠等挑战，且缺乏自然标注数据。
AI.method: 提出SETA框架，包含两个共享统一验证机制的pipeline：SETA-Synth将多样化数据源转化为标准RL环境，SETA-Evol通过自适应难度和多样性控制从现有环境扩展生成新环境。
AI.result: 构建了SETA-Env数据集（4500+环境）；训练Qwen3-8B在Terminal-Bench 2.0上达到12%通过率（8B规模RL模型最佳）；DeepSeek-V4-Flash在相同终端框架下pass@1从40%提升至43%，pass@5从54%提升至58%。
AI.conclusion: SETA-Env为终端智能体提供了高质量的训练环境，是推动终端智能体学习研究的重要资源。

title: A Glimpse into Long-term Physical Coexistence with Intelligent Robots
summary: Long-term physical coexistence with intelligent robots requires more than capable robot policies. A persistent robotic assistant must support diverse user-facing interfaces, maintain long-horizon memory of people and preferences, coordinate across robot embodiments, and translate human intent into safe physical execution. We introduce PHILIA, a multi-robot agent built around a robot gateway abstraction. PHILIA retains the rich interaction and tool ecosystem of OpenClaw while exposing robot-local runtimes, onboard perception, navigation, speaker, and robot policies through a unified capability interface. This design decouples low-frequency, high-semantic agent reasoning from high-frequency, low-level robot execution, enabling plug-and-play integration of user interfaces, robot embodiments, and policy backends. As a result, the user experience becomes compositional: advances in user interfaces, robot embodiments, robot policies, navigation, or interaction algorithms can improve the overall experience without redesigning the system. We validate the architecture on Astribot S1 robots while designing the robot gateway contract to support future heterogeneous robot platforms through a shared capability interface for observation, task execution, navigation, speech playback, status monitoring, and task cancellation. We present representative use cases in which agent memory and scene understanding are grounded in robot actions. These span interactive household scenarios, ranging from simple organization to challenging long-horizon and dexterous service tasks, such as packing a backpack and lifting a garbage bag. We highlight the human-robot interaction flow, where contextual understanding of user intent and preferences, together with human-in-the-loop confirmation or adjustment during execution, is essential for effective assistance.

AI.tldr: PHILIA是一个基于机器人网关抽象的多智能体机器人系统，通过解耦高层语义推理与底层物理执行，支持多种用户界面、机器人本体和策略后端的热插拔集成，在Astribot S1上验证了其在长时域家务任务中的有效性。
AI.motivation: 长期与智能机器人物理共存需要超越单一机器人策略的能力，现有系统缺乏统一接口来整合多样化用户界面、跨机器人记忆和长时域任务执行。
AI.method: 提出PHILIA架构，核心是机器人网关抽象层，统一暴露感知、导航、扬声器和机器人策略等能力接口，将低频高层推理与高频底层执行解耦，实现用户界面、机器人本体和策略后端的热插拔组合。
AI.result: 在Astribot S1机器人上验证了架构有效性，展示了从简单整理到复杂长时域灵巧服务任务（如打包背包、提起垃圾袋）的多种交互场景。
AI.conclusion: PHILIA通过组合式设计使各模块的进步能自动提升整体体验，无需重新设计系统，为未来异构机器人平台的融合提供了可行路径。

title: Why Domain Matters: Domain-Aware Benchmarking of Underwater Object Detection and Annotation Quality
summary: Underwater object detection is strongly affected by domain shift, where performance can vary significantly across different locations, habitats, and deployment conditions. However, detector performance is typically evaluated using aggregate metrics that hide failures in specific environments, while existing domain generalization benchmarks often rely on synthetic variations that do not reflect real-world conditions. We introduce a framework that characterizes underwater images by appearance, scene composition, and acquisition geometry to assign domain labels. Using this framework, we perform the first systematic study of how domain factors influence both human annotation quality in underwater object detection datasets and deep learning-based detector performance, revealing substantial domain-dependent discrepancies. By incorporating physically meaningful domain labels, domain shift becomes something we can characterize, measure, benchmark, and act on. We highlight how this can be used to guide data collection and annotation, design more informative benchmarks, and assess detector robustness across diverse underwater environments.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的水下目标检测领域迁移分析框架，通过定义外观、场景构成和采集几何三个维度来标记域标签，系统研究了域因素对人类标注质量和检测器性能的影响，并展示了如何利用这些物理域标签来指导数据收集、标注和基准测试设计。
AI.motivation: 现有水下目标检测评估使用聚合指标掩盖了不同环境下的性能差异，且域泛化基准多依赖不反映真实世界条件的合成变化，缺乏对真实域迁移的系统性研究。
AI.method: 提出一个通过外观、场景构成和采集几何三个维度对水下图像进行域标签标注的框架，并基于此框架系统分析域因素对人类标注质量和深度学习检测器性能的影响。
AI.result: 发现域因素会导致标注质量和检测器性能出现显著的域依赖性差异，域迁移是可表征、可测量、可基准化、可应对的。
AI.conclusion: 该框架可用于指导数据收集与标注、设计更具信息量的基准测试，以及评估检测器在不同水下环境中的鲁棒性。

title: Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Physics: Post-training LLMs with Continuous Rewards
summary: Partial differential equations (PDEs) are foundational to modeling in science and engineering, but constructing reliable numerical solvers remains labor-intensive, demanding expert knowledge of discretization schemes, stability conditions, and boundary treatments. Recent work has begun to frame PDE solving as a code-generation task for large language models (LLMs), yet existing approaches operate primarily at inference time: relying on prompting, debugging, self-refinement, and test-time scaling rather than adapting the model itself. In parallel, reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards has emerged as a post-training paradigm for code and math reasoning, but its verifiers are typically binary: a compiler runs, or a test passes. Such signals discard the graded structure of scientific correctness, where two solvers may both execute and yet differ in solution accuracy by orders of magnitude. In this work, we introduce RLVP: Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Physics, an RL post-training framework for multi-PDE solver code generation. RLVP addresses this verifiability gap with a hybrid verifier: hard program-validity checks ensure executability, while continuous physics rewards score function-space accuracy and PDE-residual consistency. A single policy is post-trained across diverse PDE families spanning hyperbolic, parabolic, elliptic, and incompressible-flow systems. RLVP improves over both pre-trained and supervised-only baselines on PDE benchmarks, and shows zero-shot improvement transfer to held-out PDEs. We show that a smaller LLM post-trained with RLVP can outperform prompting a frontier model on in-distribution PDE solver generation. The trained policy shows evidence of compositionality in numerical motifs: it recombines stencils, time-stepping schemes, and boundary-handling primitives learned from the PDEs used in training into generated solvers for unseen PDE problems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出RLVP框架，利用混合验证器（硬性可执行性检查+连续物理奖励）对LLM进行强化学习后训练，使其能自动生成多类PDE求解器代码，在多个PDE基准上超越基线模型，并展现出数值基元的组合泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM求解PDE的方法主要依赖推理时提示、调试和自优化，未对模型本身进行适配；同时，强化学习中二元验证器（编译通过/测试通过）无法捕捉求解器数值精度的连续差异，导致科学正确性的细粒度信号被丢弃。
AI.method: 提出RLVP框架，采用混合验证器：(1) 硬性程序有效性检查确保代码可执行；(2) 连续的物理奖励信号评估函数空间精度和PDE残差一致性。在双曲、抛物、椭圆和不可压缩流等多类PDE族上对单一策略进行后训练。
AI.result: RLVP在PDE基准上超越预训练和监督微调基线，对未见PDE问题表现出零样本迁移改进；较小LLM经RLVP后训练可超越前沿模型的提示方法；训练后的策略展现了数值基元（模板、时间步进方案、边界处理）的组合重用于泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 通过引入表达物理连续正确性的混合验证器进行强化学习后训练，可显著提升LLM生成PDE求解器的代码质量与泛化能力，为科学机器学习中代码生成提供了新的范式。

title: Incremental Transformer for Surrogate-Based Inverse Design of Geopolymer Mixtures
summary: Small-data inverse design is challenging in engineering informatics when observations are heterogeneous, mixed-type, and constrained by physical relations among design variables. This work proposes a topology-aware surrogate framework guided by an Incremental Transformer (INCRT) for physics-constrained inverse design, applied to geopolymer mixture design. The method integrates intrinsic-dimensionality analysis, mixed-variable design-space representation, tabular surrogate prediction, INCRT-based manifold rationalisation, and constrained inverse optimisation. Using a public benchmark of fly-ash and slag-based geopolymer concrete mixtures with compressive-strength and carbon-emission targets, the high-dimensional design space proves strongly redundant, organising around fewer effective mixture regimes. Compressive strength requires nonlinear tabular surrogates, while carbon emission is largely determined by composition and well recovered by regularised linear models. INCRT thus acts not as a replacement for tabular predictors but as a rationalisation layer providing prototype regimes and a manifold-support score for inverse design. Three strategies are compared: unconstrained surrogate optimisation, physics-constrained optimisation, and topology-aware physics-constrained optimisation. Unconstrained optimisation can match target strength but may yield physically invalid or off-manifold candidates; physics-only constraints do not always ensure data support. The topology-aware strategy yields candidates balancing target compliance, carbon reduction, physical admissibility, and proximity to the learned feasible manifold. The framework aims not to replace experimental validation but to support screening of credible candidate mixtures from small, mixed, physically constrained engineering datasets.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于增量Transformer（INCRT）的拓扑感知代理框架，用于小数据、异构、混合类型且受物理关系约束的逆向设计，在粉煤灰-矿渣基地聚合物混凝土配合比设计中验证了其有效性。
AI.motivation: 工程信息学中，小数据逆向设计面临观测数据异构、类型混合、设计变量间存在物理关系约束等挑战，现有方法难以处理此类复杂场景。
AI.method: 集成内在维度分析、混合变量设计空间表示、表格代理预测、INCRT流形合理化及约束逆向优化；INCRT作为合理化层提供原型机制和流形支持分数，而非替代表格预测器。
AI.result: 无约束优化可能产生物理无效或偏离流形的候选方案；仅物理约束不能保证数据支持；拓扑感知策略能在目标符合、碳减排、物理可接受性和流形接近性之间取得平衡。
AI.conclusion: 该框架旨在从小型、混合、物理约束的工程数据中筛选可信候选配合比，辅助而非替代实验验证。

title: From Sketch Prior to Trajectories: A Mission-Oriented Coordinated Navigation Framework for Indoor UAV Swarm
summary: UAV swarm for applications, such as indoor inspection, security patrol, and logistics delivery, are often mission-oriented rather than exploration-oriented. In these tasks, UAVs are required to visit task-relevant regions in a prescribed sequence, and such region-level mission information can often be obtained from pre-deployment sketch-map priors, such as floor plans, CAD layouts, or evacuation diagrams. Although these tasks are executed in three-dimensional space, UAVs usually fly within a specific altitude layer or a nearly fixed altitude range on each floor, making mission-level region transitions mainly governed by planar connectivity. Based on these observations, this paper proposes a mission-oriented coordinated navigation framework that exploits sketch-map priors for multi-UAV indoor operations. Onboard observations are used to perform topological alignment, and the aligned prior is fused with online observations to construct a mission-oriented traversability representation. A layered 2D--3D coordinated navigation framework is further developed, where 2D guided path planning generates mission-oriented guide paths and guide-driven 3D trajectory optimization produces dynamically feasible and collision-free trajectories. Simulation and real-world experiments validate the effectiveness of the proposed framework in structured multi-room indoor environments and further demonstrate its coordinated navigation capability under both communication-available and communication-loss conditions. Multi-floor simulation results show the scalability of the system to layered indoor structures.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于草图先验的任务导向多无人机室内协同导航框架，通过拓扑对齐和分层2D-3D协同规划，实现指定序列访问任务，并在通信可用/丢失条件下均有效。
AI.motivation: 多无人机在室内执行任务导向型应用（如巡检、巡逻、物流）时，需要按预定顺序访问任务区域，且室内环境具有平面连通性和固定高度层特征，现有方法缺乏对草图先验的有效利用。
AI.method: 1) 利用机载观测进行拓扑对齐；2) 融合对齐先验与在线观测构建任务导向的可通行性表示；3) 提出分层2D-3D协同导航框架：2D引导路径规划生成任务导向路径，3D轨迹优化生成动态可行且无碰撞轨迹。
AI.result: 仿真和实际实验在结构化多房间室内环境中验证了有效性，展示了在通信可用和通信丢失条件下的协同导航能力，多层仿真结果展示了系统对分层室内结构的可扩展性。
AI.conclusion: 所提框架能够有效利用草图先验实现多无人机室内任务导向的协同导航，具备鲁棒性和可扩展性。

title: DiffUE: Enhancing Utility-Unlearnability Trade-off of Unlearnable Examples via Diffusion Autoencoders
comment: To appear at the European Conference on Computer Vision (ECCV), 2026
summary: AI models are increasingly trained on personal images scraped from social media and public platforms, often without consent, leading to serious privacy violations, such as unauthorized facial recognition and targeted advertising. To counter this, researchers have developed unlearnable examples (UEs), images modified with imperceptible noise to prevent AI models from extracting meaningful information. However, existing UE methods primarily rely on pixel-space noise, which can be bypassed by relearning strategies such as adversarial training, image transformation, and compression. While some techniques improve robustness, they often come at the expense of significant degradation in image utility and perceptual quality. In this paper, we introduce DiffUE to overcome these limitations by injecting noise into the semantic space of images instead of the pixel space. Instead of corrupting pixel values, DiffUE modifies high-level semantic features of images, ensuring robust unlearnability while preserving visual quality and utility. By leveraging a diffusion-based autoencoder framework to manipulate semantic features, DiffUE generates purposeful, natural-looking modifications that effectively resist advanced relearning strategies. Extensive experiments on four datasets, CIFAR-10, CIFAR-100, CelebA-HQ, and ImageNet, as well as a subjective user study, demonstrate that DiffUE significantly enhances the trade-off between image quality and unlearnability, offering a more robust and effective solution for safeguarding personal data in an increasingly exploitative AI landscape.

AI.tldr: 本文提出DiffUE方法，通过在语义空间而非像素空间注入噪声生成不可学习样本，在保持图像质量和实用性的同时，有效抵抗高级重学习策略，实现了更好的隐私保护效果。
AI.motivation: 现有不可学习样本方法主要依赖像素级噪声，容易被对抗训练、图像变换和压缩等重学习策略绕过，且提升鲁棒性往往导致图像质量和实用性严重下降。
AI.method: DiffUE利用基于扩散的自编码器框架，将噪声注入到图像的高层语义特征空间中，而非传统的像素空间，生成自然、有目的的图像修改。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10、CIFAR-100、CelebA-HQ和ImageNet四个数据集上的实验以及主观用户研究表明，DiffUE显著提升了图像质量与不可学习性之间的权衡。
AI.conclusion: DiffUE提供了一种更鲁棒、更有效的个人数据保护方案，能够在日益具有剥削性的AI环境中有效保护个人隐私。

title: ARMOR: Stabilizing On-Policy LLM RL with Off-Policy Anchor Samples
summary: Reinforcement learning (RL) has significantly enhanced the reasoning capabilities of large language models (LLMs), yet the training process remains notoriously fragile. In this work, we investigate a critical source of this instability: over-optimization, where models exploit training heuristics at the expense of generalizable reasoning. While reverse KL regularization is the standard defense against such degradation, our analysis reveals that it is often insufficient in this regime, as it fails to ensure comprehensive coverage of the reference distribution. To address this, we propose ARMOR (Anchor Rollout and Mixed Optimization for RL), a framework that shifts the paradigm from passive penalty to active sample stabilization. ARMOR comprises two key components: (1) Anchor Rollout, which leverages off-policy data from the reference policy to preserve established solution patterns; and (2) Mixed Optimization, which reformulates the policy objective to enable controlled exploration without relying on auxiliary losses. Extensive experiments on reasoning benchmarks validate that ARMOR effectively mitigates validation collapse, enabling sustained performance improvements over extended training horizons.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ARMOR框架，通过锚点回放和混合优化机制解决强化学习训练大语言模型时的过优化和不稳定问题，有效缓解验证集性能崩溃并实现持续提升。
AI.motivation: 强化学习训练大语言模型过程中存在不稳定性，核心原因是过优化（模型利用训练启发式而牺牲泛化推理能力），且传统的反向KL正则化不足以确保对参考分布的充分覆盖。
AI.method: 提出ARMOR框架，包含两个组件：(1) Anchor Rollout——利用参考策略的离线数据保存已建立的解决方案模式；(2) Mixed Optimization——重构策略目标函数，在不依赖辅助损失的情况下实现受控探索。
AI.result: 在推理基准上的大量实验验证了ARMOR能够有效缓解验证集性能崩溃，在更长的训练周期内实现持续的性能提升。
AI.conclusion: ARMOR通过从被动惩罚转向主动样本稳定化，有效解决了RL训练LLM中的过优化问题，为提升推理能力提供了更稳定的训练范式。

title: Learning Linear Temporal Specifications from Demonstrations with Uncertainty
comment: This paper has been accepted by the ACC2026 (American Control Conference)
summary: Learning temporal logic specifications from system demonstrations is essential for tasks such as formal verification and controller synthesis, especially in safety-critical domains. Existing approaches typically assume demonstrations are correct or only affected by misclassification errors. In practice, however, system traces are often uncertain or incomplete due to sensor faults, measurement errors, or data loss. We present a framework for learning minimal Linear Temporal Logic (LTL) formulas from demonstrations with uncertainty. Our approach models uncertainty via Hamming distance to generate possible estimates around each observed trace, which are grouped with constraints requiring that at least one trace per group is consistent with the learned formula. Our problem is then reduced to an equivalent Pseudo-Boolean Optimization. We evaluate our method against state-of-the-art LTL learning approaches and show that it recovers specifications that more closely align with ground-truth formulas under uncertainty.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种从不确定性演示中学习最小线性时序逻辑公式的框架，通过汉明距离建模不确定性，并将其转化为伪布尔优化问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法假设系统演示是正确或仅受分类错误影响，但实际中系统轨迹常因传感器故障、测量误差或数据丢失而存在不确定性和不完整性，因此需要一种能处理不确定性演示的LTL学习方法。
AI.method: 利用汉明距离为每条观测轨迹生成可能估计，将轨迹分组并约束每组至少有一条与所学公式一致，最终将问题转化为等价的伪布尔优化问题。
AI.result: 与最先进的LTL学习方法相比，该方法在不确定性条件下能恢复出更接近真实标注的规范。
AI.conclusion: 该框架有效处理了演示数据中的不确定性，能学习到更准确的时序逻辑规范。

title: WALA Learning Executable Latent Actions from Action-Labeled Demonstrations and Action-Free Videos
summary: Generalizable robot policies typically rely on action-labeled robot demonstrations, which are expensive to collect and difficult to scale. In contrast, large-scale human and robot videos contain rich physical interactions but often lack executable robot action labels. We present WALA, a framework for learning executable latent actions from both action-labeled demonstrations and action-free videos. WALA first pretrains a semantic-geometric latent action model from videos by modeling the evolution between current observations and sparsely sampled future observations. Instead of reconstructing raw pixels, WALA predicts future deltas in the DINOv3 feature space and dense depth space, preserving task-relevant semantic and geometric structure while reducing sensitivity to appearance details. During policy training, the pretrained encoder provides stable latent action targets, and the decoder serves as a trainable latent world model. The latent actions generated by the vision-language backbone are jointly supervised by robot action prediction, latent action target matching, and future dynamics prediction. This enables action-labeled demonstrations to provide executable control supervision, while action-free videos contribute dynamics supervision without requiring robot action annotations. Experiments show that WALA achieves strong performance on RoboTwin, sets a new state-of-the-art result on RoboCasa with 75.2% average success, and improves both policy performance and generalization in real-world manipulation tasks.

AI.tldr: WALA是一个从有标签和无标签视频中学习可执行潜在动作的框架，通过在DINOv3特征空间和深度空间中预测未来变化来预训练模型，在多个基准上达到最优性能。
AI.motivation: 机器人策略依赖昂贵的动作标签演示数据，而大规模人类和机器人视频虽包含丰富交互信息但缺乏可执行的动作标签，因此需要一种能从无标签视频中学习的方法。
AI.method: WALA首先通过预测当前观测与稀疏未来观测在DINOv3特征空间和深度空间中的变化来预训练语义-几何潜在动作模型；训练时，预训练编码器提供稳定潜在动作目标，解码器作为可训练的潜在世界模型，视觉-语言主干生成的潜在动作同时受机器人动作预测、潜在动作目标匹配和未来动态预测的联合监督。
AI.result: 在RoboTwin上表现优异，在RoboCasa上达到75.2%的平均成功率（新SOTA），并在真实世界操作任务中提升了策略性能和泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: WALA通过利用无标签视频提供动态监督，有效缓解了机器人动作标签稀缺的问题，同时提升了策略的执行能力和泛化性。

title: Benchmarking UAV-based Vehicle Re-Identification under Simulated Weather Conditions
comment: Accepted at the 2026 International Conference on Multimedia Analysis and Pattern Recognition (MAPR 2026)
summary: UAV-based vehicle re-identification (ReID) has emerged as a promising technique for traffic surveillance, urban monitoring, and public-safety applications thanks to the flexible viewpoints and wide-area coverage provided by unmanned aerial vehicles. However, despite recent progress on UAV-based vehicle ReID benchmarks, the robustness of existing methods under adverse weather remains insufficiently studied. This is important because weather degradation can significantly affect the fine-grained appearance cues required for reliable vehicle matching in aerial imagery, especially under small object scale, viewpoint variation, and complex backgrounds. In this paper, we present a controlled comparative study of three representative recent vehicle ReID methods, namely CLIP-ReID, MSINet, and AdaSP, on two UAV-based benchmarks, VRU and UAV-VeID. To ensure consistent robustness evaluation, we generate synthetic foggy and rainy variants of both datasets using an analytical weather-effect pipeline while preserving the original identities and data splits. All methods are then trained and evaluated under matched clean, foggy, and rainy conditions. Experimental results show that adverse weather consistently degrades retrieval performance across both datasets, with rain causing larger drops than fog in nearly all settings. Among the evaluated methods, AdaSP demonstrates the strongest robustness, achieving 93.0% and 88.5% mAP on VRU-Large, and 88.7% and 76.2% mAP on UAV-VeID-Test under foggy and rainy conditions, respectively. Overall, our findings show that simulated adverse weather substantially increases the difficulty of UAV-based vehicle ReID, reveals clear robustness differences among recent methods, and highlights the need for weather-aware model design and evaluation protocols in future aerial ReID research. The code is released at https://github.com/tranminhvu945/Benchmarking-ReID.

AI.tldr: 本文针对无人机视角下车辆再识别（ReID）在恶劣天气下的鲁棒性问题，通过引入合成雾天和雨天数据，系统比较了CLIP-ReID、MSINet和AdaSP三种方法在VRU和UAV-VeID两个基准上的表现。结果表明，恶劣天气会显著降低检索性能，其中AdaSP表现出最强的鲁棒性，雨天比雾天影响更大，未来需要发展天气感知模型设计与评估协议。
AI.motivation: 尽管无人机车辆ReID在交通监控等领域具有重要应用价值，但现有方法在恶劣天气下的鲁棒性研究不足，而天气退化会严重影响无人机图像中细粒度的车辆外观线索，因此亟需系统评估和比较现有方法在雾天和雨天条件下的表现。
AI.method: 使用解析天气效应管线生成VRU和UAV-VeID两个数据集的合成雾天和雨天变体，保持原始身份标签和数据划分不变；然后分别对CLIP-ReID、MSINet和AdaSP三种方法在干净、雾天和雨天条件下进行匹配训练与评估。
AI.result: 恶劣天气一致性地降低了所有方法的检索性能，雨天的影响普遍大于雾天。其中AdaSP表现最佳，在VRU-Large上雾天和雨天分别达到93.0%和88.5% mAP，在UAV-VeID-Test上分别为88.7%和76.2% mAP。
AI.conclusion: 模拟恶劣天气显著增加了无人机车辆ReID的难度，不同方法之间的鲁棒性差异明显，未来研究需要关注天气感知的模型设计与评估协议。

title: EvidentialRAG: Quantifying and Mitigating Information Conflict in Multi-Source Retrieval-Augmented Generation via Evidential Deep Learning
summary: Retrieval-augmented generation grounds large language models in external evidence, but most pipelines still treat retrieved passages as deterministic and mutually consistent context. In open information environments, retrieved sources may disagree because of temporal drift, source error, ambiguity, or genuine uncertainty. This paper introduces ERAG, an uncertainty-aware RAG framework that converts retrieved chunks into probabilistic evidence before generation. A lightweight evaluator extracts candidate claims and maps chunk-level support to Dirichlet evidence. A conflict-preserving Dempster-Shafer fusion rule then transfers unresolved disagreement into epistemic uncertainty rather than normalizing it away. The generator is routed to direct answering, conflict-aware answering, or abstention according to the fused uncertainty score. Experiments on CRAG, ConflictQA, and MuSiQue show that ERAG remains competitive with the strongest matched baseline on standard question answering while improving behavior under conflict. On the CRAG ambiguous subset, hallucination decreases from 45.3% for Corrective RAG to a human-calibrated estimate of 34.8%, conflict resolution increases from 35.2% to 51.2%, and expected calibration error improves to 0.122. These results suggest that evidential modeling is a practical mechanism for trustworthy information processing in foundation-model-based retrieval systems.

AI.tldr: 提出ERAG框架，通过将检索到的文本块转化为概率证据，并利用Dempster-Shafer融合规则保留冲突信息，使大语言模型在不确定或矛盾的信息环境下能够更可信地生成答案。
AI.motivation: 现有RAG管道将检索段落视为确定且相互一致的上下文，但在开放信息环境中，检索结果可能因时间漂移、来源错误或歧义而存在冲突，导致模型生成不可靠的回答。
AI.method: 1) 轻量级评估器提取候选声明并将文本块支持映射为狄利克雷证据；2) 使用保留冲突的Dempster-Shafer融合规则，将未解决的分歧转化为认知不确定性而非归一化消除；3) 根据融合后的不确定性分数路由生成器，选择直接回答、冲突感知回答或弃权。
AI.result: 在CRAG、ConflictQA和MuSiQue上，ERAG在标准问答上保持竞争力；在CRAG歧义子集上，幻觉率从45.3%降至34.8%，冲突解决率从35.2%提升至51.2%，期望校准误差改善至0.122。
AI.conclusion: 证据建模是一种实用的机制，能够增强基于基础模型的检索系统在信息处理中的可信度。

title: SVR-R1: Bootstrapping Multi-modal Reasoning with Self-verification in Reinforcement Learning
summary: We introduce Self-Verified Reasoner (SVR-R1), a multi-turn RL framework that turns a model's own verification into a learning signal for multimodal reasoning. For each query, the model proposes an answer using the same weights, and issues a binary self-verdict (Yes/No). A 'No' triggers a second-chance rethink; a 'Yes,' or a turn cap, finalizes the output for computing the outcome-based reward. SVR-R1 is implemented with GRPO and an asynchronous multi-turn rollout framework and needs no external supervision or auxiliary critics. We evaluate SVR-R1 on vision-language reasoning benchmarks and show that it improves accuracy by a large margin over strong standard GRPO baselines. Training dynamics show decreasing reliance on verification-fewer verification turns, yet higher test accuracy-indicating that the gap between verification and generation narrows as the policy internalizes self-correction and chooses the most confident answer via our framework. SVR-R1 bridges the less explored intersection of inference-time self-refinement and RL training for VLMs, offering a simple yet effective recipe for bootstrapping multimodal reasoning. We will open-source \textbf{SVR-R1} to facilitate future research in VLMs.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SVR-R1框架，通过多轮强化学习让模型利用自身验证信号提升多模态推理能力，在视觉-语言推理任务上显著优于标准GRPO基线。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉语言模型（VLM）在推理时缺乏有效的自我验证与修正机制，且推理时自我精炼与RL训练的结合尚少被探索。
AI.method: 提出SVR-R1多轮RL框架：模型用相同权重生成答案后进行二元自验证（Yes/No），No则触发重新思考，Yes或达到轮次上限则输出最终答案；采用GRPO与异步多轮 rollout 框架实现，无需外部监督或辅助批评器。
AI.result: 在视觉-语言推理基准上，SVR-R1相比标准GRPO基线大幅提升准确率；训练动态显示验证轮次减少但测试准确率提高，说明验证与生成之间的差距在缩小。
AI.conclusion: SVR-R1通过简单的自验证多轮RL机制有效提升了VLM的多模态推理能力，弥合了推理时自我精炼与RL训练之间的鸿沟，并将开源以促进后续研究。

title: EDAR: Learning Environment-Dependent Action Representations for Robotic Manipulation
summary: Learning effective action representations is critical for robotic manipulation, where raw control trajectories are often noisy, redundant, and difficult to model directly. Existing methods mainly encode the structure of the action stream itself, treating the role of actions in the environment as implicit. Yet manipulation is about changing the world: the same action segment can induce different outcomes under different scene contexts, making action semantics inherently environment-dependent. We propose EDAR, an Environment-Dependent Action Representation that grounds action tokens in both executable control structure and expected visual consequences. By coupling motor commands with their environment-conditioned effects, EDAR encourages the learned action space to capture interaction semantics rather than merely command-level patterns. Experiments on simulated and real-robot manipulation benchmarks demonstrate that EDAR improves downstream policy learning, especially in long-horizon manipulation. These results highlight the importance of grounding action representations in executable control structure and environment-conditioned visual change.

AI.tldr: 提出EDAR，一种将动作表示同时基于可执行控制结构和预期视觉变化的环境依赖动作表示方法，在模拟和真实机器人操作任务中提升了策略学习效果，尤其在长程操作中表现优异。
AI.motivation: 现有动作表示方法主要编码动作流本身的时序结构，忽略了动作语义依赖于环境上下文——相同的动作在不同场景中会产生不同结果，因此需要将动作表示与环境条件化的视觉后果相结合。
AI.method: 提出EDAR（Environment-Dependent Action Representation），将动作token同时映射到可执行控制结构和预期视觉变化，通过耦合运动指令与其环境条件化的效果来学习具有交互语义的动作空间。
AI.result: 在模拟和真实机器人操作基准测试中，EDAR有效提升了下游策略学习性能，尤其在长程操作任务中表现出显著优势。
AI.conclusion: 将动作表示同时基于可执行控制结构和环境条件化的视觉变化对于学习有效的操作策略至关重要。

title: Anomalous Frame Detection by Grouping Frame Similarities between Two Videos Computed by Vision-Language Model to Extract Expert Workers' Unique Actions
summary: Maintenance of critical infrastructures, such as railways and power plants, is essential for operational safety and reliability. However, the declining number of skilled maintenance workers poses a serious challenge to sustaining these operations, highlighting the need to effectively transfer expert know-how to less experienced workers. Although traditional interview-based approaches have been used to elicit maintenance skills, they struggle to capture know-how that experts themselves may not consciously recognize. To address this gap, we proposed a method that detects anomalous frames of candidate actions including know-how by comparing a video of manual-based work with that of expert maintenance workers. In a simulated maintenance experiment involving a distribution board, our method targeted 11 types of actions not described in the manual and achieved a 66.9% extraction rate, marking a 50-percentage-point improvement over conventional techniques. These findings underscore the effectiveness of our approach in revealing hidden maintenance knowledge, thereby contributing to enhanced skill transfer and workforce development in critical infrastructure maintenance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过对比新手与专家维修视频来检测异常动作帧的方法，以提取专家隐性知识，在模拟配电盘实验中实现了66.9%的隐性动作提取率，比传统方法提升50个百分点。
AI.motivation: 关键基础设施维护依赖熟练工人，但熟练工人数量下降，传统访谈法难以捕捉专家自身未意识到的隐性知识，需要更有效的方法来转移专家经验。
AI.method: 通过对比基于手册操作的视频与专家维修工人的视频，检测候选动作（含隐性知识）中的异常帧，从而识别出手册中未描述的关键操作。
AI.result: 针对配电盘模拟维护实验，该方法针对手册中未描述的11种动作类型实现了66.9%的提取率，相比传统技术提升了50个百分点。
AI.conclusion: 该方法能有效揭示隐藏的维修知识，有助于提升关键基础设施维护中的技能传递和人才培养。

title: Learning from Noise: Effective-Rank Collapse and Out-of-Distribution Rejection in Restricted Boltzmann Machines
summary: Restricted Boltzmann machines (RBMs) represent data by shaping an energy landscape over visible and hidden configurations, but their discriminative use is fragile under out-of-distribution (OOD) inputs: samples outside the training distribution can be absorbed into one of the learned class basins rather than rejected. Here, we analyze this failure mode through the spectrum of the induced visible--visible interaction $J=WW^{T}$, where \(W\) is the visible--hidden weight matrix. Relative to a Marchenko--Pastur random-matrix reference, conventional training spreads spectral weight into many weak, bulk-compatible directions, increasing the effective rank of $J$. When auxiliary random binary images are assigned to a rejection label during training, the learned interaction undergoes effective-rank collapse: weak bulk-like modes are depleted, spectral weight concentrates into fewer dominant eigendirections, and the effective rank of $J$ approaches that of the empirical data covariance matrix. The resulting RBM rejects structured OOD image datasets while preserving MNIST classification accuracy, showing that random auxiliary exposure can reshape both the interaction spectrum and the free-energy landscape of an energy-based classifier.

AI.tldr: 本文分析了受限玻尔兹曼机(RBM)在分布外(OOD)输入下的脆弱性，发现通过训练时引入随机辅助二值图像并赋予拒绝标签，可使可见-可见相互作用矩阵J的有效秩坍缩，从而有效拒绝OOD样本同时保持分类精度。
AI.motivation: RBM在判别式使用中对分布外输入脆弱，训练分布外的样本可能被错误吸收到某个学习到的类别盆地中而非被拒绝，需要分析这一失效模式并寻找改进方法。
AI.method: 通过可见-可见相互作用矩阵J=WW^T的谱分析，以Marchenko-Pastur随机矩阵为参考，研究常规训练与引入随机辅助图像（赋予拒绝标签）训练下谱分布的变化，并提出有效秩坍塌的机制。
AI.result: 常规训练使谱权重分散到许多弱方向，增加有效秩；引入随机辅助图像后，弱方向被削弱，谱权重集中到少数主特征方向，有效秩接近经验数据协方差矩阵的有效秩。改进后的RBM能拒绝结构化的OOD图像同时保持MNIST分类准确率。
AI.conclusion: 随机辅助曝光可以重塑能量基分类器的相互作用谱和自由能景观，为改进RBM的OOD鲁棒性提供有效途径。

title: From Checker to Forecaster: Code-Owned Evaluation of Model-Generated Strategic Routes Under Delayed Ground Truth
summary: Many evaluations of model outputs rely either on contracts checkable at evaluation time or on feedback that arrives within the operating loop. We study the complementary setting in which ground truth is delayed, censored, or private, so deterministic code cannot check correctness at scoring time and must instead issue a code-owned provisional forecast. RouteCast instantiates this regime for model-generated typed strategic routes: models propose candidate routes and structured factors; point-in-time evidence, reference classes, and deterministic transformations produce a provisional forecast-ranking; later outcomes evaluate the forecast. In a retrospective venture pilot on 21 binary-outcome cases (6 positive, 15 negative), the whole-packet RouteCast score showed preliminary retrospective discrimination (AUC 0.756, 95% CI [0.471,0.980]), while a blind LLM judge reached AUC 0.678 [0.419,0.897] and an identity-exposed LLM judge reached AUC 0.761 [0.515,0.944], consistent with recognition- or outcome-related leakage risk. A preregistered decomposition ablation on the same binary subset found that converting the identical inputs into typed staged routes was indistinguishable from the whole-packet score (Delta AUC = -0.144, 95% CI [-0.471,0.176]) and from a deterministic heuristic (Delta AUC = -0.089, 95% CI [-0.412,0.278]). The pilot establishes an auditable feasibility result and exposes failure modes; it does not establish prospective calibration, causal decision improvement, route-decomposition advantage, or cross-domain validity.

AI.tldr: 本文提出RouteCast框架，用于在真实结果延迟、被审查或私密的场景下，对模型生成的策略化路线进行可审计的临时预测与排名。在21个二元结果案例的回顾性试验中，RouteCast取得了初步的判别效果（AUC 0.756），但暴露了信息泄露风险，且未建立前瞻性校准或跨领域有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有模型评估多依赖即时可检查的合约或运行反馈，但许多场景下真实结果延迟到达、被审查或属于隐私，无法在评分时刻通过确定性代码验证正确性。因此需要一种可审计的临时预测机制，在结果到来前对模型输出进行可信排名。
AI.method: RouteCast针对模型生成的类型化策略路线，结合时间点证据、参考类与确定性变换生成临时预测排名，并在后续结果到来时评估预测准确性。在21个二元结果案例（6正15负）上进行回顾性试验，并与盲审LLM、身份暴露LLM及确定性启发式方法进行比较。
AI.result: RouteCast完整包得分的AUC为0.756（95% CI [0.471,0.980]），盲审LLM为0.678，身份暴露LLM为0.761（提示潜在泄露风险）。分解消融实验显示，将相同输入转换为类型化分阶段路线与完整包得分无显著差异（Delta AUC = -0.144），与确定性启发式方法也无显著差异（Delta AUC = -0.089）。
AI.conclusion: 该试点建立了可审计的可行性结果并暴露了失败模式，但未建立前瞻性校准、因果决策改进、路线分解优势或跨领域有效性。

title: Towards Human-level Dexterous Teleoperation
summary: Humans routinely wield tools, swap grasps, and reposition objects within a single hand, seamlessly orchestrating contact transitions that span translation, reorientation, and finger gaiting. Endowing robot dexterous hands with this level of in-hand dexterity through teleoperation requires precise control of object motion via dynamic hand-object contact, yet current teleoperation systems remain far from this capability. To bridge this gap, we take a major step towards human-level dexterous teleoperation by introducing TeleDexter, a hand-object co-tracking controller that maps operator intent into learned, low-level contact execution. The controller is trained on consecutive co-tracking subgoals derived from human reference motions, utilizing a hybrid reward that couples sparse subgoal objectives with dense tracking rewards to enable learning across diverse interaction modalities rather than frame-wise trajectory imitation. The entire pipeline requires only single-stage RL and, with random action masking and domain randomization, transfers zero-shot to the real robot. We evaluate TeleDexter on seven challenging dexterous teleoperation tasks spanning object reorientation and long-horizon tool use across two dexterous hands, achieving a 75% average success rate where all baselines consistently fail. Furthermore, the collected demonstrations successfully train autonomous policies via behavioral cloning, marking a concrete step towards human-level dexterous teleoperation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出TeleDexter，一种手-物体协同追踪控制器，通过强化学习将操作者意图映射为低层接触执行，在七项灵巧遥操作任务中实现75%平均成功率，所有基线方法均失败，且收集的演示数据能通过行为克隆训练自主策略。
AI.motivation: 现有灵巧手遥操作系统远未达到人类水平，无法精确控制物体运动并实现动态手-物接触（如换手、重抓取、手指步态等），亟需一种能桥接操作者意图与低层接触执行的方法。
AI.method: 采用单阶段强化学习，训练手-物体协同追踪控制器；使用从人类参考运动生成的连续协同追踪子目标；设计混合奖励（稀疏子目标奖励+密集追踪奖励）；引入随机动作掩码和领域随机化实现零样本迁移到真实机器人。
AI.result: 在7项挑战性灵巧遥操作任务（物体重定向、长时程工具使用）上，TeleDexter达到75%平均成功率，所有基线方法均失败；收集的演示可通过行为克隆训练自主策略。
AI.conclusion: TeleDexter标志着向人类水平灵巧遥操作迈出实质性一步，证明了多交互模态学习优于逐帧轨迹模仿，且为后续自主策略学习提供了高质量演示数据。

title: End-to-End Real-Time Drone-Based Person Detection Framework Using Deep Learning
summary: In recent years, Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs) or drones have gained rapid response in terms of security, search and rescue (SAR), border surveillance, etc. Existing monitoring frameworks often struggle to maintain detection consistency when targets undergo significant scale variations due to altitude changes, leading to critical information gaps. To address this issue, this work proposes an integrated real-time detection pipeline for detecting targets through the wireless live drone video feed. Build upon YOLOv8-nano architecture, extensive flight experiments were conducted to determine the detection performance across multiple flight altitudes. Trained on VisDrone2019 dataset, the results of YOLOv8-nano model achieves 57.4%, 41%, 44.8% and 20.3% in precision, recall, mAP and mAP50:95 respectively. While demonstrating on real environment, this analysis revealed that the algorithm achieves near-total detection reliability at altitudes between 16 and 25 meters with the detection frame rate consistently maintained above 41 FPS and reaching a peak of 50 FPS. However, the goal of this work is to enable real-time person detection from an aerial platform via wireless transmission. This approach effectively addresses the dual challenges of identifying targets at varying scales and ensuring near-to-accurate localization during aerial observation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于YOLOv8-nano的无人机实时目标检测管道，通过无线视频流实现不同高度下的目标检测，在16-25米高度达到近完全检测可靠性，帧率保持在41-50 FPS。
AI.motivation: 现有监控框架在无人机高度变化导致目标尺度剧烈变化时，检测一致性差，造成关键信息缺失。
AI.method: 基于YOLOv8-nano架构，使用VisDrone2019数据集训练，通过多高度飞行实验确定检测性能，实现无线实时视频流目标检测。
AI.result: YOLOv8-nano在VisDrone2019上达到57.4%精度、41%召回率、44.8% mAP和20.3% mAP50:95；在16-25米高度实现近完全检测可靠性，帧率稳定在41 FPS以上，峰值达50 FPS。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了空中观测中目标尺度变化和准确定位的双重挑战，实现了实时人员检测。

title: Conditional Optimal Bridge for Riemannian Activation Steering
summary: Activation steering offers a lightweight alternative to fine-tuning for controlling large language models at inference time. While many existing methods implicitly optimize a log-density-ratio objective between desired and undesired activation distributions, they do so heuristically rather than deriving it from a principled optimization problem. Moreover, these methods produce query-independent steering directions that can degrade performance on both in-distribution and out-of-distribution (OOD) inputs. We introduce \textsc{Cobras} (Conditional Optimal Bridge for Riemannian Activation Steering), which addresses both limitations by casting activation steering as a Schrödinger Bridge on the residual-stream hypersphere. This formulation yields, to our knowledge, the first principled derivation of the log-density-ratio steering objective from a well-posed optimization problem. Solving the bridge via entropic optimal transport and extracting the probability flow ODE recovers the widely used density-ratio gradient as a special case when the Sinkhorn potentials are uniform. Crucially, the Schrödinger potentials are evaluated at the current activation, making the resulting steering direction inherently query-adaptive. Empirically, across four models and three alignment axes (helpfulness, truthfulness, and detoxification), \textsc{Cobras} consistently outperforms prior activation steering baselines while avoiding the OOD degradation commonly observed in existing methods. The code can be found at https://github.com/arshandalili/cobras.

AI.tldr: 本文提出 Cobras 框架，将激活引导形式化为残差流超球面上的薛定谔桥问题，通过熵正则化最优传输求解，推导出对数密度比引导目标，并实现查询自适应的引导方向，在多个模型和对齐任务上优于现有方法且避免分布外退化。
AI.motivation: 现有激活引导方法虽然隐式优化了密度比目标，但缺乏严格的优化理论基础，且生成与查询无关的固定引导方向，导致在分布内和分布外输入上性能下降。
AI.method: 将激活引导建模为残差流超球面上的薛定谔桥问题，通过熵最优传输求解，提取概率流ODE恢复密度比梯度作为特例，薛定谔势函数基于当前激活计算，实现查询自适应的引导方向。
AI.result: 在四个模型和三个对齐维度（帮助性、真实性、去毒化）上，Cobras 一致优于现有激活引导基线方法，并避免了分布外退化问题。
AI.conclusion: Cobras 提供了首个从良态优化问题出发的密度比引导目标推导，并通过查询自适应机制解决了 OOD 退化问题，是一种更优的激活引导方法。

title: QwenPaw-Data: Bridging Facts, Methodology, and Execution for Autonomous Enterprise Data Analytics
summary: Enterprise data analysis is emerging as a distinct frontier for autonomous agents. Compared with general-purpose interaction and software engineering, it operates in an open, ambiguous, and continuously evolving environment. These characteristics call for a data-agent architecture that treats semantics, methodology, execution, and evolution as first-class system concerns. To this end, we introduce QwenPaw-Data, an agentic data system designed for enterprise intelligent data analysis. QwenPaw-Data consolidates heterogeneous assets from warehouses, dashboards, documents, interaction logs, and historical tasks into reusable, governable, and evolvable analysis assets, then turns natural-language requests into end-to-end analytical workflows spanning data understanding, retrieval, analysis, report generation, and decision support. Its architecture decomposes the problem into three collaborative subsystems: DataBridge provides trustworthy semantic grounding through interconnected metadata, knowledge, and trace graphs; Skill-Hub codifies expert analytical methodology into reusable and verifiable skills; and Host materializes these evidence and method assets into controllable, artifact-centric runtime execution. Across these subsystems, semantics, methods, traces, and feedback are continuously deposited back into the system, forming a self-evolving asset flywheel. Experiments on public benchmarks and real-world industrial BI workloads show that QwenPaw-Data improves both verifiable data access capability and higher-level analytical quality, offering a practical foundation for reliable, traceable, and continuously improving enterprise data agents.

AI.tldr: QwenPaw-Data是一个面向企业智能数据分析的智能体数据系统，通过将语义、方法论、执行和演化作为第一等系统关切，构建了数据桥接、技能库和运行时宿主三大协同子系统，实现了从自然语言请求到端到端分析工作流的自动化，并在公共基准和工业负载上取得了更优的数据访问能力和分析质量。
AI.motivation: 企业数据分析环境具有开放性、模糊性和持续演化性，现有通用智能体难以胜任，需要一种将语义、方法论、执行和演化作为一等关切的专用数据智能体架构。
AI.method: 提出三子系统架构：DataBridge通过元数据、知识和追踪图提供可信语义基础；Skill-Hub将专家分析方法论编码为可复用技能；Host将证据和方法资产物化为可控的、以工件为中心的运行时执行。三者通过持续的语义、方法、追踪和反馈沉积形成自演化资产飞轮。
AI.result: 在公共基准和真实工业BI负载上，QwenPaw-Data在可验证的数据访问能力和高层次分析质量方面均优于对比方法。
AI.conclusion: QwenPaw-Data为构建可靠、可追溯、持续改进的企业数据智能体提供了实用基础。

title: See like a Robot: Robot-Centric Pointmaps for Vision-Language-Action Models
summary: Vision-language-action (VLA) models predict robot actions from visual observations and language instructions. These actions are defined in the robot's own 3D coordinate frame, yet most VLAs observe the scene in the camera frame, creating a frame mismatch between where the scene is observed and where actions are defined. The mismatch is benign under a fixed viewpoint, where the policy can memorize a single observation-to-action mapping, but grows harder as large-scale datasets aggregate demonstrations across diverse camera setups and the policy must generalize this mapping across viewpoints. We address this mismatch with robot-centric pointmaps, images whose pixels store the 3D coordinates of scene points in the robot frame. Pointmaps provide robot-frame 3D geometry while preserving the dense H x W grid expected by pretrained 2D VLAs, so they integrate into existing VLAs with minimal architectural change. On RoboCasa, pointmaps improve both pi0.5 and SmolVLA and outperform representative camera-viewpoint and 3D-aware baselines. In real-robot experiments, their advantage over an RGB-only policy widens when the camera is moved to a placement unseen during training.

AI.tldr: 针对VLA模型中视觉观测在相机坐标系而动作在机器人坐标系导致的帧不匹配问题，提出机器人-centric点图（pointmaps），将场景3D点编码为机器人坐标系下的像素值，在不改变2D VLA架构的前提下提升跨视角泛化能力。
AI.motivation: VLA模型的动作定义在机器人自身3D坐标系，但视觉观测在相机坐标系，存在坐标系不匹配。固定视角下可通过记忆单映射解决，但大规模跨视角数据集要求模型泛化，此不匹配成为瓶颈。
