Our results show that restoring output-level calibration is essential under highly data imbalanced settings for achieving a truly zero-shot VLM under multi-domain specialization.

AI.tldr: 本文提出MED-DSLC方法，通过域监督训练和域级逻辑缩放来解决多专家域分类中跨域逻辑未校准问题，在保持域内判别力的同时显著提升跨域鲁棒性和可扩展性。
AI.motivation: 视觉语言模型（如CLIP）在微调至细粒度领域时，尽管提升了域内准确率，但域外性能下降，导致模型生态碎片化。多专家域分类试图通过合并独立训练的LoRA来解决该问题，但各专家产生的逻辑值不再全局校准，跨域干扰导致预测错误。
AI.method: 提出MED-DSLC方法，结合域监督训练和域级逻辑缩放（Domain-wise Logit Scaling），显式恢复全局逻辑可比性。该方法轻量级，最小化数据需求即可在保持域内判别力的同时减少跨域逻辑干扰。
AI.result: 在多个细粒度基准上，平均准确率提升15%，跨域鲁棒性和可扩展性显著改善。
AI.conclusion: 恢复输出级校准在多领域专业化的零样本VLM中至关重要，尤其是在高度数据不平衡场景下。

title: Bandit PCA with Minimax Optimal Regret
summary: We study the bandit-feedback version of online principal component analysis (Bandit PCA): in each round $t = 1,\dots,T$, the adversary selects a $d \times d$ symmetric gain matrix $G_t$ with spectrum in $[0,1]$ and rank at most $r$; the learner simultaneously selects a unit vector $w_t \in S^{d-1}$ and receives the reward $w_t^\top G_t w_t$. The learner receives no other feedback, and aims to minimize the regret against the best unit vector in hindsight. This problem was introduced by Kotlowski and Neu (2019), who gave an algorithm with regret $O(d\sqrt{rT \log T})$ and showed the lower bound of $Ω(r\sqrt{T/\log T})$. We improve upon both of these bounds and essentially bridge the gap between them, establishing the minimax regret of order $r\sqrt{dT}$ up to polylogarithmic factors in $d$ and $T$. The upper bound is attained by a novel algorithm, which combines online mirror descent on the spectrahedron of (real) density matrices with a multiscale exploration scheme in which the eigenspaces with different spectral magnitudes are updated at different rates. For the lower bound, we construct an adaptive adversary that refines a hidden large-reward subspace based on the learner's actions, in such a way that low regret is impossible without estimating the subspace; as a result, lower-bounding the regret reduces to studying the arising subspace estimation problem. Finally, we discuss connections of Bandit PCA with adaptive-measurement quantum tomography.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在线主成分分析（Bandit PCA）的遗憾最小化问题，提出了一种结合在线镜像下降与多尺度探索的新算法，将上界改进为 $O(r\sqrt{dT})$（含对数因子），同时构造自适应对手将下界提升至 $\Omega(r\sqrt{dT})$，基本确定了该问题的极小化最优遗憾量级。
AI.motivation: Bandit PCA 由 Kotlowski 和 Neu (2019) 提出，已有上界 $O(d\sqrt{rT\log T})$ 和下界 $\Omega(r\sqrt{T/\log T})$，两者之间存在显著间隙。本文旨在缩小这一差距，确定该问题的极小化最优遗憾。
AI.method: 上界：设计了一种新算法，结合谱面体（密度矩阵）上的在线镜像下降与多尺度探索机制——对不同谱幅度的特征空间以不同速率更新。下界：构造自适应对手，根据学习者的动作逐步隐藏大奖励子空间，将后悔下界归约为子空间估计问题的难度。
AI.result: 上界：$O(r\sqrt{dT})$（含 polylog 因子）；下界：$\Omega(r\sqrt{dT})$（含 polylog 因子）。双方量级匹配，基本确定了极小化最优遗憾为 $r\sqrt{dT}$ 量级。
AI.conclusion: 本文基本解决了 Bandit PCA 的遗憾界问题，并指出该问题与自适应测量量子层析成像相关。

title: Auditing the Risk Claims of Distributional Reinforcement Learning
comment: 25 pages, 8 figures, 3 tables (main text); includes supplementary material
summary: Distributional reinforcement learning agents learn full return distributions that are increasingly read at face value: for interpretability, risk-sensitive control, and safety monitoring. We ask a question theory anticipates but that has not been measured directly: are the risk claims of a trained distributional agent true? Our audit combines a decision-relevant screening metric (the excess Wasserstein gap between the top two actions, which equals the mass by which first-order stochastic dominance is violated), ground truth from snapshot-restart Monte Carlo, and a statistical harness (permutation nulls, bootstrap refutation, FDR control) without which the audit itself manufactures false conclusions. Across QR-DQN, C51, and IQN on MinAtar (33 runs), 40-95% of the strongest claimed risk trade-offs are refuted at 95% confidence, the placement of the strongest claims is statistically indistinguishable from truth-blind, and essentially no claim is confirmable: for these agents, the learned "risk" reflects a training artifact rather than environment stochasticity. The artifact is structural (fully formed early in training, uncorrelated with final score, idiosyncratic to each seed) and appears unchanged at full-Atari scale, with every top Breakout claim of a pretrained near-state-of-the-art QR-DQN refuted. Positive controls of known magnitude confirm 96-100% of real claims (correlation 0.89-0.92): the reading measures the agents, not the audit. Acting on the heads' CVaR advice at their most-flagged states ranges from beneficial to significantly worse than chance. Neither training for risk nor ensembling removes the artifact, and recalibration passes the audit only by nullifying the claims: the head is uninformative, not merely miscalibrated. We release the toolkit and document two silent pitfalls that produced convincing but wrong audits of our own.

AI.tldr: 本文系统审计了分布强化学习（QR-DQN, C51, IQN）在MinAtar和Atari环境中声称的风险偏好（如CVaR），发现40-95%的强风险声称在95%置信水平下被推翻，风险分布反映的是训练伪影而非环境随机性，且无法通过重新校准或集成学习修复。
AI.motivation: 分布强化学习智能体学习的完整回报分布常被用于可解释性、风险敏感控制和安全监控，但这些风险声称的真实性从未被直接衡量。本文旨在系统审计这些声称是否成立。
AI.method: 采用决策相关的筛选指标（前两个动作的Wasserstein距离/一阶随机占优违反质量）、基于snapshot-restart Monte Carlo的真实值、以及统计框架（置换检验、自举反驳、FDR控制）进行审计。在MinAtar环境中对QR-DQN, C51, IQN进行33次运行测试，并在Atari Breakout上验证。
AI.result: 40-95%的强风险声称被95%置信水平下推翻；声称的排序与真实风险无关；几乎无声称可被证实。风险伪影在训练早期即形成，与最终得分无关，且种子间特异。在Atari规模下所有Breakout声称均被推翻。正对照实验确认96-100%真实声称（相关系数0.89-0.92）。基于CVaR建议的行动可能显著差于随机。
AI.conclusion: 分布强化学习的风险声称不可靠，反映的是训练伪影而非环境随机性。风险重新校准和集成学习无法解决问题。该伪影是结构性的，智能体头部提供的风险信息无信息量而非仅仅是未校准。

title: MMA-Former: Multi-Window Mixture-of-Head Attention Transformer for Adaptive PNI Prediction in 3D MRI
comment: Published in the 2026 IEEE 23rd International Symposium on Biomedical Imaging (ISBI 2026); accepted for oral presentation
summary: Perineural invasion (PNI) is a critical prognostic factor in cholangiocarcinoma. Non-invasive prediction from 3D MRI is challenging, demanding models that efficiently capture both fine-grained details and global context. We propose the Multi-window Mixture-of-Head Attention Transformer (MMA-Former), a novel end-to-end 3D architecture featuring a Coarse-Fine Transformer (CFT) structure for parallel multi-scale feature extraction. We advance this structure by integrating a novel Window-Specific Mixture-of-Head attention (WS-MoH) mechanism. Unlike standard Multi-Head Self Attention (MSA), WS-MoH generates a representation for each 3D window and dynamically routes the entire window to specialized or common attention heads. This enables spatially adaptive feature extraction tailored to the local context of each window, enhancing specialization and reducing redundancy without increasing parameters. Evaluated on a retrospective dataset of 168 T1-weighted MRI scans, MMA-Former achieved an AUC of 0.752, outperforming other 3D architectures, including the best CNN (AUC of 0.708) and Transformer baselines (AUC of 0.681).

AI.tldr: 提出MMA-Former，一种用于胆管癌MRI中神经周围浸润（PNI）非侵入性预测的3D Transformer架构，通过多窗口混合头注意力机制（WS-MoH）实现粗-细粒度多尺度特征提取，AUC达0.752，优于CNN和标准Transformer基线。
AI.motivation: 胆管癌中神经周围浸润（PNI）是关键预后因素，但术前从3D MRI中非侵入性预测PNI极具挑战性，现有模型难以同时高效捕获局部细节和全局上下文信息。
AI.method: 提出MMA-Former，包含粗-细Transformer（CFT）结构实现并行多尺度特征提取，并集成窗口特定混合头注意力（WS-MoH）机制：为每个3D窗口生成专属表征，将整个窗口动态路由到专门或通用注意力头，实现空间自适应的特征提取，增强专业化并减少冗余而不增加参数量。
AI.result: 在168例T1加权MRI扫描的回顾性数据集上，MMA-Former取得AUC 0.752，优于最佳CNN（0.708）和Transformer基线（0.681）。
AI.conclusion: MMA-Former通过WS-MoH机制实现了对3D MRI中局部上下文的自适应特征提取，在PNI预测任务上显著优于现有方法，为胆管癌术前评估提供了有效工具。

title: Sticky Jump Diffusions: A Unifying View of Masked, Continuous, and Hybrid Diffusion
summary: We introduce Sticky Jump Diffusions (SJDs), continuous-time Markov processes on $\mathbb R^d$ whose discrete anchors are token embeddings. In forward time, anchors release their mass at a hazard rate and the released mass diffuses in the continuous ambient space; time reversal couples a score-driven SDE with a sticky jump kernel whose rate and destination are fixed by flux balance with the forward law. We estimate the score and the per-anchor reverse hazards from a single denoising classifier via Denoising Hazard Matching, the hazard analogue of denoising score matching, with simulation-free cross-entropy training. SJD recovers masked diffusion, continuous diffusion, and hybrid diffusion as limits. Its reversal explains features that each family treats as given: the mask of masked diffusion carries no evidence about the source token because the unsticking kernel of every anchor collapses to the same absorbing point; the terminal projection of continuous diffusion is required due to the absence of atoms in its forward marginal, without which flux balance yields no reverse jumps; and the update rules of hybrid diffusion (commit rate, destination, and drift) all follow from flux balance rather than from separate design. Beyond these limits, the unsticking kernel becomes a design space: a cross-position blending corrupts each position toward a blend of its neighbors' clean values or embeddings, turning dependency structure such as spatial locality or a constraint graph into an inductive bias of the corruption itself, and improves over the identity-kernel hybrid on CIFAR-10, Text8, and Sudoku.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Sticky Jump Diffusions (SJDs)，一种连续时间马尔可夫过程，其离散锚点为token嵌入。通过Denoising Hazard Matching训练，SJD统一了掩码扩散、连续扩散和混合扩散，并引入跨位置混合核作为新的设计空间，在CIFAR-10、Text8和数独上取得改进。
AI.motivation: 现有扩散模型（掩码扩散、连续扩散、混合扩散）各有其预设机制（如掩码、终端投影、提交率等），缺乏统一视角。作者希望提出一个统一框架，解释这些机制的本质来源，并在此基础上扩展设计空间。
AI.method: 提出Sticky Jump Diffusions框架：前向过程中锚点以风险率释放质量到连续空间中扩散；反向过程通过通量平衡耦合得分驱动的SDE与粘性跳跃核。通过Denoising Hazard Matching（风险版本的去噪得分匹配）从单个去噪分类器中估计得分和每个锚点的反向风险率，实现免模拟的交叉熵训练。
AI.result: SJD统一了掩码扩散、连续扩散和混合扩散作为其极限情况。解释了掩码扩散中掩码不包含源token证据的原因、连续扩散需要终端投影的原因、以及混合扩散中各更新规则均源于通量平衡。引入跨位置混合核后，在CIFAR-10、Text8和数独任务上优于原始混合扩散。
AI.conclusion: SJD提供了一个统一的扩散模型理论框架，揭示了现有方法中看似随意设计的选择本质来源于通量平衡约束。去粘核作为新的设计空间，可以编码归纳偏置（如空间局部性或约束图），直接融入破坏过程本身。

title: Lesioned Multimodal Language Models Reproduce Aphasic Picture-Naming Patterns
comment: 15 pages, 8 figures; supplementary materials (18 pages, 6 sections) included
summary: Aphasia following stroke commonly produces systematic naming errors with characteristic profiles, but whether general-purpose language models not designed for clinical simulation can reproduce these patterns remains untested. We investigated (1) whether lesions or controlled perturbations to a multimodal language model can reproduce different types of errors in picture naming, and (2) whether the framework can reproduce the complete error profile of individual persons with aphasia (PWAs). Using LLaVA 1.6, we evaluated perturbation configurations that varied the layer, proportion, and amount of noise applied to model units. We examined 278 PWAs on the Philadelphia Naming Test, classifying responses into seven categories using a validated neural classifier. Six of seven response categories (correct, semantic, mixed, unrelated, neologism, no response errors) emerged at clinically-comparable proportions across distinct parameter space regions, with formal paraphasia being the exception. Searching the perturbation space revealed configurations that reproduced the individual error profile in at least six of seven categories for 97.8% of PWAs and in all seven categories for 79.5% of PWAs. Monte Carlo baselines confirmed that this matching reflects joint inter-category structure rather than marginal overlap. These results establish a quantitative framework for reproducing individual aphasic error patterns in picture naming. They suggest the potential for language models to serve as digital twins of individuals with post-stroke aphasia.

AI.tldr: 本研究测试了多模态语言模型LLaVA 1.6能否通过模拟脑损伤（添加噪声/扰动）来复现中风后失语症患者的命名错误模式。结果表明，在278名失语症患者中，该模型可以复现7类错误中的6类（除形式性错语外），并能针对97.8%的患者匹配至少6类错误的个体化特征，为构建失语症"数字孪生"提供了定量框架。
AI.motivation: 中风后失语症会产生系统性的命名错误模式，但通用语言模型（非专为临床模拟设计）能否复现这些模式尚未经过检验。
AI.method: 使用LLaVA 1.6多模态语言模型，通过改变扰动层、扰动比例和噪声量等配置来模拟病变效应。使用经验证的神经分类器将278名失语症患者的费城命名测试反应分为7类，并对比模型输出与患者数据。
AI.result: 模型成功复现了7类错误中的6类（正确、语义、混合、无关、新词、无反应），比例与临床数据相当；形式性错语是例外。97.8%的患者在至少6个类别上匹配，79.5%的患者在全部7个类别上匹配。蒙特卡洛基线验证了匹配反映的是类别间的联合结构而非边缘重叠。
AI.conclusion: 该研究建立了再现个体失语症命名错误模式的定量框架，表明语言模型有潜力作为中风后失语症患者的"数字孪生"。

title: TreeSoc: Tree-Structured Dynamic Reasoning and Tool Synergy for Soccer Video Understanding
summary: Automated understanding of complex soccer scenarios from video remains a significant challenge for contemporary vision-language models (VLMs), which suffer from shallow cross-modal alignment and exhibit fundamental limitations in multi-step reasoning and coordinated tool integration. We present TreeSoc, a structured reasoning framework that reformulates soccer video question answering as a hierarchical search problem rather than a single-pass prediction. Specifically, TreeSoc employs a dynamic depth-first search (DFS) mechanism that decomposes complex queries into sequentially ordered sub-tasks, enabling iterative reasoning refinement through explicit intermediate states. This tree-structured decomposition naturally supports adaptive tool routing, wherein domain-specific modules are selectively activated and their outputs incorporated at each reasoning node to produce contextually grounded predictions. On SoccerBench, TreeSoc achieves state-of-the-art performance, with accuracies of 85.2%, 87.4%, and 82.2% on TextQA, ImageQA, and VideoQA, respectively. Additionally, TreeSoc further demonstrates strong cross-domain generalization, attaining 74.16% accuracy on NExT-QA. These results establish structured, tool-augmented tree reasoning as an effective paradigm for robust video understanding. Code is available at: https://github.com/thanhnhan29/TreeSoc.

AI.tldr: TreeSoc提出了一种基于树结构深度优先搜索的推理框架，将足球视频问答建模为层次化搜索问题，通过动态分解复杂查询、自适应路由领域工具模块，在多个基准上达到SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 当前视觉-语言模型在理解复杂足球场景时存在浅层跨模态对齐、多步推理能力不足以及工具集成受限等问题。
AI.method: 提出TreeSoc框架，采用动态深度优先搜索（DFS）机制，将复杂查询分解为有序子任务，通过显式中间状态进行迭代推理细化；支持自适应工具路由，在推理节点选择性激活领域模块。
AI.result: 在SoccerBench上，TextQA、ImageQA、VideoQA分别达到85.2%、87.4%、82.2%；在NExT-QA上达到74.16%，均为SOTA。
AI.conclusion: 结构化、工具增强的树推理是鲁棒视频理解的有效范式。

title: WSqD: A Horizon-Free Learning Rate Schedule for Large Model Training
summary: Standard learning rate schedules such as cosine annealing are tied to a fixed training horizon, limiting their ability to accommodate post hoc horizon extension. Warmup-stable-decay (WSD) partially addresses this issue by maintaining a long constant-rate phase before a short linear cooldown, allowing training to resume from a pre-decay checkpoint. However, its peak learning rate is still tuned based on the original training horizon and can become suboptimal when training is extended. Motivated by stochastic convex optimization, we propose WSqD (Warmup with Square-root base and linear Decay), a learning rate schedule that replaces WSD's constant stable phase with a shifted inverse-square-root base while retaining the final linear cooldown. In the stochastic convex setting, WSqD provably attains the minimax-optimal $O(1/\sqrt{T})$ last-iterate convergence rate. Importantly, its base learning rate schedule is horizon-independent, and the training horizon is needed only to determine when to begin the final cooldown. Empirically, on language-model pretraining using the SlimPajama corpus, WSqD matches or outperforms carefully tuned WSD and other baselines across multiple training horizons while reusing a single peak learning rate.

AI.tldr: 提出WSqD学习率调度方法，用反平方根基替换WSD的常数稳定阶段，实现与训练时长无关的峰值学习率，在语言模型预训练中匹配或超越WSD效果。
AI.motivation: 标准学习率调度（如余弦退火）与固定训练时长绑定，无法灵活扩展训练周期；WSD虽通过长稳定阶段部分缓解此问题，但其峰值学习率仍依赖原始训练时长，扩展后可能变次优。
AI.method: 提出WSqD调度：将WSD中的常数稳定阶段替换为平移后的反平方根基函数，保留最终线性退火阶段。在随机凸优化中可达到极小极大最优的O(1/√T)最后迭代收敛率，且基学习率与训练时长无关。
AI.result: 在SlimPajama语料库的语言模型预训练中，WSqD在多个训练时长下使用单一峰值学习率，匹配或优于精心调参的WSD及其他基线方法。
AI.conclusion: WSqD实现了与训练时长无关的学习率调度，既保持理论最优性，又支持训练时长的灵活扩展，无需重新调整峰值学习率。

title: Reproducing human biases in route choice using large language models: Toward scalable behavioral modeling
summary: Human choice behavior, including route choice, exhibits systematic behavioral biases that deviate from the assumptions of full rationality. Cumulative prospect theory (CPT) has been widely recognized as an effective framework for characterizing such behavioral patterns. However, its large-scale application, particularly in simulation and agent-based modeling, critically depends on specifying individual-level CPT parameters, which remain a major bottleneck. Conventional approaches typically rely on surveys and controlled experiments to calibrate CPT parameters, yet these methods are difficult to generalize and often fail to capture the full diversity of human decision-making. To address this challenge, this paper investigates whether large language models (LLMs) can reproduce human behavioral biases in choice-making without explicit specification of prospect-theoretic parameters. Using route choice as a representative scenario, we design a behavioral evaluation framework and systematically compare LLM-generated decisions with established human behavioral patterns predicted by CPT. Experimental results demonstrate that LLMs are capable of reproducing non-rational human choice biases and can exhibit decision behaviors consistent with prospect-theoretic effects under uncertainty. These findings suggest that generative AI models may provide a scalable alternative for modeling human decision processes and offer a promising foundation for next-generation large-scale agent-based simulation and AI-driven behavioral research.

AI.tldr: 本文研究大型语言模型（LLM）能否在没有明确设定前景理论参数的情况下，复现人类在路径选择等决策中的行为偏差。实验表明，LLM能够再现非理性的选择偏差，并表现出符合前景理论的不确定决策行为，为大规模智能体建模提供新思路。
AI.motivation: 累积前景理论（CPT）虽能有效描述人类非理性行为偏差，但其大规模应用需要指定个体层面的CPT参数，传统依赖调查和实验的校准方法难以推广且无法覆盖人类决策的多样性。
AI.method: 以路径选择为场景，设计行为评估框架，系统比较LLM生成的决策与CPT预测的人类行为模式。
AI.result: LLM能够复现非理性的人类选择偏差，并在不确定性下表现出与前景理论一致的决策行为。
AI.conclusion: 生成式AI模型可为模拟人类决策过程提供可扩展的替代方案，为下一代大规模智能体模拟和AI驱动的行为研究奠定基础。

title: LoSA-Net: A Localized and Scale-Adaptive Network for Boundary-Sensitive Prediction of Perineural Invasion in 3D MRI
comment: Published in the 2026 IEEE 23rd International Symposium on Biomedical Imaging (ISBI 2026); accepted for oral presentation
summary: Perineural invasion (PNI) is a clinically relevant indicator of tumor aggressiveness and can influence surgical decision-making, motivating interest in reliable preoperative assessment. The subtle MRI features of PNI, however, often resemble nearby anatomy, complicating noninvasive prediction. These fine perineural cues are easily attenuated by routine downsampling or overly global feature aggregation, reducing the effectiveness of conventional volumetric models. We present LoSA-Net, a localized and scale-adaptive architecture for boundary-sensitive PNI prediction in 3D MRI. Talking Neighborhood Attention (TNA) preserves nerve-aligned detail through localized self-attention with head-wise mixing, and Scale-Adaptive Feature Mixing (SAFM) modulates the receptive field using multi-scale depthwise processing. Cross-Scale Refinement and Alignment (CSRA) maintains consistency between semantic context and high-resolution boundaries across stages. In contrast-enhanced MRI scans from 168 patients with cholangiocarcinoma, LoSA-Net achieves an AUC of 0.7567 and outperforms representative convolutional and transformer baselines under matched preprocessing and optimization settings.

AI.tldr: LoSA-Net是一种针对3D MRI中神经侵犯（PNI）预测的局部化与尺度自适应架构，通过Talking Neighborhood Attention、尺度自适应特征混合和跨尺度细化对齐模块，在胆管癌患者数据集上取得AUC 0.7567，优于现有卷积和Transformer基线模型。
AI.motivation: 神经侵犯（PNI）是肿瘤侵袭性的重要临床指标，影响手术决策，但MRI中PNI的细微特征与周围解剖结构相似，常规下采样或全局特征聚合会削弱这些细微线索，现有体积模型效果不佳，因此需要更精确的术前无创预测方法。
AI.method: 提出了LoSA-Net，包含三个核心模块：1) Talking Neighborhood Attention (TNA) 通过局部自注意力与头间混合保持神经走行细节；2) Scale-Adaptive Feature Mixing (SAFM) 通过多尺度深度可分离处理调制感受野；3) Cross-Scale Refinement and Alignment (CSRA) 在跨阶段间保持语义上下文与高分辨率边界的一致性。
AI.result: 在168例胆管癌患者的对比增强MRI扫描中，LoSA-Net实现了0.7567的AUC，在相同的预处理和优化设置下，优于代表性的卷积和Transformer基线模型。
AI.conclusion: LoSA-Net通过局部化与尺度自适应设计，有效保留了PNI预测所需的边界敏感细节，为术前无创评估提供了一种有前景的方法。

title: Reinforcement Learning for Execution under Dynamic Fees in a Closed-Loop DEX Simulator
summary: Trader-facing dynamic fees are increasingly proposed for automated market makers (AMMs), but historical data do not identify how order flow would respond: trader-facing fees do not vary, trader types are latent, and a replayed tape is not a sequential decision environment. We therefore construct a minimal closed-loop simulator in which the missing signal exists by construction: two constant-product pools repriced by an equilibrium-inspired dynamic-fee rule, fee-sensitive noise flow, and closed-form CEX--AMM arbitrage. Equilibrium is used as a closure principle, not as an object the trader learns. Against a tuned benchmark ladder of schedule, planning, lookahead, and tabular policies, a small DQN is the only evaluated valid policy whose paired improvement over tuned one-step routing excludes zero. On a reserved final block of 1{,}000 seeds with completion forced to 1.0 for every policy, it reduces implementation shortfall under every tested intra-step ordering, by $13.3\bps$ of order notional under the pre-specified agent-last ordering, and the edge is concentrated in, and learned from, dynamic-fee environments: under constant fees the paired difference is indistinguishable from zero. The result is model-conditioned counterfactual evidence about execution control in AMMs, not evidence about historical traders, equilibrium play, or deployable profit.

AI.tldr: 本文构建了一个最小闭环模拟器，用于研究自动化做市商（AMM）的动态费用对交易者执行效果的影响。研究发现，在动态费用环境下，一个小的深度Q网络（DQN）策略相比基准策略可显著降低执行成本（约13.3个基点），而该优势在固定费用环境下消失。
AI.motivation: 现有AMM动态费用研究缺乏历史数据支撑，因为交易者面向的费用不变、交易者类型不可观测，且重播交易序列并非顺序决策环境。因此需要构建一个模拟器来生成缺失的信号。
AI.method: 构建最小闭环模拟器：两个恒定乘积池，采用受均衡启发的动态费用规则，包含费用敏感的噪声流和封闭形式的CEX-AMM套利模型。使用均衡作为封闭原则而非学习对象。对比基准策略阶梯（计划、规划、前瞻、表格策略）与小DQN策略。
AI.result: 小DQN是唯一经过评估的有效策略，其配对改进在排除零假设下显著优于调优的一步路由策略。在预留的1000个种子的最终区块上，DQN在每种测试的订单内排序下均降低了实现成本，在预设的代理最后排序下降低约13.3个基点。该优势集中在动态费用环境中，固定费用下配对差异与零无显著差异。
AI.conclusion: 结果提供了关于AMM中执行控制的模型条件反事实证据，而非关于历史交易者、均衡行为或可部署利润的证据。

title: Think Through a Bottleneck: Hourglass Reasoning for Rigorous Induction
summary:
Self-refinement often fails to strengthen few-shot inductive reasoning in large language models. Prompting a model to explicitly state its inferred rule does little on its own. What actually matters is a structurally enforced isolation between reasoning stages, so that information can only pass between them as a compressed symbolic state.
  We introduce \textbf{Hourglass reasoning}, which enforces strict context isolation between reasoning stages. The frozen LLM acts as a meta-constructor, building for each task a symbolic encoder--decoder: an Induction module compresses the support examples into a schema $φ$ (encoder) and a transient scaffold $z$; a Deduction module derives rule $T$ (decoder) from these and discards $z$; an Implementer compiles $(φ, T)$ into artifacts; an error-driven Refiner revises $(φ, T)$ and regenerates artifacts from scratch. Only $(φ, T)$ crosses stage boundaries, so all refinement stays anchored to the rule.
  We evaluate Hourglass across three benchmarks spanning visual abstraction, hardware synthesis, and textual rule induction, using GPT-5.5 and Gemini 3.1 Pro. On ARC-AGI-2, it raises best-of-5 accuracy by up to 14 points over an iterative-refinement baseline. On ChipBench, it nearly doubles Verilog synthesis accuracy with GPT-5.5, from 31\% to 58\%. BBEH-Linguini draws on puzzles from the International Linguistics Olympiad, a setting where prior work has shown that explicit verbalization can hurt performance. Hourglass mitigates this tendency, and on Gemini 3.1 Pro, it reverses the effect entirely.
  Ablations confirm that these gains come from the isolation between stages and the quality of the initial induction, not from prompt wording or the particular symbolic form used. It is how information flows through the reasoning process, rather than the language used to express it, that drives inductive reasoning in frozen LLMs.

AI.tldr: 本文提出"沙漏推理"方法，通过严格隔离推理阶段之间的上下文，只允许压缩符号状态（规则和模式）在阶段间传递，显著提升了冻结大语言模型的少样本归纳推理能力，在三个基准测试上均优于迭代精炼基线。
AI.motivation: 现有研究表明，让大语言模型显式陈述其推断规则并不能有效增强少样本归纳推理。作者认为关键在于推理阶段之间的信息流方式——需要结构化的隔离，使得信息只能以压缩符号状态在阶段间传递。
AI.method: 提出Hourglass（沙漏推理）框架：冻结的LLM作为元构建器，为每个任务构建符号化的编码器-解码器结构。包含四个模块——归纳模块（将支持示例压缩为模式φ和暂存支架z）、演绎模块（从这些推导出规则T并丢弃z）、实施模块（编译φ和T为成品）、纠错精炼模块（修正φ和T并从头重新生成成品）。只有φ和T能跨越阶段边界。
AI.result: 在ARC-AGI-2上准确率提升最高14个百分点；在ChipBench上使用GPT-5.5时Verilog综合准确率从31%提升至58%；在BBEH-Linguini上逆转了显式语言化会损害性能的倾向。
AI.conclusion: 消融实验证实，性能提升来自于阶段间的隔离和初始归纳的质量，而非提示措辞或特定的符号形式。驱动冻结LLM归纳推理的关键是信息在推理过程中的流动方式，而非用于表达信息的语言。

title: Confidence Scores in Open-Vocabulary Detection Are a Biased Mixture of Scale and Semantics
summary: Foundation models such as CLIP have enabled open-vocabulary object detectors that generalise to novel categories via vision-language similarity. However, the confidence scores these detectors produce are not reliable localization probability estimates: they conflate visual scale and semantic query specificity with the true detection signal. Through controlled experiments on COCO across three foundation-model-based detectors (GroundingDINO, OWL-ViT, YOLO-World), with the scale-bias finding further replicated on LVIS (1,203 categories) using GroundingDINO, we show that s=cos(v,t) is a biased mixture of two effects. Scale bias (alpha = +0.064, r = 0.579, p = 1.29 x 10^-58) systematically inflates scores for large objects. Semantic bias (beta = -0.705, p = 5.23 x 10^-41) suppresses scores for generic queries. Both biases are structurally inevitable from CLIP's image-level pretraining. Threshold adjustment cannot remove them: oracle per-scale thresholding yields Delta F1 = +0.001 for small objects versus +0.102 for large. A parameter-free temperature scaling correction improves small-object Recall@10 by 19.6% (p < 0.01) without retraining. This comes at a modest, measurable cost to pooled-ranking precision, so the bias is partially, not freely, reversible at inference time. These findings reveal a fundamental limitation of adapting image-level foundation models to region-level detection tasks.

AI.tldr: 基于CLIP等基础模型的开放词汇目标检测器会产生有偏的置信度分数，该分数混淆了视觉尺度与语义查询特异性。实验表明存在尺度偏差（大物体分数虚高）和语义偏差（通用查询分数被压制），这两种偏差在CLIP的图像级预训练中不可避免。参数无关的温度缩放校正可在不重新训练的情况下提升小物体Recall@10达19.6%，但会牺牲一定的排序精度。
AI.motivation: 揭示基于基础模型（如CLIP）的开放词汇目标检测器中置信度分数的根本缺陷：这些分数并非可靠的位置概率估计，而是错误地将视觉尺度与语义查询特异性混入检测信号中。作者旨在系统性地分析和量化这两种偏差。
AI.method: 在COCO数据集上对三种基于基础模型的检测器（GroundingDINO、OWL-ViT、YOLO-World）进行控制实验，并在LVIS（1203类）上用GroundingDINO复现尺度偏差发现。通过统计回归（α=+0.064, r=0.579, p=1.29×10⁻⁵⁸）量化尺度偏差，通过语义偏差系数（β=-0.705, p=5.23×10⁻⁴¹）量化语义偏差。提出参数无关的温度缩放校正方法。
AI.result: 尺度偏差（α=+0.064）系统性高估大物体分数；语义偏差（β=-0.705）抑制通用查询的分数。Oracle每尺度阈值调整下小物体ΔF1=+0.001而大物体ΔF1=+0.102，证明阈值调整无法消除偏差。温度缩放校正使小物体Recall@10提升19.6%（p<0.01），但以池化排序精度的一定损失为代价。
AI.conclusion: 这些发现揭示了将图像级基础模型适应到区域级检测任务的根本局限性：置信度偏差部分可逆但非免费，在推理阶段只能通过牺牲某些性能来部分修正。该偏差从CLIP的图像级预训练结构上看是不可避免的。

title: Efficient Online Proportional Sampling with Applications to Smoothed Online Learning
summary: We study the problem of efficient online proportional sampling from a high-dimensional domain under a $σ$-smoothed adversary, where the sampling distribution is induced by a dynamically evolving weight function defined over a sequence of piecewise-structured partitions. This setting captures a broad range of applications, including principal-agent games (e.g., pricing and contract design), and algorithm configuration and parameter tuning. The central challenge is maintaining an efficient data structure as the induced partition grows increasingly complex over time -- naively, the number of subregions can grow as $O(t^d)$ by round $t$ in $d$ dimensions. We design a data structure that supports efficient updates and proportional sampling while avoiding the cost of explicitly maintaining this exponential growth, where the discontinuities are structured from axis-parallel hyperplanes. Under a $σ$-smoothed adaptive adversary, we prove a tight $O(\sqrt{σT})$ bound on the depth of our data structure, and an $O(\log T)$ bound under a random-order adversary -- to our knowledge, the first such results for this class of problems. We apply this framework to online learning with piecewise-structured rewards, obtaining efficient no-regret algorithms under both full-information and bandit feedback, with provable sublinear regret guarantees.

AI.tldr: 本文研究高维空间中在线比例采样问题，设计了一种高效数据结构应对分段结构划分的指数级增长，在σ-平滑对抗下实现了O(√(σT))的深度界，并应用于在线学习获得亚线性遗憾保证。
AI.motivation: 在高维空间中，随着时间推移，分段结构划分的子区域数量可能呈O(t^d)指数级增长，导致传统方法无法高效维护。需要一种避免显式维护指数级增长的数据结构。
AI.method: 设计了一种支持高效更新和比例采样的数据结构，利用轴平行超平面结构化的不连续性，在σ-平滑自适应对抗下证明了O(√(σT))的深度界，在随机顺序对抗下证明了O(log T)的深度界。
AI.result: 首次在该类问题中证明了O(√(σT))和O(log T)的深度界，并将框架应用于在线学习，在全信息反馈和赌博反馈下均获得亚线性遗憾的免遗憾算法。
AI.conclusion: 提出的数据结构有效解决了高维在线比例采样中划分复杂度爆炸的问题，为分段结构奖励的在线学习提供了高效解决方案。

title: Playful AI in Professional Email: A Field Experiment on Tone and Recipient Engagement
summary: Large language models (LLMs) are rapidly reshaping workplace communication, yet whether AI-assisted writing changes how recipients actually behave, and through what channel, remains unknown. Here, in a randomized crossover field experiment, 121 employees across six companies sent work emails under three conditions over three weeks: unaided writing, GPT-5 rewriting in a playful tone, and GPT-5 rewriting in a professional tone. Across 16,880 emails, playful editing increased emotional positivity (B=+0.068, p<0.001), and professional editing decreased it (B=-0.041, p<0.001), yet neither condition directly altered open rates, reply rates, or response times. Instead, within-sender positivity strongly predicted both opening (OR=2.05) and replying (OR=3.32, p<0.001), a significant indirect pathway through which AI editing shaped behavior, in the absence of any direct effect. These findings suggest that AI-assisted communication shapes workplace engagement not through its use, but through the emotional tone of the language it produces.

AI.tldr: 通过121名员工、16880封邮件的随机交叉现场实验，发现GPT-5改写邮件虽能改变情绪基调（趣味性提升、专业性降低），但并未直接影响收件人的打开率、回复率或响应时间。然而，发送者邮件的情绪积极性却显著预测了收件人的打开与回复行为，表明AI通过改变语言情绪间接影响工作沟通效果。
AI.motivation: 探究AI辅助写作是否以及如何改变收件人的实际行为，填补现有研究在因果效应和行为机制上的空白。
AI.method: 随机交叉现场实验：121名员工（来自6家公司）在三周内分别在三种条件下发送工作邮件（无辅助、GPT-5趣味改写、GPT-5专业改写），共分析16880封邮件。
AI.result: 趣味改写增加情绪积极性（B=+0.068），专业改写降低情绪积极性（B=-0.041）；但两者均无直接效应。发送者情绪积极性显著预测打开（OR=2.05）和回复（OR=3.32）行为。
AI.conclusion: AI辅助沟通并非通过使用本身，而是通过改变语言的情绪基调来间接塑造工作场所的参与行为。

title: AsySplat: Efficient Asymmetric 3D Gaussian Splatting for Long-Sequence Scene Modeling
comment: The project page is at https://zhongyingji.github.io/asysplat/
summary: Recent generalizable 3D Gaussian Splatting models have advanced long-sequence novel view synthesis (NVS), but at the cost of substantial redundant computation. We identify that the redundancy can be mitigated based on two observations: (i) high-precision geometry is not strictly required for high-quality NVS; (ii) appearance learning is generally easier than geometry recovery. Motivated by these insights, we propose an asymmetric architecture that decouples geometry and appearance modeling. The geometry branch processes coarse-grained tokens with most of the parameters for multi-view reconstruction, while the appearance branch operates on fine-grained tokens to capture details using significantly fewer parameters. The two branches interact through bilateral connections, enabling mutual guidance for their respective tasks. This task-aware asymmetry reduces the computational redundancy and allocates the computation more judiciously, thereby increasing parameter efficiency and enabling smaller models to achieve strong performance. On 32-view 960P inputs, our model matches optimization-based methods while delivering nearly 800x speedup, and surpasses the zero-shot performance of state-of-the-art generalizable models with markedly fewer parameters and reduced training/inference overhead, achieving an overall efficiency improvement.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种非对称架构，将几何与外观建模解耦，通过任务感知的冗余计算减少，实现更高效的通用3D高斯泼溅模型，在长序列新视角合成中取得与优化方法相当的效果，同时速度提升近800倍。
AI.motivation: 现有通用3D高斯泼溅模型在长序列新视角合成中存在大量冗余计算，作者发现两个关键观察：高精度几何对高质量NVS并非严格必要，且外观学习通常比几何恢复更容易，因此希望减少冗余、提升计算效率。
AI.method: 提出非对称架构，将几何与外观建模分离：几何分支处理粗粒度token（大部分参数负责多视图重建），外观分支处理细粒度token（较少参数负责细节捕捉），两分支通过双向连接实现相互引导。
AI.result: 在32视图960P输入下，模型与基于优化的方法效果相当，同时实现近800倍加速；超越了现有最优通用模型的零样本性能，且参数量和训练/推理开销显著降低。
AI.conclusion: 任务感知的非对称设计有效减少了计算冗余，更合理地分配计算资源，从而提升参数效率，使得更小模型也能取得强性能，整体效率得到改善。

title: Enhanced Byzantine-Robust Federated Learning Via Truncated-Quadratic Loss for Heterogeneous Data
summary: Federated learning distributes data among $n$ clients, making it vulnerable to malicious attacks and data heterogeneity, which together pose challenges for robust learning. To tackle this issue, centered clipping and Huber aggregators have been exploited for Byzantine robustness. In this paper, we first demonstrate their equivalence via convex conjugate theory, and show that they can yield biased solutions in the presence of outliers, leading to failure under high data heterogeneity and a substantial fraction of outliers. Next, we propose a new robust aggregation rule that utilizes the truncated-quadratic (TQ) loss, effectively mitigating the biases of existing methods, such as centered clipping and Huber aggregators. We show that our aggregator achieves order-optimal Byzantine-robust learning under nonconvex loss functions and heterogeneous data, ultimately enhancing the reliability of federated learning systems. Additionally, we provide a robust deviation estimation strategy for TQ, demonstrating its effectiveness. Furthermore, we show that TQ maintains robustness even when only an estimate of the number of Byzantine clients is available. Finally, experimental results on MNIST, Fashion-MNIST, and CIFAR-10, indicate that our aggregator provides better robustness performance than the competing techniques.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于截断二次损失（TQ）的鲁棒聚合规则，解决了联邦学习中中心裁剪和Huber聚合器在高异构数据和大量异常值下产生有偏解的问题，并实现了阶最优的拜占庭鲁棒学习。
AI.motivation: 现有中心裁剪和Huber聚合器在处理高数据异构和大比例异常值时会产生有偏解，导致鲁棒联邦学习失败。
AI.method: 提出基于截断二次损失（TQ）的鲁棒聚合规则，利用凸共轭理论证明中心裁剪与Huber聚合器的等价性，并设计鲁棒偏差估计策略。
AI.result: TQ聚合器在非凸损失函数和异构数据下实现阶最优拜占庭鲁棒学习，并在MNIST、Fashion-MNIST和CIFAR-10上优于对比方法。
AI.conclusion: TQ聚合器有效缓解了现有方法的偏差，即使只知道拜占庭客户端数量的估计值也能保持鲁棒性，显著提升了联邦学习系统的可靠性。

title: Temporal Feature Distillation for Label-Efficient Precise Event Spotting in Sports Videos
summary: Precise Event Spotting (PES) requires distinguishing visually similar yet semantically distinct adjacent frames, making it fundamentally different from image classification and coarse action recognition. Although self-distillation methods such as DINO have shown strong representation learning ability in images, we find that directly applying them to PES is ineffective: without supervised guidance, subtle but crucial motion cues are often suppressed as noise, leading to representations that are insensitive to precise event boundaries. To address this, we propose Temporal Feature Distillation, a semi-supervised objective that aligns temporally informative backbone features, rather than projection-head outputs, to preserve motion-sensitive and boundary-aware cues for frame-level localization. A supervised warm-up with a ramp-up schedule further stabilizes training by ensuring that meaningful event cues are learned before unlabeled distillation begins. We also introduce Transformer Gate Shift, a multi-scale gated shifting module that injects motion-aware temporal information into Vision Transformers. Experiments on four fine-grained sports benchmarks show consistent improvements over fully supervised and semi-supervised baselines. Under 10\% supervision on FSPerf, our method improves mAP by 4.54 points over the strongest competing approach, and with only 80\% labeled data, it matches or surpasses the fully supervised 100\% baseline on two of the four datasets.

AI.tldr: 针对精准事件定位（PES）任务，本文提出了一种半监督时间特征蒸馏方法，通过对齐骨干网络的时间敏感特征而非投影头输出，并结合Transformer门控移位模块注入运动感知信息，在精细动作识别中显著优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有自蒸馏方法（如DINO）在图像分类上表现优异，但直接应用于精准事件定位（PES）时效果不佳，因为无监督训练会抑制细微但关键的运动线索，导致模型对事件边界不敏感。因此需要一种能保留运动敏感特征的方法。
AI.method: 提出Temporal Feature Distillation（时间特征蒸馏），对齐骨干网络的时间信息特征而非投影头输出，保留运动敏感和边界感知线索；采用带ramp-up调度的监督预热阶段稳定训练；提出Transformer Gate Shift（Transformer门控移位），一种多尺度门控移位模块，向Vision Transformer注入运动感知时间信息。
AI.result: 在四个细粒度体育基准数据集上持续优于全监督和半监督基线。在FSPerf上仅用10%标注数据时，mAP提升4.54点；仅用80%标注数据时，在两个数据集上达到或超越全监督100%基线的效果。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的半监督时间特征蒸馏方法能有效保留运动敏感线索，结合Transformer门控移位模块，显著提升了精准事件定位的性能，为精细动作识别提供了新的高效解决方案。

title: A Multi-Agent Framework for Zero-Dimensional Reduced-Order Model Planning
summary: Zero-dimensional reduced-order models (0D ROMs) are central to multi-dimensional design workflows for high-end complex equipment. However, the planning process currently relies on manual expertise, limiting topological exploration and prolonging iterations. Even traditional optimization methods such as Genetic Algorithms (GA) are typically confined to local parameter tuning. Although Large Language Model (LLM) agents have shown promise in exploring large sample spaces, and frameworks such as Chain of Thought (CoT) and Reason and Act (ReAct) improve reasoning reliability, while Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) overcomes domain knowledge barriers, a single agent still falls short for the long-horizon and highly coupled nature of complex 0D ROM planning. This paper proposes the Zero-dimensional reduced-order model CO-Planning framework (Z-COPA), a multi-agent architecture featuring a Symbolic Action Graph Engine (SAGE) and a MILP-Guided Navigation (MGN) optimizer. Its core innovation is a dedicated graph representation method that accurately encodes the 0D flow network topology, converting the empirical planning process into a rigorous graph structure optimization problem. We validate the forward and inverse design capabilities and generalization performance of Z-COPA on two real aircraft engine secondary-air systems, two IEEE power-distribution reconfiguration benchmarks, and two water-distribution network benchmarks. The results show superior task completion quality, obtaining the best performance in both forward and reverse design of air systems. Z-COPA disrupts the traditional 0D model planning paradigm, providing a new technical approach for exploring broader topological space and achieving highly automated, globally optimal air system architectures.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Z-COPA多智能体框架，通过符号动作图引擎和混合整数规划导航优化器，将0D降阶模型规划从经验驱动转为图结构优化，在航空发动机、电力配网和给水管网等基准测试中验证了其优越性能。
AI.motivation: 当前0D ROM规划依赖人工经验，限制了拓扑探索并延长了迭代周期；传统方法仅局限于局部参数调优，现有LLM单智能体框架在处理长周期、强耦合的复杂0D ROM规划任务时能力不足。
AI.method: 提出Z-COPA多智能体架构，包含符号动作图引擎（SAGE）和MILP引导导航（MGN）优化器，核心创新在于用专门的图表示方法准确编码0D流网络拓扑，将经验规划转化为严格的图结构优化问题。
AI.result: 在两个真实航空发动机二次空气系统、两个IEEE电力配电网重构基准和两个给水管网基准上验证，在空气系统的正向和逆向设计中均获得最优性能。
AI.conclusion: Z-COPA颠覆了传统0D模型规划范式，为探索更广泛的拓扑空间、实现高度自动化和全局最优的空气系统架构提供了新技术途径。

title: SynCLIP: Synonym-Coherent Language-Image Pretraining for Robust Open-Vocabulary Dense Perception
summary: Open-vocabulary dense perception (OVDP) aims to localize objects unseen during training by leveraging textual knowledge. Despite the remarkable progress of recent CLIP-based approaches, we identify a critical limitation: synonym-induced grounding inconsistency, where semantically equivalent expressions yield disparate spatial attention patterns. This inconsistency undermines the robustness and performance of existing methods in real-world OVDP applications. To address this issue, we propose SynCLIP, a Synonym-Coherent Language-Image Pretraining framework that enhances synonym-robust grounding for OVDP. SynCLIP introduces a Semantic-consistent Spatial Attention alignment (SSA) module to enhance spatial attention consistency by minimizing discrepancies between attention maps of original and synonymous expressions. Furthermore, a Spatial Attention Refinement (SAR) module selectively strengthens the most semantically relevant spatial regions within aligned maps for more precise and stable grounding. To support synonym-coherent pretraining, we also construct a Synonym-Enriched Visual Corpus (SEViC), which augments each category with multiple synonyms and textual definitions. Extensive experiments on multiple benchmarks demonstrate that SynCLIP substantially improves grounding consistency under diverse linguistic variants and achieves state-of-the-art performance among CLIP-based OVDP methods. Code is available at https://github.com/Justlovesmile/SynCLIP.

AI.tldr: SynCLIP通过语义一致性空间注意力对齐和选择性强化模块，解决了CLIP模型在开放词汇密集感知任务中因同义词引起的空间注意力不一致问题，在多个基准上达到SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 现有CLIP-based开放词汇密集感知方法存在同义词引发的空间注意力不一致问题，即语义等价的表达会产生不同的空间注意力模式，影响模型的鲁棒性和实际应用效果。
AI.method: 1) 语义一致空间注意力对齐(SSA)模块，通过最小化原始表达式与同义词表达之间的注意力图差异来增强空间注意力一致性；2) 空间注意力精炼(SAR)模块，选择性增强对齐图中最相关的语义空间区域；3) 构建同义词丰富视觉语料库(SEViC)，为每个类别扩充多个同义词和文本定义。
AI.result: 在多个基准上显著提升了同义词变体下的定位一致性，在CLIP-based开放词汇密集感知方法中达到SOTA性能。
AI.conclusion: SynCLIP有效解决了同义词引起的空间注意力不一致问题，为开放词汇密集感知任务提供了更鲁棒的语言-图像预训练框架。

title: TabPFN beyond Tabular Data: Calibration and Accuracy on Multimodal Embeddings
comment: 19 pages, 13 figures, 10 tables. Jingxiang Zhang and Lujia Zhong contributed equally. Code: https://github.com/Jingxiang-Zhang/tabpfn-multimodal-embeddings
summary: Few-shot multimodal classification commonly attaches a lightweight head, such as $k$-nearest neighbors, logistic regression, or a linear SVM, to a frozen pretrained encoder. Although computationally efficient, these heads can produce poorly calibrated confidence scores, limiting their reliability in calibration-sensitive applications. We evaluate TabPFN as a plug-and-play, zero-gradient classification head for frozen image, text, and audio encoders. Across 22{,}820 evaluation episodes spanning 14 datasets, 11 encoders, and three modalities, TabPFN achieves the best mean rank among nine classification heads on both negative log-likelihood (NLL) and expected calibration error (ECE). At a representative setting, it reduces NLL by 48--62\% and ECE by 2.1--5.3$\times$ relative to the average of the eight baselines while matching or exceeding their average accuracy. Its accuracy advantage is conditional, concentrating at moderate-to-high shot counts and low-to-moderate feature dimensions ($k \ge 50$, $d \le 32$), and diminishing when labeled data are scarce, feature dimensions are high, or competing methods approach ceiling accuracy. In targeted backbone-adaptation experiments, replacing the trained linear head with TabPFN substantially improves calibration while preserving competitive accuracy. These results provide empirical guidance for using TabPFN as a training-free head in calibration-sensitive multimodal classification. To support transparency and reproducibility, we publicly release the source code, experiment configurations, and evaluation scripts in our GitHub repository: https://github.com/Jingxiang-Zhang/tabpfn-multimodal-embeddings.

AI.tldr: 本文评估了TabPFN作为冻结多模态编码器的即插即用分类头，在14个数据集、11个编码器、三种模态上取得最优负对数似然和期望校准误差，相比基线平均降低NLL 48-62%、ECE 2.1-5.3倍，同时保持或超越分类精度，为校准敏感的多模态分类提供了无需训练的高效方案。
AI.motivation: 少样本多模态分类常用的轻量级分类头（如k近邻、逻辑回归、线性SVM）计算高效但置信度校准较差，限制了其在校准敏感应用中的可靠性。本文旨在探索一种无需梯度训练即能提升校准性能的分类头方法。
AI.method: 将TabPFN作为即插即用、零梯度的分类头，附加在冻结的图像、文本、音频编码器后，在22820个评估片段、14个数据集、11个编码器上，与9种分类头进行对比评估，测量负对数似然、期望校准误差和准确率。
AI.result: TabPFN在NLL和ECE上取得最佳平均排名；在代表性设置下，NLL降低48-62%，ECE降低2.1-5.3倍；准确率匹配或超越平均水平，优势集中在中等至高样本数（k≥50）和低至中特征维度（d≤32）场景；在骨干网络适配实验中，替换训练线性头可显著改善校准且保持竞争力。
AI.conclusion: TabPFN可作为校准敏感多模态分类中一个有效的无需训练的分类头，研究提供了其实用条件的经验指导，并公开代码和配置以支持可复现性。

title: Reference-Based Face Super-Resolution Using the Spatial Transformer
summary: Face super-resolution is the task of increasing the resolution of an image containing a face thereby adding finer detail. It is a ubiquitous task in many computer vision applications and quite often the user isn't even aware that it is being performed. However, doing it with high fidelity is challenging as it is an ill-posed problem. In this paper we present a reference-based solution for face super-resolution that uses higher resolution reference images to aid in the task. We show an alignment module based on the spatial transformer that is considerably more stable than the popular deformable convolutions. We also show an aggregation function that can take good quality information from the reference images when available or suppress the function when such information is unavailable. Finally, we show that our relatively smaller model can achieve state of the art results on multiple datasets. The source code is available at https://github.com/varun-jois/FSRST.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于参考图像的人脸超分辨率方法，使用空间变换器进行对齐，并设计了自适应聚合函数，在多个数据集上取得了最优结果。
AI.motivation: 人脸超分辨率是计算机视觉中的常见任务，但高保真度重建具有挑战性，因为这是一个病态问题。
AI.method: 提出基于参考图像的解决方案，采用空间变换器（Spatial Transformer）进行对齐（相比可变形卷积更稳定），并设计了能根据参考图像质量自适应聚合的函数。
AI.result: 较小的模型在多个数据集上取得了最先进的结果。
AI.conclusion: 参考图像可以有效辅助人脸超分辨率，空间变换器比可变形卷积更稳定，自适应聚合函数能灵活处理不同质量的参考图像。

title: When the Reward Suite Is Leaky: A Preregistered Causal Contrast of Natural Verifier False Positives in RLVR
comment: 37 pages, 2 figures. Code, frozen data, and complete audit records: https://github.com/toffee-desuwa/rlvr-leaky-suite
summary: The test suites used as RLVR rewards for code have natural false positives: per-task, persistent, asymmetric errors that accept the same wrong programs every time they appear, unlike the symmetric or resampled noise assumed by existing noise-robustness analyses. We run a preregistered two-arm causal contrast on a deployed suite: GRPO on identical MBPP tasks, seeds, and compute, rewarded by the original MBPP tests (leaky) versus the MBPP+ extra tests (hardened). Two further families replicate the design under a preregistration frozen before their data existed. [C] The average held-out effect is bounded: non-inferior under a preregistered 1.5-pt margin (gap 0.20 pt, one-sided 95% upper bound 0.75 pt). [C] Rewarded false-positive mass tracks a cheap static leakiness audit computed before training (Spearman 0.80), and the registered train-side test puts the leak-stratum FP share +43.8 pt above clean tasks. [E] Auditing every rewarded FP under signed, human-adjudicated rules finds a large residual of verified genuinely wrong code: 47.57% record-weighted; both replication families reproduce a large share. The reward paid for real bugs, not merely suite artifacts. [E] Mechanism evidence is consistent with selection of pre-existing error modes rather than learned exploitation: FP incidence does not grow within our horizon, and untrained base models already produce the same wrong outputs under the leaky filter. We then turn the same instrument on the frontier judges themselves: on their own false positives they self-assess only weakly, a same-author test is unresolved, and even the highest-scoring reader we probe stays far below its score on a weaker policy's errors -- two subjects on MBPP, licensing nothing about frontier models in general. A cheap static audit locates exposure before training; hardening the reward removes the measurement inflation, though here it buys little capability.

AI.tldr: 本文研究代码RLVR奖励中测试套件的假阳性问题，发现其具有持续性、非对称性等特征。通过预注册的对照实验（MBPP原始测试 vs MBPP+强化测试），验证了平均保留效果在非劣效边界内（差距0.20pt，95%上界0.75pt），并证明假阳性质量与静态泄露审计高度相关（Spearman 0.80）。审计发现47.57%的奖励支付给了真正的错误代码，机制证据表明是预存错误模式的选择而非学习利用。此外，前沿模型对自身假阳性自我评估较弱。
AI.motivation: 代码RLVR奖励中使用的测试套件存在自然假阳性——每个任务中持续、非对称的错误，会反复接受相同的错误程序，这与现有噪声鲁棒性分析假设的对称或重采样噪声不同。本文旨在量化这类假阳性的影响，并探索检测和缓解方法。
AI.method: 采用预注册的双臂因果对照实验：在相同MBPP任务、种子和计算资源下，使用GRPO方法，分别用原始MBPP测试（泄露组）和MBPP+额外测试（强化组）作为奖励。两个复制家族在数据存在前冻结预注册以复制设计。使用静态泄露审计、签名人工裁决规则等进行机制分析。
AI.result: 平均保留效果非劣效（差距0.20pt，95%上界0.75pt）。奖励假阳性质量与静态泄露审计高度相关（Spearman 0.80），泄露层FP份额比干净任务高43.8pt。47.57%的记录加权为真实错误代码。假阳性发生率在观察期内未增长，未训练的基础模型已在泄露过滤下产生相同错误输出。
AI.conclusion: 代码RLVR奖励的假阳性是真实存在的且可被静态审计检测到。强化奖励可以消除测量膨胀，但在此场景下对能力提升有限。前沿模型对自身假阳性自我评估较弱，该结果仅适用于MBPP上的两个主体，不能推广到所有前沿模型。

title: RTFVE: Realtime Face Video Enhancement
summary: There's been a surge in adoption of video conferencing applications for both personal and business use cases. However, the bandwidth limitations faced by many users worldwide may restrict the optimal use of such applications. Although deep learning offers a solution for enhancing low bit rate videos, most models today are either hard to incorporate with modern compression standards or require specialized hardware to run such as significant GPUs making these models impractical. To address these issues, we introduce the Realtime Face Video Enhancement (RTFVE) model which can be easily incorporated with any video decoder and can run in realtime on ordinary CPUs. Experiments show that our model improves perceptual quality over the compressed video baseline at multiple low bitrate settings. The source code will be made available at https://github.com/varun-jois/RTFVE.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为RTFVE的实时人脸视频增强模型，可轻松集成到任何视频解码器中，在普通CPU上实时运行，有效提升低码率视频的感知质量。
AI.motivation: 视频会议应用广泛使用，但许多用户面临带宽限制；现有深度学习模型难以与现代压缩标准集成或需要专用GPU硬件，实用性差。
AI.method: 提出RTFVE（Realtime Face Video Enhancement）模型，可轻松与任何视频解码器集成，在普通CPU上实时运行。
AI.result: 在多个低码率设置下，RTFVE模型相比压缩视频基线显著提升了感知质量。
AI.conclusion: RTFVE模型为低码率视频增强提供了实用高效的解决方案，兼顾了兼容性和实时性。

title: Domain-Aware Scaling Laws Uncover Data Synergy
summary: Machine learning progress is often attributed to scaling model size and dataset volume, yet the composition of data can be just as consequential. Empirical findings repeatedly show that combining datasets from different domains yields nontrivial interactions. For instance, adding code improves mathematical reasoning, while certain mixtures introduce interference that reduces model performance. We refer to these effects collectively as data synergy, where the contribution of multiple domains exceeds or falls short of the sum of their isolated contributions. In this work, we formalize and quantify data synergy in language model pretraining. Leveraging observational variation across open-weight LLMs with diverse pretraining mixtures, we estimate both direct domain-to-benchmark synergy (how one domain contributes to performance on another) and a second-order domain-domain synergy (capabilities that require co-occurrence of multiple domains). Our framework improves predictive accuracy over domain-agnostic scaling laws and recovers stable synergy estimates. We validate these estimates by training models on predicted optimal and predicted anti-optimal mixtures and confirm that our synergy estimates correctly predict performance rankings.

AI.tldr: 本文形式化并量化了语言模型预训练中的数据协同效应（Data Synergy），提出了一种框架来估计领域间直接协同和二阶协同，并通过实验验证了该框架能准确预测不同数据混合策略下的模型性能排名。
AI.motivation: 现有研究多关注模型规模和数据集总量对性能的影响，但数据组成（特别是多领域数据混合时的交互效应）同样关键，却缺乏系统性的形式化与量化方法。
AI.method: 利用开源大语言模型在预训练混合数据上的观测差异，分别估计了直接领域-基准协同（一个领域对另一领域基准的贡献）和二阶领域-领域协同（需要多个领域共现才能产生的能力），并基于此改进了缩放定律的预测精度。
AI.result: 该框架相比领域无关的缩放定律显著提升了预测准确性，并能稳定恢复协同估计值；在最优和反最优混合策略的训练实验中，协同估计正确预测了模型性能排名。
AI.conclusion: 数据协同是预训练中不可忽视的因素，形式化量化协同效应可指导更优的数据混合策略，从而更高效地提升模型能力。

title: FSFVE: Few Shot Compressed Face Video Enhancement
summary: Videocalling has become a popular form of communication in the world today, with many companies providing free services for it. However, there are still millions of people around the world that experience poor quality videocalls due to limitations in bandwidth. This despite, most people having the required hardware. In this paper we present a novel framework for enhancing highly compressed videocalls. We show, that with as little as 10 frames of the face, we can rapidly (in under 100 seconds) train a model to enhance that instance of the videocall. The model can be trained either prior to or during the call, enhancing the rest of the call by producing better quality video. The video conferencing application need not be modified - it can be off the shelf with our system as a layer on top that trains quickly then simply lets the video conferencing application (e.g. Zoom) run as usual, where our system intercepts and improves images before they are displayed. The model is designed to run in realtime on low-compute devices such as a typical laptop CPU. Experimentally, we show that the model significantly improves quality of compressed face video both quantitatively as well as perceptually. Code can be found at https://github.com/varun-jois/FSFVE.

AI.tldr: 提出一种轻量级框架，利用仅10帧人脸数据在100秒内训练模型，实时增强低带宽下视频通话的画质，且无需修改现有视频会议应用。
AI.motivation: 尽管视频通话普及，但仍有数百万用户因带宽限制体验低质量视频通话，而大多数人已具备所需硬件，因此需要一种能提升压缩视频通话质量的轻量级解决方案。
AI.method: 提出一个框架，使用少量人脸帧（10帧）快速训练模型（<100秒），作为视频会议应用之上的额外层，拦截并增强压缩视频帧。模型可在通话前或通话中训练，支持在低功耗设备（如笔记本CPU）上实时运行。
AI.result: 实验表明，该模型在量化指标和感知质量上均显著提升了压缩人脸视频的质量。
AI.conclusion: 提出了一种无需修改现有视频会议应用、可在低算力设备实时运行的快速训练框架，能有效增强低带宽下的视频通话质量，代码已开源。

title: AeroMELD: A Linear Embedding of Aerosol Populations for Diagnostics and Latent Dynamics
summary: Accurately representing atmospheric aerosol populations is essential for simulating aerosol-cloud interactions, radiative forcing, and ice nucleation, yet existing reduced schemes impose structural assumptions that limit their ability to capture composition diversity and mixing state. Machine-learning approaches offer more flexible representations, but standard autoencoders do not preserve the mathematical structure of aerosol populations and therefore cannot support physically meaningful process operators. We introduce AeroMELD (Aerosol Measure Embedding for Latent Dynamics), a mathematically grounded framework for constructing low-dimensional latent variables that retain this structure. We show that any permutation-invariant linear encoder must take a scale-shape decomposition, with total number concentration represented explicitly and latent shape given by a barycentric combination of per-particle embeddings. This aggregated latent state retains the diagnostic expressiveness of a Deep Sets model by moving the nonlinear post-aggregation stage into the learned diagnostic map while preserving latent linearity. Using particle-resolved data as ground truth, we encode weighted particle populations directly rather than binned aerosol states; size-resolved mass and number distributions serve only as diagnostic targets and visual summaries. The latent space accurately reconstructs these distributions, CCN spectra, optical coefficients, and immersion-freezing behavior while preserving the linear population structure needed for hybrid ML-physics models. Although the experiments focus on diagnostic reconstruction, the embedding is designed so that emissions and mixing can be represented exactly and nonlinear microphysical processes learned in a controlled latent space. This work establishes a foundation for learning aerosol-process evolution directly in latent space.

AI.tldr: 本文提出AeroMELD框架，通过数学严格的置换不变线性编码器将气溶胶群体表示为尺度-形状分解的潜变量，在保留线性结构的同时实现诊断重建，为混合ML-物理模型奠定基础。
AI.motivation: 现有气溶胶简化方案因结构假设无法捕捉成分多样性和混合态，标准自编码器又不保留数学结构，无法支持有物理意义的过程算子。
AI.method: 提出AeroMELD框架：任何置换不变线性编码器必须采用尺度-形状分解，总数浓度显式表示，潜形状由逐粒子嵌入的重心组合给出；通过非线性后聚合诊断映射保留Deep Sets的表达力，同时保持潜空间线性。
AI.result: 潜空间准确重建了粒径分布、CCN谱、光学系数和冻结行为，同时保留了混合ML-物理模型所需的线性群体结构。
AI.conclusion: 为在潜空间中学习气溶胶过程演化建立了数学基础，排放和混合可精确表示，非线性微物理过程可在受控潜空间中学习。

title: WiFi-JEPA: Self-supervised Learning for WiFi-CSI 3D Human Pose Estimation
summary: WiFi Channel State Information (CSI) enables privacy-preserving human pose sensing in camera-denied environments, but existing WiFi-based pose estimators often fail under environment shifts and rely on costly camera-based annotation pipelines that limit scale. We propose WiFi-JEPA, a self-supervised framework that learns CSI-native representations by predicting masked latent embeddings instead of reconstructing raw CSI signals that may contain hardware-specific artifacts. WiFi-JEPA makes three contributions: (i) CSI-specific tokenization and link masking tailored to the CSI tensor over channel, time, and link (C,T,L); masking entire Tx-Rx antenna links forces the model to predict one spatial link view from others, capturing cross-link correlations informative of 3D spatial structure. (ii) A ray-tracing CSI simulation pipeline that generates diverse unlabeled CSI from randomized geometric primitives, providing scalable pre-training data without pose annotations. (iii) State-of-the-art results on Person-in-WiFi-3D: WiFi-JEPA outperforms prior WiFi-CSI baselines on both single- and multi-person 3D pose estimation under the same evaluation protocol. We also show that simulated CSI provides complementary pre-training signal to real CSI, and that four vision-native SSL objectives degrade performance below training from scratch, whereas WiFi-JEPA consistently improves downstream pose estimation.

AI.tldr: WiFi-JEPA是一个自监督学习框架，通过预测掩码潜在嵌入而非重建原始CSI信号，学习CSI原生表示，在多人3D姿态估计中达到SOTA，并利用射线追踪仿真生成无标注训练数据。
AI.motivation: 现有WiFi姿态估计器在环境变化时容易失效，且依赖昂贵的摄像头标注流程，难以规模化。
AI.method: 提出WiFi-JEPA框架：(1) CSI特异性分词和链路掩码，将整个Tx-Rx天线链路掩码，迫使模型从其他链路预测空间视图；(2) 基于射线追踪的CSI仿真管线，从随机几何体生成多样化无标注CSI；(3) 使用掩码潜在嵌入预测替代原始信号重建。
AI.result: 在Person-in-WiFi-3D数据集上，WiFi-JEPA在单人和多人3D姿态估计均超越先前WiFi-CSI基线；仿真CSI可提供真实CSI的互补预训练信号；四个视觉SSL目标均降低性能，WiFi-JEPA持续提升下游任务。
AI.conclusion: WiFi-JEPA通过自监督学习和仿真数据生成，有效克服环境泛化问题，为无摄像头场景下的规模化人体感知提供了可行方案。

title: Link Adaptation Using Joint-Thompson Sampling
summary: The choice of Modulation and Coding (MCS) type for a particular channel condition is made through link adaptation (LA) algorithms that operate at the MAC layer. These algorithms rely on the ACK/NACK statistics and the channel quality index (CQI) feedback. Several existing works model LA as a multi-armed bandit (MAB) problem across cellular and Wi-Fi links. In the MAB formulation, each available MCS is a Bernoulli arm parameterized by its transmission success probability, and the goal is to design a selection strategy that accrues maximum reward. Several popular MAB algorithms, such as upper confidence bound (UCB) and Thompson Sampling (TS), have been proposed in the literature. Using the fact that MCS success probabilities are ordered, we propose the Joint-Thompson Sampling (Joint-TS) algorithm. Unlike classical TS, which assumes independent Beta distributions for each arm, Joint-TS utilizes a multivariate ordered Beta distribution as the prior to preserve the inherent monotonicity of success probabilities. Our simulation results show that while existing MAB algorithms fail in specific scenarios, Joint-TS delivers competitive throughput with robust, consistent performance in all scenarios.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Joint-Thompson Sampling (Joint-TS)算法，利用MCS成功概率的单调性，采用多元有序Beta分布作为先验，在链路自适应场景中实现了比传统MAB算法更鲁棒且一致的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有MAB算法（如UCB、Thompson Sampling）在解决MCS选择问题时，忽略了不同调制编码方案成功概率之间固有的单调顺序关系，导致在某些场景下性能不佳。
AI.method: 提出Joint-Thompson Sampling算法，使用多元有序Beta分布作为先验，取代传统TS中假设各arm独立的Beta分布，从而保留成功概率的单调性约束。
AI.result: 仿真结果表明，现有MAB算法在某些特定场景下会失效，而Joint-TS在所有场景下均能提供具有竞争力的吞吐量，且性能鲁棒一致。
AI.conclusion: 利用MCS成功概率的单调有序特性设计Joint-TS算法，可以有效提升链路自适应中MCS选择的鲁棒性和一致性。

title: DDR-Net: Haze-Aware Dual-Domain Refinement for Single-Image Dehazing
summary: Single-image dehazing aims to recover clear scenes from haze-degraded images. It remains challenging due to the atmospheric scattering and the complexity of real-world haze distributions. Although recent end-to-end networks have achieved promising performance, two issues still limit their effectiveness: insufficient feature refinement at the bottleneck stage and weak local structural representation in encoder-decoder architectures. Thus, we propose a Haze-Aware Dual-Domain Refinement Network (DDR-Net) for single-image dehazing. Our method is built upon three modules: Haze Prior Extractor (HPE) provides multi-scale haze-aware priors by operating directly on downsampled hazy images; Detail-Enhanced Blocks (DE Blocks) serve as the core feature extraction units, capturing multi-scale structural information and enhancing edge and texture recovery via gradient-aware convolutions; and Spatial-Frequency Bottleneck Refinement (SFBR) at the bottleneck jointly exploits spatial and frequency information to refine bottleneck features. DDR-Net achieves more effective feature representation and reconstruction for haze removal. Extensive experiments on real-world benchmarks demonstrate that our method outperforms existing dehazing approaches. It achieves competitive performance on synthetic datasets.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于雾感知的双域细化网络（DDR-Net），通过雾先验提取、细节增强和空间-频率瓶颈细化三个模块，在真实和合成数据集上均取得了优异的去雾性能。
AI.motivation: 现有单图像去雾方法存在瓶颈阶段特征细化不足以及编码器-解码器架构中局部结构表示能力弱的问题，限制了去雾效果。
AI.method: 提出DDR-Net，包含三个模块：HPE（多尺度雾感知先验提取）、DE Blocks（梯度感知卷积增强边缘纹理）、SFBR（空间-频率联合瓶颈细化）。
AI.result: 在真实世界基准测试中超越现有方法，在合成数据集上达到竞争性性能。
AI.conclusion: DDR-Net通过多模块协同设计，有效提升了特征表示和重建能力，为单图像去雾提供了更优方案。

title: Adapting Evidential Neural Networks to Test-Time Neighbor Fusion Improves Molecular Property Prediction
comment: 45 pages (18 main, 27 SI); 11 figures (7 main, 4 SI); 14 tables (0 main, 14 SI); 61 equations (15 main, 46 SI)
summary: A trained molecular property model can be refined at test time by correcting each prediction with the measured labels of the most similar training molecules, a retraining-free procedure we call neighbor fusion; evidential neural networks make it principled by using their aleatoric and epistemic uncertainty to parameterize a Bayesian update. Our main contribution, PG-EVIKAL, learns a property-distance metric to re-rank structurally similar neighbors by their property relevance before fusion, building on EVIKAL (scalar Kalman filter) and GP-EVIKAL (Gaussian process variant handling correlated neighbors). Evaluated on 16 molecular datasets, PG-EVIKAL reduces RMSE relative to the evidential model baseline on 14 of them, with a median reduction of 19.4%, and improves calibration; in sequential-assay scenarios it further incorporates newly measured molecules, refining predictions as they arrive without retraining. This work demonstrates that evidential uncertainty decomposition is not merely a calibration objective but an actionable inference resource that enables test-time refinement of molecular property predictions.

AI.tldr: 提出PG-EVIKAL方法，利用证据神经网络的认知不确定性和偶然不确定性，在测试时通过最相似训练分子的标签校正分子性质预测，无需重新训练，在16个分子数据集上中位RMSE降低19.4%。
AI.motivation: 现有分子性质模型在测试时无法利用已知标签进行预测校正，需要重新训练；证据神经网络的不确定性分解具有潜在价值但未被充分用于测试时推理。
AI.method: 1) 邻居融合：用最相似训练分子的测量标签校正每个预测；2) 证据神经网络用偶然不确定性和认知不确定性参数化贝叶斯更新；3) PG-EVIKAL学习性质-距离度量，在融合前按性质相关性重新排序结构相似的邻居；4) 基于EVIKAL（标量卡尔曼滤波）和GP-EVIKAL（高斯过程变体处理相关邻居）。
AI.result: 在16个分子数据集中，14个上RMSE低于证据模型基线，中位降低19.4%，且校准效果改善；在序贯分析场景中无需重新训练即可持续精化预测。
AI.conclusion: 证据不确定性分解不仅是校准目标，更是一种可操作的推理资源，能够实现分子性质预测的测试时精化。

title: Do Video-LLMs Actually Watch? Diagnosing Character-Tracking Failures in Long-Form Video
summary: Can a Video Large Language Model (Video-LLM) follow one person through a long video, keeping track of who they are well enough to report, in order, how their outfit changes across a full TV episode? Benchmarks increasingly score this kind of task, and the strongest open-source 7--8B models now reach 37--38% on InfiniBench's global appearance task, which asks exactly that. But does that score come from tracking the named character, or from something easier? We test this with a nine-condition diagnostic protocol applied to three architecturally distinct open-source Video-LLMs, with Gemini~2.5~Flash as a frontier reference, and find the accuracy does not come from character tracking. When we change the character named in the question to a different cast member, leaving the video and answer options untouched, the models change their answer only 4--31% of the time, so they are largely ignoring who the question asks about. Breaking that test down by the gender of the swapped name shows why: the models react more when the name is changed to a different-gender character than to a same-gender one (a 13--28 point gap), picking up coarse gender cues but unable to tell same-gender individuals apart. This shallow processing surfaces again when we drop the multiple-choice options and ask the same questions open-endedly: open-source accuracy drops 18--25 points, with none of 151 answers fully correct, versus a 12-point drop for Gemini. Further checks rule out the obvious innocent explanations, adding subtitles, using the most informative frames, or doubling the number of frames all leave character tracking unimproved, so the bottleneck is not how much video the model sees but how it ties that video to the person the question names. We release a diagnostic toolkit for auditing what such benchmark scores actually measure.

AI.tldr: 本文发现，视频大语言模型( Video-LLM )在跟踪特定人物外貌变化任务上的高准确率并非来自真正的人物追踪，而是依赖于性别等粗浅线索，当换用同性别角色名时模型几乎不改变答案。
AI.motivation: 当前视频大语言模型在长视频人物跟踪任务上取得了看似可观的准确率（如7-8B模型在InfiniBench上达37-38%），但这种能力是否真正来自对指定角色的跟踪存疑，作者旨在探究这些分数背后的真实机制。
AI.method: 设计了九个条件的诊断协议，对三个架构不同的开源Video-LLM进行测试，以Gemini 2.5 Flash作为前沿参考；具体包括：更换问题中的人名（分同性别/不同性别）、去除多选题选项改为开放式回答、添加字幕、使用信息最丰富的帧、加倍帧数等对比实验。
AI.result: 模型只会在人名称换为不同性别时改变答案（差距13-28个百分点），同性别换名几乎不改变答案（仅4-31%）；开放式问答中开源模型准确率下降18-25个百分点，151个回答无一个完全正确；添加字幕、优化帧选择、加倍帧数均无法改善人物跟踪能力。
AI.conclusion: 当前Video-LLM在人物跟踪任务上的benchmark分数具有欺骗性，模型实际上依赖于性别等粗浅线索而非真正理解问题所指的人物，该瓶颈不在于模型看到了多少视频内容，而在于如何将视频信息与问题中命名的人物关联起来。

title: Multi-dimensional training-priority weighting based on physical information propagation paths: a unified residual-weighting framework for physics-informed neural networks
summary: Physics-informed neural networks (PINNs) have shown promise for solving partial differential equations (PDEs); however, their synchronous optimization treats residuals of different regions and constraints equally, which is inconsistent with the progressive "from source to response" physical information propagation path, degrading training stability and accuracy. Existing causal training methods focus mainly on the temporal dimension, lacking a unified characterization of spatial and boundary dimensions. To address this, we define a unified class of training priorities according to the physical information propagation path: premise regions should be learned before dependent regions; temporal, spatial, and boundary priorities are instances of this principle. Using neural tangent kernel (NTK) dynamics, we theoretically analyze why standard PINNs do not obey this priority: their residual convergence order is governed by the NTK spectrum and is independent of the propagation path. Accordingly, we propose a unified multi-dimensional priority-constraint framework that partitions the domain along the propagation path and constructs negative-exponential residual weights, converting the physical propagation order into a training priority. For cases with coexisting priorities, we introduce a directional compatibility coefficient to clarify that "orthogonal directions can be coupled multiplicatively in synergy, whereas coaxial opposite directions cannot." Benchmark cases show that this method consistently improves the convergence behavior and prediction accuracy of PINNs on problems with clear propagation paths or constraint-dominated structures, without modifying the network architecture and with controllable additional computational cost.

AI.tldr: 针对物理信息神经网络(PINNs)同步优化忽略物理信息"从源到响应"传播路径的问题，提出统一多维优先级约束框架，通过负指数残差权重将物理传播顺序转化为训练优先级，理论分析NTK动力学证明标准PINNs不遵循该优先级，实验表明该方法在不修改网络架构下提升收敛与精度。
AI.motivation: 标准PINNs的同步优化对不同区域和约束的残差一视同仁，这与物理信息"从源到响应"的渐进传播路径不一致，导致训练稳定性与精度下降；现有因果训练方法主要关注时间维度，缺乏对空间和边界维度的统一表征。
AI.method: 定义基于物理信息传播路径的统一训练优先级类（前提区域先于依赖区域学习）；利用神经正切核(NTK)动力学理论分析标准PINNs不遵循优先级的原因（残差收敛阶由NTK谱支配，与传播路径无关）；提出统一多维优先级约束框架，沿传播路径划分域并构造负指数残差权重；针对共存的优先级引入方向兼容性系数处理正交与共轴方向关系。
AI.result: 在具有清晰传播路径或约束主导结构的问题上，该方法持续改善PINNs的收敛行为和预测精度，无需修改网络架构，额外计算成本可控。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的统一多维优先级约束框架有效将物理传播顺序转化为训练优先级，解决了标准PINNs忽视物理信息传播路径导致的训练问题，为PINNs在复杂物理问题上的应用提供了理论依据和实用方法。

title: Controlling Motion Transfer in Diffusion Transformers via Attention Heads
comment: Accepted to ECCV 2026, Project page: https://sunyj-hxppy.github.io/halo/
summary: Diffusion Transformers (DiTs) have advanced video generation with high-quality, temporally coherent results. However, extending them to motion transfer, which requires following reference motion while aligning with a target prompt, remains challenging due to limited understanding of motion and structure representations within DiTs. We analyze video DiTs at the attention-head level and identify distinct heads specialized for motion and spatial structure. Based on this insight, we propose a head-aware controllable motion transfer framework that requires no parameter updates. Our method refines motion cues from motion-specialized heads via semantic correspondence guidance and preserves structure through selective feature injection. This head-level control not only enables accurate motion transfer but also provides an interpretable foundation for controllable video generation with DiTs.

AI.tldr: 本文发现视频DiT中不同注意力头分别处理运动与空间结构，据此提出无需参数更新的头部感知运动迁移框架，通过语义对应引导优化运动头、选择性特征注入保留结构，实现精准运动迁移。
AI.motivation: 现有DiT在视频生成中表现优异，但扩展到运动迁移任务时，由于对DiT内部运动与结构表征的理解有限，难以在遵循参考运动的同时与目标提示对齐。
AI.method: 1) 在注意力头层面分析视频DiT，识别出专门处理运动和空间结构的头部；2) 提出无需参数更新的头部感知可控运动迁移框架；3) 通过语义对应引导优化运动专用头部的运动线索；4) 通过选择性特征注入保留结构信息。
AI.result: 实现精准的运动迁移，同时为基于DiT的可控视频生成提供可解释的基础。
AI.conclusion: 头部级别的控制不仅能实现准确的运动迁移，还为DiT的可控视频生成提供了可解释的理论基础。

title: A Novel Graph Fraud Detector via Grouped Attribute Completion and Confidence-Aware Contrastive Learning
summary: Graph fraud detection plays a pivotal role in safeguarding the security and integrity of modern digital ecosystems. Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) are commonly adopted for graph fraud detection. However, the practical performance of existing GNN-based detectors is severely hindered by incomplete node attributes and extreme class imbalance within graphs. To mitigate these limitations, this paper proposes a novel framework for Graph Fraud Detection with Grouped attribute completion and Confidence-aware Contrastive learning, named GFD-GC. Specifically, it first imitates heterogeneous neighborhood structures to implement group-wise aggregation, which obtains informative complete node features by capturing fine-grained graph contextual patterns. Further, it introduces a confidence-aware supervised contrastive learning strategy to augment scarce labeled fraud nodes with high confidence pseudo-fraud nodes, which enhances the compactness of fraud representations and their separability from non-fraud nodes. Extensive experiments demonstrate the superiority of the proposed GFD-GC over state-of-the-art baselines on the graph fraud detection task, thereby providing an effective solution for real-world fraud scenarios.

AI.tldr: 本文提出GFD-GC框架，通过分组属性补全和置信度感知对比学习，解决图欺诈检测中属性不完整和类别不平衡问题。
AI.motivation: 现有基于GNN的图欺诈检测方法受限于节点属性不完整和极端类别不平衡问题，性能严重下降。
AI.method: 1) 通过模拟异构邻域结构进行分组聚合，捕获细粒度图上下文模式以补全节点属性；2) 引入置信度感知的监督对比学习策略，利用高置信度伪欺诈节点增强欺诈表示紧凑性及与非欺诈节点的可分离性。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上，GFD-GC优于现有最先进的图欺诈检测基线方法。
AI.conclusion: GFD-GC为真实场景下的欺诈检测提供了有效解决方案。

title: CUST: Clustered Unit-level Similarity Transformer for Lightweight Image Super-Resolution
summary: Recently, Vision Transformer (ViT)-based models have exhibited remarkable performance in image super-resolution. However, the quadratic computational complexity of ViTs with respect to spatial resolution severely constrains their efficiency, leading to high latency and massive memory consumption. To alleviate this, various window-based attention mechanisms have been proposed; yet, they inherently compromise the long-range dependency modeling that is the primary advantage of ViTs. To overcome these limitations, we propose the Clustered Unit-level Similarity Transformer (CUST), a novel architecture that efficiently integrates global and local information. Specifically, CUST enables each patch to aggregate and attend to similar patches within a broadened regional scope outside its local window, thereby capturing extensive contextual understanding. Furthermore, it employs overlapping attention windows to capture local dependencies, while explicitly extracting high-frequency details by computing the residual difference between the original features and their downsampled-upsampled counterparts. Comprehensive experiments demonstrate that our proposed model achieves a practical balance between computational efficiency and restoration performance. It achieves a lower memory footprint and faster inference speed compared to recent global context or lightweight models under realistic constraints. Code is available at [https://github.com/jwgdmkj/CUST].

AI.tldr: 提出CUST模型，通过聚类单元级相似性注意力机制，在保持全局和局部信息建模能力的同时，显著降低ViT的计算开销，实现高效超分辨率重建。
AI.motivation: ViT在图像超分辨率中表现优异，但其自注意力的二次计算复杂度导致高延迟和大量内存消耗；现有窗口注意力机制虽降低计算量，却牺牲了长距离依赖建模能力。
AI.method: 1) 聚类单元级相似性注意力：让每个patch在局部窗口之外聚合相似patch进行全局建模；2) 重叠注意力窗口捕获局部依赖；3) 通过原始特征与下采样-上采样特征的残差差异显式提取高频细节。
AI.result: 在保持恢复性能的同时，内存占用更低、推理速度更快，优于现有全局上下文或轻量级模型。
AI.conclusion: CUST在计算效率和重建性能之间实现了实用平衡，为ViT在图像超分辨率中的高效应用提供了新思路。

title: Neural Discovery of Memory and Nonlocal Kernels in Integro-Differential Equations with Constrained Kolmogorov--Arnold Networks
summary: Discovering the memory or nonlocal kernel governing an integro-differential equation (IDE) from sparse and noisy observations is an ill-posed inverse problem. Existing identification methods often rely on problem-specific analytical derivations, specialized observation requirements, or restrictive assumptions about the kernel, limiting their applicability across different classes of IDEs. In this work, we propose a differentiable-solver-based framework for discovering memory and nonlocal kernels directly from spatiotemporal observations. Within the solver, the unknown kernel is represented using a constrained Kolmogorov--Arnold Network (KAN) parameterization, with the physical constraints imposed through two different approaches: a Bernstein-polynomial-based Monotone--Convex KAN (MC-KAN), whose coefficient constraints enforce positivity, monotonic decrease, and convexity by construction, and a Chebyshev-based KAN (Cheb-KAN), in which the same properties are encouraged through soft penalty terms. After training, symbolic regression is applied to the learned kernels to obtain interpretable closed-form representations. We evaluate both methods on benchmarks spanning a one-dimensional Volterra equation, a one-dimensional viscoelastic wave partial integro-differential equation, and a two-dimensional nonlocal reaction-diffusion equation with an anisotropic coupled kernel. For the 1D problems, both methods recover the correct kernel functional form and achieve comparable solution-reconstruction accuracy. In contrast, for the sparse and noisy 2D nonlocal problem, the hard-constrained MC-KAN consistently achieves lower kernel reconstruction errors than the soft-constrained Cheb-KAN. Our results demonstrate that enforcing physically motivated shape constraints by construction provides greater robustness than soft penalties for multidimensional kernel discovery from sparse and noisy observations.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于可微求解器的框架，利用约束KAN网络（MC-KAN和Cheb-KAN）从稀疏含噪时空观测数据中识别积分微分方程的记忆或非局部核，并通过符号回归获得可解释的闭式表达。实验表明，硬约束MC-KAN在多维核发现中比软约束Cheb-KAN更鲁棒。
AI.motivation: 现有识别方法依赖问题特定的解析推导、专门的观测要求或对核的 restrictive 假设，缺乏通用性。本文旨在提出一个统一的、可微求解器驱动的框架，能够从稀疏含噪观测中直接发现不同IDE类别的核函数。
AI.method: 将未知核用约束KAN网络参数化：MC-KAN通过Bernstein多项式系数约束强制执行正性、单调递减和凸性；Cheb-KAN通过Chebyshev基函数加软惩罚项鼓励相同性质。嵌入可微求解器进行联合训练，最后对学到的核应用符号回归得到闭式表达。
AI.result: 在1D Volterra方程、1D粘弹性波PIDE和2D非局部反应扩散方程上测试。1D问题中两种方法均能恢复正确核函数形式且精度相当；2D稀疏含噪问题中，硬约束MC-KAN的核重建误差始终低于软约束Cheb-KAN。
AI.conclusion: 在稀疏含噪观测下，采用硬物理约束（如MC-KAN）比软惩罚约束（如Cheb-KAN）更具鲁棒性，更适合多维非局部核的发现任务。

title: Why Low-Light Cameras Go Color Blind: Removing Color Bias in Raw Denoising
summary: Raw images inherently suffer from noise due to the stochastic nature of light and sensor hardware imperfections. As real photon counts fall, the ratio of this noise to the signal degrades; consequently, for low-light conditions, robust denoising is especially vital for high-quality results. While recent data-driven methods achieve strong performance, they typically rely on large-scale noisy-clean image pairs that are costly and difficult to collect. Alternatively, parametric noise models can generate synthetic training data, but this necessitates precise camera calibration, which is often impractical for unknown devices. In this work, we propose a camera-agnostic, calibration-free paradigm for low-light raw denoising. We identify that color bias from black-level error is a primary source of performance degradation and causes severe color shifts. To mitigate this, we introduce a bias estimator network that predicts the black-level error as a global feature of the noisy input. We evaluate our approach across the ELD, SID, and LRID datasets, demonstrating superior performance among blind denoisers, particularly in terms of color correction. In many cases, we are competitive with-or can even surpass-methods with stronger supervision. Furthermore, we reveal that the widely used SIDD dataset contains significant color bias in its ground-truth images, which yields unrealistic color reproduction in trained models. We introduce a new ground-truth extraction framework to resolve this issue and provide a benchmark of existing methods on the corrected dataset.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需相机标定、无需配对的低光照RAW图像去噪方法，通过估计黑电平误差（颜色偏置）来提升去噪效果，并在多个数据集上达到甚至超越全监督方法。同时发现SIDD数据集存在颜色偏置问题，提出了新的真值提取框架并构建了评估基准。
AI.motivation: 现有数据驱动去噪方法依赖大规模噪声-干净图像对，收集成本高；参数化噪声模型需要精确相机标定，实际中难以实现。本文旨在提出一种免标定、免配对的低光照RAW去噪方案。
AI.method: 提出偏置估计网络（bias estimator network），以全局特征方式预测黑电平误差（black-level error），并将其作为输入辅助去噪网络，无需任何相机标定或配对数据。
AI.result: 在ELD、SID、LRID数据集上，该方法在盲去噪器中表现最优，尤其在颜色校正方面突出，许多情况下与有监督方法竞争甚至超越。同时发现SIDD数据集真值存在颜色偏置，导致模型颜色再现不真实，提出了新的真值提取框架并给出修正后的基准。
AI.conclusion: 黑电平误差导致的颜色偏置是低光照RAW去噪性能下降的主因；本文的免标定偏置估计方法有效解决了该问题，且揭示了广泛使用的SIDD数据集的质量缺陷并予以修正。

title: CA-DGCL: Dynamic Graph Continual Learning via Condensation and Attachment
summary: Dynamic graph continual learning (DGCL) is an effective manner for handling catastrophic forgetting in dynamic graphs. However, existing DGCL methods underutilize temporal information across graph snapshots. To address this critical issue, we propose a novel framework for Dynamic Graph Continual Learning via Condensation and Attachment (CA-DGCL). Specifically, CA-DGCL first condenses historical graph snapshots into compact semantic representations efficiently. Further, a cross-timestamp node chains is built to construct a third-order tensor and Tucker decomposition is applied to this tensor for obtaining stable node features, which encapsulate historical knowledge. Finally, these node features are used to generate new nodes and attached to the current graph for replaying of past information without compromising the new patterns. In addtion, a refined forgetting measure is introduced to make it more suitable for dynamic graph settings. Extensive experiments demonstrate that CA-DGCL outperforms baselines in forgetting suppression as well as maintain competitive accuracy, proving its efficacy for dynamic graph continual learning.

AI.tldr: 提出CA-DGCL框架，通过压缩历史快照、构建跨时间节点链并进行Tucker分解获取稳定节点特征，再将新节点附加到当前图进行回放，有效缓解动态图持续学习中的灾难性遗忘问题。
AI.motivation: 现有动态图持续学习方法未能充分利用图快照之间的时序信息，导致灾难性遗忘问题处理效果不佳。
AI.method: 1) 压缩历史图快照为紧凑语义表示；2) 构建跨时间节点链形成三阶张量，应用Tucker分解获取稳定节点特征；3) 利用这些特征生成新节点并附加到当前图进行回放；4) 引入改进的遗忘度量方法。
AI.result: CA-DGCL在遗忘抑制方面优于基线方法，同时保持有竞争力的准确性。
AI.conclusion: CA-DGCL通过压缩与附加机制有效利用时序信息，证明了其在动态图持续学习中的有效性。

title: Difference-Driven Gating: Adaptive Feature Fusion for U-Net Decoder
summary: The U-Net style models have been widely used in many applications. A critical step in these models is to reconstruct the lower-level features using a top-down decoder. This reconstruction requires precise fusion of high-level semantics and low-level details. Existing attention-based fusion methods typically derive attention weights from the top-down decoder features (global) alone or the correlation between the top-down decoder features and the bottom-up encoder features (local), then modulate the encoder features using these weights. In this work, we explore a different paradigm: deriving attention weights from the difference between the two feature streams. To this end, we propose two difference-based gating approaches: Feature-difference gating (FDG), which directly uses the absolute difference between global and local features to generate adaptive gating maps, and Entropy-difference gating (EDG), which measures the representational certainty of each stream via information entropy and uses their signed entropy difference to derive the attention weights.
